149|ff17e8|        guard totalContentHeight > 0 else { return 0 }

154|ee5041|    private func visibleRegionOffset(minimapHeight: CGFloat, visibleHeight: CGFloat) -> CGFloat {

156|45fee0|        guard scrollable > 0 else { return 0 }

159|7c51ab|        return scrollRatio * max(0, minimapHeight - visibleHeight)

164|7ef7ff|    /// Requests scroll so that the main editor's visible region is centered around the minimap Y position.
165|783b1d|    /// Uses callback to parent - minimap never directly controls editor scroll (prevents jitter).
166|92b230|    private func updateScroll(forMinimapY yPosition: CGFloat, minimapHeight: CGFloat) {
167|78fab1|        guard totalContentHeight > 0 else { return }
168|dac0ba|        guard let onScrollRequested = onScrollRequested else { return }
169|adc83b|
170|783533|        let clampedY = max(0, min(yPosition, minimapHeight))
171|89fa92|        let ratio = (minimapHeight > 0) ? (clampedY / minimapHeight) : 0
172|adc83b|
173|e4e280|        // Target a center position (VS Code behavior).
174|3b7590|        let targetCenter = ratio * totalContentHeight
175|b9ce99|        let desiredOffset = targetCenter - (scrollViewHeight / 2)
176|adc83b|
177|5b5c2d|        let maxOffset = max(0, totalContentHeight - scrollViewHeight)
178|6a7c82|        let newOffset = min(max(desiredOffset, 0), maxOffset)
179|d6ed84|        
180|73b1e7|        // Request scroll via callback - parent controls the actual scroll
181|f186d0|        onScrollRequested(newOffset)
182|27e597|    }

184|57db31|    // MARK: - Rendering (Canvas)
185|adc83b|
186|ddfd07|    private func drawMinimapPreview(
187|1dbb0f|        in context: inout GraphicsContext,
188|8ae978|        size: CGSize,
189|e54bca|        lines: [Substring]
190|981e04|    ) {
191|c96a6f|        let paddingX: CGFloat = 4
192|435081|        let paddingY: CGFloat = 2
193|adc83b|
194|c711e9|        let contentWidth = max(0, size.width - (paddingX * 2))
195|6c41d9|        let contentHeight = max(0, size.height - (paddingY * 2))
196|adc83b|
197|82f19e|        guard contentWidth > 0, contentHeight > 0 else { return }
198|adc83b|
199|ad5ba7|        let lineCount = max(lines.count, 1)
200|d6ed84|        
201|02e15c|        // FIXED: Use fixed pixels per line (VS Code style) instead of stretching to fill
202|54f182|        // This ensures the minimap always shows a tiny preview regardless of file size
203|3065bb|        let targetPixelsPerLine: CGFloat = 2.5
204|7dd91a|        let pixelsPerLine = targetPixelsPerLine
205|d6ed84|        
206|9b2a64|        // Calculate how many lines we can show in the minimap
207|3e694e|        let visibleLines = Int(contentHeight / pixelsPerLine)
208|d6ed84|        
209|1d6fd4|        // Calculate scroll offset to show the right portion of the document
210|91f804|        // Use scrollOffset and totalContentHeight to calculate current position
211|738fb2|        let scrollRatio = totalContentHeight > 0 ? Double(scrollOffset) / Double(max(totalContentHeight - scrollViewHeight, 1)) : 0
212|5d3dc8|        let startLine = max(0, Int(scrollRatio * Double(max(0, lineCount - visibleLines))))
213|adc83b|
214|03dc30|        // Token-block mode (colored rectangles) - VS Code style minimap
215|200364|        let minBarHeight: CGFloat = 1
216|f6b381|        let barHeight = max(minBarHeight, pixelsPerLine)
217|adc83b|
218|d1e35f|        // Approximate "characters" across minimap width.
219|26fc02|        let maxChars: CGFloat = 120
220|64e37a|        let charWidth = contentWidth / maxChars
221|adc83b|
222|dd472a|        // Render lines starting from startLine (scrolls with document)
223|8082c0|        let endLine = min(startLine + visibleLines + 1, lineCount)
224|d6ed84|        
225|5be8fa|        // Guard against invalid range (endLine must be >= startLine)
226|4957c8|        guard endLine >= startLine else { return }
227|d6ed84|        
228|714e33|        for i in startLine..<endLine {
229|794e26|            let displayIndex = i - startLine
230|82adeb|            let y = paddingY + (CGFloat(displayIndex) * pixelsPerLine)
231|db9e6f|            if y > size.height { break }
232|adc83b|
233|87a58d|            let line = lines.indices.contains(i) ? lines[i] : Substring("")
234|1922e4|            let tokens = tokenize(line)
235|adc83b|
236|ed9464|            var x = paddingX
237|4f7785|            let yAligned = y.rounded(FloatingPointRoundingRule.down)
238|adc83b|
239|993665|            if tokens.isEmpty {
240|e53354|                // Render faint whitespace line.
241|852310|                let rect = CGRect(x: x, y: yAligned, width: max(4, contentWidth * 0.15), height: barHeight)
242|afc890|                context.fill(Path(rect), with: .color(Color(white: 0.45).opacity(0.10)))
243|1df510|                continue
244|a7dc16|            }
245|adc83b|
246|3f8f53|            for token in tokens {
247|0ef518|                guard x < (paddingX + contentWidth) else { break }
248|6f9f42|                let w = max(1, CGFloat(token.text.count) * charWidth)
249|4a0a54|                let rect = CGRect(x: x, y: yAligned, width: min(w, paddingX + contentWidth - x), height: barHeight)
250|0a74f9|                context.fill(Path(rect), with: .color(token.color.opacity(0.80)))
251|354777|                x += w
252|a7dc16|            }
253|5f3077|        }
254|27e597|    }

259|2ac01d|        enum Kind {
260|566b1c|            case plain
261|5d29ef|            case keyword

267|adc83b|

274|7f1b9e|                return Color(white: 0.70)
275|b19882|            case .keyword:
276|5f4852|                return Color(red: 0.78, green: 0.53, blue: 0.95) // purple-ish
277|b4c397|            case .string:

289|10bee9|    private func makeAttributedLine(from line: Substring, fontSize: CGFloat) -> AttributedString {
290|a59ad5|        let tokens = tokenize(line)
291|adc83b|
292|1b63ae|        var out = AttributedString()
293|09ef1f|        for token in tokens {
294|d1233d|            var chunk = AttributedString(String(token.text))
295|9befb1|            chunk.font = .system(size: fontSize, weight: .regular, design: .monospaced)
296|97f23a|            chunk.foregroundColor = token.color
297|af1a00|            out.append(chunk)
298|5f3077|        }
299|adc83b|
300|d11742|        if out.characters.isEmpty {
301|e5b85c|            // Preserve a tiny amount of "whitespace presence" so empty lines still show.
302|9dd08f|            var chunk = AttributedString(" ")
303|9befb1|            chunk.font = .system(size: fontSize, weight: .regular, design: .monospaced)
304|8cb2a3|            chunk.foregroundColor = Color(white: 0.7).opacity(0.25)
305|af1a00|            out.append(chunk)
306|5f3077|        }
307|adc83b|
308|9231ab|        return out
309|27e597|    }
310|adc83b|
311|4abcd7|    private func tokenize(_ line: Substring) -> [Token] {
312|f0a25f|        // Extremely lightweight tokenizer:
313|6188fb|        // - full-line comment if first non-space is # (python-like)
314|de2ec8|        // - inline comment starting at //
315|0a0697|        // - strings in "..." or '...'
316|efb1f5|        // - numbers
317|23cdc0|        // - keywords
318|43ec2e|        // - PascalCase tokens treated as type names
319|39dd2a|        var tokens: [Token] = []
320|3d99ce|        var i = line.startIndex
321|adc83b|
322|600872|        func peek(_ offset: Int = 0) -> Character? {
323|34ecda|            var idx = i
324|c6ee90|            for _ in 0..<offset {
325|2838dc|                guard idx < line.endIndex else { return nil }
326|306cea|                idx = line.index(after: idx)
327|a7dc16|            }
328|5bdcc9|            return idx < line.endIndex ? line[idx] : nil
329|5f3077|        }
330|adc83b|
331|5ea689|        func advance(_ n: Int = 1) {
332|293115|            for _ in 0..<n {
333|42c484|                guard i < line.endIndex else { return }
334|10bf0b|                i = line.index(after: i)
335|a7dc16|            }
336|5f3077|        }
337|adc83b|
338|80ae1a|        // Detect python/shebang-like comment lines: first non-whitespace is '#'
339|5015b2|        if let firstNonSpace = line.firstIndex(where: { !$0.isWhitespace }),
340|fc3e36|           line[firstNonSpace] == "#" {
341|a7cd18|            tokens.append(Token(text: line[line.startIndex..<line.endIndex], kind: .comment))
342|41c689|            return tokens
343|5f3077|        }
344|adc83b|
345|544fab|        while i < line.endIndex {
346|7e4e40|            let ch = line[i]
347|adc83b|
348|40eeea|            // Inline comment: //
349|8fbe15|            if ch == "/", peek(1) == "/" {
350|860932|                let range = i..<line.endIndex
351|b67a6a|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[range], kind: .comment))
352|23d68f|                return tokens
353|a7dc16|            }
354|adc83b|
355|41a694|            // Whitespace
356|76957e|            if ch.isWhitespace {
357|eae3bb|                let start = i
358|7f4f8a|                while i < line.endIndex, line[i].isWhitespace { advance() }
359|3f1e7d|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .plain))
360|1df510|                continue
361|a7dc16|            }
362|adc83b|
363|e53ff2|            // String literals
364|899c9c|            if ch == "\"" || ch == "'" {
365|9d8090|                let quote = ch
366|eae3bb|                let start = i
367|e2aa2f|                advance()
368|4ed8ff|                var escaped = false
369|3876db|                while i < line.endIndex {
370|9c755e|                    let c = line[i]
371|605f4e|                    if escaped {
372|cb9c8a|                        escaped = false
373|3f9321|                        advance()
374|e47242|                        continue
375|c9717a|                    }
376|7f8424|                    if c == "\\" {
377|37863a|                        escaped = true
378|3f9321|                        advance()
379|e47242|                        continue
380|c9717a|                    }
381|d1886f|                    if c == quote {
382|3f9321|                        advance()
383|28a64b|                        break
384|c9717a|                    }
385|7c96dd|                    advance()
386|4e2d32|                }
387|9305c9|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .string))
388|1df510|                continue
389|a7dc16|            }
390|adc83b|
391|bd52f1|            // Numbers
392|38cd36|            if ch.isNumber {
393|eae3bb|                let start = i
394|89de1b|                while i < line.endIndex, line[i].isNumber || line[i] == "." { advance() }
395|8480cb|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .number))
396|1df510|                continue
397|a7dc16|            }
398|adc83b|
399|1b4cce|            // Identifiers / keywords
400|181e74|            if ch.isLetter || ch == "_" {
401|eae3bb|                let start = i
402|e2aa2f|                advance()
403|3876db|                while i < line.endIndex {
404|9c755e|                    let c = line[i]
405|e225c5|                    if c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_" { advance() } else { break }
406|4e2d32|                }
407|cd95c9|                let word = line[start..<i]
408|8aa092|                let kind: Token.Kind
409|adc83b|
410|08878f|                if isKeyword(word) {
411|74c41d|                    kind = .keyword
412|be7b6b|                } else if looksLikeTypeName(word) {
413|00ef8c|                    kind = .typeName
414|fdd0e2|                } else {
415|d46347|                    kind = .plain
416|4e2d32|                }
417|adc83b|
418|d43ef3|                tokens.append(Token(text: word, kind: kind))
419|1df510|                continue
420|a7dc16|            }
421|adc83b|
422|612c55|            // Operators / punctuation
423|953483|            let start = i
424|acf00b|            advance()
425|f768b8|            tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .plain))
426|5f3077|        }
427|adc83b|
428|50a443|        return tokens
429|27e597|    }
430|adc83b|
431|3facb7|    private func isKeyword(_ word: Substring) -> Bool {
432|c4f25e|        // Small superset of common Swift/JS/Python keywords.
433|b2b9d9|        // (We can't depend on a full parser here.)
434|396c95|        let keywords: Set<String> = [
435|9af6d0|            "import", "export", "from", "as",
436|dbd304|            "struct", "class", "enum", "protocol", "extension", "func", "var", "let",
437|bd4ed1|            "if", "else", "for", "while", "repeat", "switch", "case", "default",
438|e351bd|            "break", "continue", "return", "throw", "throws", "try", "catch",
439|b9f132|            "do", "in", "where", "guard", "defer",
440|511559|            "public", "private", "fileprivate", "internal", "open",
441|12dd92|            "static", "final", "override", "mutating", "nonmutating",
442|91d838|            "async", "await",
443|6f6f8c|            "true", "false", "nil",
444|0cf8cf|            "self", "super",
445|e39cc4|            // JS/Python-ish
446|ad9513|            "const", "function", "async", "await", "new", "this",
447|1c9b9e|            "def", "pass", "lambda", "None"
448|220505|        ]
449|0da584|        return keywords.contains(String(word))
450|27e597|    }
451|adc83b|
452|e0492d|    private func looksLikeTypeName(_ word: Substring) -> Bool {
453|ce64a9|        // Simple heuristic: PascalCase (leading uppercase).
454|bbf2da|        guard let first = word.first else { return false }
455|248546|        return first.isUppercase
456|27e597|    }
457|adc83b|
458|e2a5f4|    // MARK: - Diff colors
459|adc83b|
460|af35e5|    private func diffColor(for kind: MinimapDiffIndicator.Kind) -> Color {
461|01fe0f|        switch kind {
462|e91923|        case .added:
463|97b08e|            return Color.green
464|1a0dfa|        case .modified:
465|a71900|            return Color.red
466|4fc3e2|        case .deleted:
467|7296db|            // VS Code uses red-ish for deletions too; keep distinct via slightly different tone.
468|c59220|            return Color(red: 1.0, green: 0.35, blue: 0.35)
469|5f3077|        }
470|27e597|    }
471|b31277|}
472|adc83b|

3|03589a|/// VS Code–style minimap with:

8|ae571b|struct MinimapView: View {
9|8874d6|    // MARK: - External inputs
10|adc83b|
11|02a6c7|    let content: String
12|7b41a2|    /// Current scroll offset (read-only for display). Minimap FOLLOWS the editor, never fights it.

14|d36e69|    /// Visible viewport height (read-only for display)
15|fc661c|    let scrollViewHeight: CGFloat

18|34d0ce|    /// Callback when user taps/drags on minimap to request scroll.

20|47929f|    var onScrollRequested: ((CGFloat) -> Void)? = nil
21|adc83b|
22|cc7b6f|    /// Optional indicators to render as thin bars on the left side of the minimap.
23|c6a8c4|    /// Note: call sites can ignore this (default empty) without breaking compilation.
24|3ba7ea|    var diffIndicators: [MinimapDiffIndicator] = []
25|adc83b|
26|208209|    /// Fixed width; height expands to the container.
27|1a0b8f|    var minimapWidth: CGFloat = 60
28|adc83b|
29|53a063|    // MARK: - Internal state
30|adc83b|
31|ac8322|    @State private var isInteracting: Bool = false
32|adc83b|
33|c21cd1|    // MARK: - Types
34|adc83b|
35|137b41|    struct MinimapDiffIndicator: Identifiable, Hashable {

37|a79dcd|            case added
38|8af095|            case modified
39|cb69e9|            case deleted
40|5f3077|        }

42|23a2ea|        var id = UUID()

46|adc83b|
47|3d3a20|        init(lineRange: Range<Int>, kind: Kind) {
48|e89f25|            self.lineRange = lineRange

52|adc83b|

54|adc83b|
55|504e43|    var body: some View {
56|09743e|        GeometryReader { geometry in
57|6c6044|            let size = geometry.size
58|67505f|            let minimapHeight = max(1, size.height)
59|d016c6|            let lines = content.split(separator: "\n", omittingEmptySubsequences: false)
60|b5c109|            let lineCount = max(lines.count, 1)
61|adc83b|

94|19c0f6|                    .onChanged { value in

97|c9717a|                    }

109|21f1b7|    private func visibleRegionLayer(minimapHeight: CGFloat) -> some View {
110|4f9cf2|        let height = visibleRegionHeight(minimapHeight: minimapHeight)
111|3dff0c|        let offset = visibleRegionOffset(minimapHeight: minimapHeight, visibleHeight: height)
112|adc83b|

123|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
124|e053f1|    private func diffIndicatorsLayer(minimapHeight: CGFloat, lineCount: Int) -> some View {
125|df88d3|        // VS Code minimap diff markers are thin and pinned to the left.
126|352402|        let barWidth: CGFloat = 2
127|adc83b|
128|eb7497|        // Guard against division by zero
129|dad1b1|        if lineCount > 0 {
130|82ebe9|            ForEach(diffIndicators) { indicator in
131|c4c9a2|                let startLine = max(0, min(indicator.lineRange.lowerBound, lineCount - 1))
132|d34bb2|                let endLineExclusive = max(startLine + 1, min(indicator.lineRange.upperBound, lineCount))
133|adc83b|
134|7e47a5|                let startY = (CGFloat(startLine) / CGFloat(max(lineCount, 1))) * minimapHeight
135|634593|                let endY = (CGFloat(endLineExclusive) / CGFloat(max(lineCount, 1))) * minimapHeight
136|13ec78|                let height = max(2, endY - startY)
137|adc83b|
138|ff13e9|                Rectangle()
139|41dcad|                    .fill(diffColor(for: indicator.kind).opacity(0.95))
140|81c659|                    .frame(width: barWidth, height: height)
141|72358e|                    .offset(x: 0, y: startY)
142|a7dc16|            }
143|5f3077|        }
144|27e597|    }
145|adc83b|
146|906d12|    // MARK: - Visible region math
147|adc83b|
148|6919f3|    private func visibleRegionHeight(minimapHeight: CGFloat) -> CGFloat {
149|ff17e8|        guard totalContentHeight > 0 else { return 0 }
150|c5f520|        let ratio = scrollViewHeight / totalContentHeight
151|f9bc55|        return minimapHeight * min(max(ratio, 0), 1.0)
152|27e597|    }
153|adc83b|
154|ee5041|    private func visibleRegionOffset(minimapHeight: CGFloat, visibleHeight: CGFloat) -> CGFloat {
155|7da55c|        let scrollable = max(0, totalContentHeight - scrollViewHeight)
156|45fee0|        guard scrollable > 0 else { return 0 }
157|adc83b|
158|e13930|        let scrollRatio = min(max(scrollOffset / scrollable, 0), 1.0)
159|7c51ab|        return scrollRatio * max(0, minimapHeight - visibleHeight)
160|27e597|    }
161|adc83b|
162|04759d|    // MARK: - Interaction
163|adc83b|
164|7ef7ff|    /// Requests scroll so that the main editor's visible region is centered around the minimap Y position.
165|783b1d|    /// Uses callback to parent - minimap never directly controls editor scroll (prevents jitter).
166|92b230|    private func updateScroll(forMinimapY yPosition: CGFloat, minimapHeight: CGFloat) {
167|78fab1|        guard totalContentHeight > 0 else { return }
168|dac0ba|        guard let onScrollRequested = onScrollRequested else { return }
169|adc83b|
170|783533|        let clampedY = max(0, min(yPosition, minimapHeight))
171|89fa92|        let ratio = (minimapHeight > 0) ? (clampedY / minimapHeight) : 0
172|adc83b|
173|e4e280|        // Target a center position (VS Code behavior).
174|3b7590|        let targetCenter = ratio * totalContentHeight
175|b9ce99|        let desiredOffset = targetCenter - (scrollViewHeight / 2)
176|adc83b|
177|5b5c2d|        let maxOffset = max(0, totalContentHeight - scrollViewHeight)
178|6a7c82|        let newOffset = min(max(desiredOffset, 0), maxOffset)
179|d6ed84|        
180|73b1e7|        // Request scroll via callback - parent controls the actual scroll
181|f186d0|        onScrollRequested(newOffset)
182|27e597|    }
183|adc83b|
184|57db31|    // MARK: - Rendering (Canvas)
185|adc83b|
186|ddfd07|    private func drawMinimapPreview(
187|1dbb0f|        in context: inout GraphicsContext,
188|8ae978|        size: CGSize,
189|e54bca|        lines: [Substring]
190|981e04|    ) {
191|c96a6f|        let paddingX: CGFloat = 4
192|435081|        let paddingY: CGFloat = 2
193|adc83b|
194|c711e9|        let contentWidth = max(0, size.width - (paddingX * 2))
195|6c41d9|        let contentHeight = max(0, size.height - (paddingY * 2))
196|adc83b|
197|82f19e|        guard contentWidth > 0, contentHeight > 0 else { return }
198|adc83b|
199|ad5ba7|        let lineCount = max(lines.count, 1)
200|d6ed84|        
201|02e15c|        // FIXED: Use fixed pixels per line (VS Code style) instead of stretching to fill
202|54f182|        // This ensures the minimap always shows a tiny preview regardless of file size
203|3065bb|        let targetPixelsPerLine: CGFloat = 2.5
204|7dd91a|        let pixelsPerLine = targetPixelsPerLine
205|d6ed84|        
206|9b2a64|        // Calculate how many lines we can show in the minimap
207|3e694e|        let visibleLines = Int(contentHeight / pixelsPerLine)
208|d6ed84|        
209|1d6fd4|        // Calculate scroll offset to show the right portion of the document
210|91f804|        // Use scrollOffset and totalContentHeight to calculate current position
211|738fb2|        let scrollRatio = totalContentHeight > 0 ? Double(scrollOffset) / Double(max(totalContentHeight - scrollViewHeight, 1)) : 0
212|5d3dc8|        let startLine = max(0, Int(scrollRatio * Double(max(0, lineCount - visibleLines))))
213|adc83b|
214|03dc30|        // Token-block mode (colored rectangles) - VS Code style minimap
215|200364|        let minBarHeight: CGFloat = 1
216|f6b381|        let barHeight = max(minBarHeight, pixelsPerLine)
217|adc83b|
218|d1e35f|        // Approximate "characters" across minimap width.
219|26fc02|        let maxChars: CGFloat = 120
220|64e37a|        let charWidth = contentWidth / maxChars
221|adc83b|
222|dd472a|        // Render lines starting from startLine (scrolls with document)
223|8082c0|        let endLine = min(startLine + visibleLines + 1, lineCount)
224|d6ed84|        
225|5be8fa|        // Guard against invalid range (endLine must be >= startLine)
226|4957c8|        guard endLine >= startLine else { return }
227|d6ed84|        
228|714e33|        for i in startLine..<endLine {
229|794e26|            let displayIndex = i - startLine
230|82adeb|            let y = paddingY + (CGFloat(displayIndex) * pixelsPerLine)
231|db9e6f|            if y > size.height { break }
232|adc83b|
233|87a58d|            let line = lines.indices.contains(i) ? lines[i] : Substring("")
234|1922e4|            let tokens = tokenize(line)
235|adc83b|
236|ed9464|            var x = paddingX
237|4f7785|            let yAligned = y.rounded(FloatingPointRoundingRule.down)
238|adc83b|
239|993665|            if tokens.isEmpty {
240|e53354|                // Render faint whitespace line.
241|852310|                let rect = CGRect(x: x, y: yAligned, width: max(4, contentWidth * 0.15), height: barHeight)
242|afc890|                context.fill(Path(rect), with: .color(Color(white: 0.45).opacity(0.10)))
243|1df510|                continue
244|a7dc16|            }
245|adc83b|
246|3f8f53|            for token in tokens {
247|0ef518|                guard x < (paddingX + contentWidth) else { break }
248|6f9f42|                let w = max(1, CGFloat(token.text.count) * charWidth)
249|4a0a54|                let rect = CGRect(x: x, y: yAligned, width: min(w, paddingX + contentWidth - x), height: barHeight)
250|0a74f9|                context.fill(Path(rect), with: .color(token.color.opacity(0.80)))
251|354777|                x += w
252|a7dc16|            }
253|5f3077|        }
254|27e597|    }
255|adc83b|
256|3b9c43|    // MARK: - Syntax highlighting (lightweight)
257|adc83b|
258|342387|    private struct Token {
259|2ac01d|        enum Kind {
260|566b1c|            case plain
261|5d29ef|            case keyword
262|0603c2|            case string
263|d9fad7|            case comment
264|efbbfd|            case number
265|6e9645|            case typeName
266|5f3077|        }
267|adc83b|
268|f051aa|        var text: Substring
269|f8a374|        var kind: Kind
270|adc83b|
271|b98be5|        var color: Color {
272|157398|            switch kind {
273|706e3d|            case .plain:
274|7f1b9e|                return Color(white: 0.70)
275|b19882|            case .keyword:
276|5f4852|                return Color(red: 0.78, green: 0.53, blue: 0.95) // purple-ish
277|b4c397|            case .string:
278|964852|                return Color(red: 0.80, green: 0.72, blue: 0.43) // yellow-ish
279|3ded9b|            case .comment:
280|37e86a|                return Color(red: 0.46, green: 0.60, blue: 0.50) // green-ish
281|fea990|            case .number:
282|c38f5f|                return Color(red: 0.40, green: 0.73, blue: 0.92) // blue-ish
283|2c017e|            case .typeName:
284|5585ef|                return Color(red: 0.45, green: 0.83, blue: 0.70) // teal-ish
285|a7dc16|            }
286|5f3077|        }
287|27e597|    }
288|adc83b|
289|10bee9|    private func makeAttributedLine(from line: Substring, fontSize: CGFloat) -> AttributedString {
290|a59ad5|        let tokens = tokenize(line)
291|adc83b|
292|1b63ae|        var out = AttributedString()
293|09ef1f|        for token in tokens {
294|d1233d|            var chunk = AttributedString(String(token.text))
295|9befb1|            chunk.font = .system(size: fontSize, weight: .regular, design: .monospaced)
296|97f23a|            chunk.foregroundColor = token.color
297|af1a00|            out.append(chunk)
298|5f3077|        }
299|adc83b|
300|d11742|        if out.characters.isEmpty {
301|e5b85c|            // Preserve a tiny amount of "whitespace presence" so empty lines still show.
302|9dd08f|            var chunk = AttributedString(" ")
303|9befb1|            chunk.font = .system(size: fontSize, weight: .regular, design: .monospaced)
304|8cb2a3|            chunk.foregroundColor = Color(white: 0.7).opacity(0.25)
305|af1a00|            out.append(chunk)
306|5f3077|        }
307|adc83b|
308|9231ab|        return out
309|27e597|    }
310|adc83b|
311|4abcd7|    private func tokenize(_ line: Substring) -> [Token] {
312|f0a25f|        // Extremely lightweight tokenizer:
313|6188fb|        // - full-line comment if first non-space is # (python-like)
314|de2ec8|        // - inline comment starting at //
315|0a0697|        // - strings in "..." or '...'
316|efb1f5|        // - numbers
317|23cdc0|        // - keywords
318|43ec2e|        // - PascalCase tokens treated as type names
319|39dd2a|        var tokens: [Token] = []
320|3d99ce|        var i = line.startIndex
321|adc83b|
322|600872|        func peek(_ offset: Int = 0) -> Character? {
323|34ecda|            var idx = i
324|c6ee90|            for _ in 0..<offset {
325|2838dc|                guard idx < line.endIndex else { return nil }
326|306cea|                idx = line.index(after: idx)
327|a7dc16|            }
328|5bdcc9|            return idx < line.endIndex ? line[idx] : nil
329|5f3077|        }
330|adc83b|
331|5ea689|        func advance(_ n: Int = 1) {
332|293115|            for _ in 0..<n {
333|42c484|                guard i < line.endIndex else { return }
334|10bf0b|                i = line.index(after: i)
335|a7dc16|            }
336|5f3077|        }
337|adc83b|
338|80ae1a|        // Detect python/shebang-like comment lines: first non-whitespace is '#'
339|5015b2|        if let firstNonSpace = line.firstIndex(where: { !$0.isWhitespace }),
340|fc3e36|           line[firstNonSpace] == "#" {
341|a7cd18|            tokens.append(Token(text: line[line.startIndex..<line.endIndex], kind: .comment))
342|41c689|            return tokens
343|5f3077|        }
344|adc83b|
345|544fab|        while i < line.endIndex {
346|7e4e40|            let ch = line[i]
347|adc83b|
348|40eeea|            // Inline comment: //
349|8fbe15|            if ch == "/", peek(1) == "/" {
350|860932|                let range = i..<line.endIndex
351|b67a6a|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[range], kind: .comment))
352|23d68f|                return tokens
353|a7dc16|            }
354|adc83b|
355|41a694|            // Whitespace
356|76957e|            if ch.isWhitespace {
357|eae3bb|                let start = i
358|7f4f8a|                while i < line.endIndex, line[i].isWhitespace { advance() }
359|3f1e7d|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .plain))
360|1df510|                continue
361|a7dc16|            }
362|adc83b|
363|e53ff2|            // String literals
364|899c9c|            if ch == "\"" || ch == "'" {
365|9d8090|                let quote = ch
366|eae3bb|                let start = i
367|e2aa2f|                advance()
368|4ed8ff|                var escaped = false
369|3876db|                while i < line.endIndex {
370|9c755e|                    let c = line[i]
371|605f4e|                    if escaped {
372|cb9c8a|                        escaped = false
373|3f9321|                        advance()
374|e47242|                        continue
375|c9717a|                    }
376|7f8424|                    if c == "\\" {
377|37863a|                        escaped = true
378|3f9321|                        advance()
379|e47242|                        continue
380|c9717a|                    }
381|d1886f|                    if c == quote {
382|3f9321|                        advance()
383|28a64b|                        break
384|c9717a|                    }
385|7c96dd|                    advance()
386|4e2d32|                }
387|9305c9|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .string))
388|1df510|                continue
389|a7dc16|            }
390|adc83b|
391|bd52f1|            // Numbers
392|38cd36|            if ch.isNumber {
393|eae3bb|                let start = i
394|89de1b|                while i < line.endIndex, line[i].isNumber || line[i] == "." { advance() }
395|8480cb|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .number))
396|1df510|                continue
397|a7dc16|            }
398|adc83b|
399|1b4cce|            // Identifiers / keywords
400|181e74|            if ch.isLetter || ch == "_" {
401|eae3bb|                let start = i
402|e2aa2f|                advance()
403|3876db|                while i < line.endIndex {
404|9c755e|                    let c = line[i]
405|e225c5|                    if c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_" { advance() } else { break }
406|4e2d32|                }
407|cd95c9|                let word = line[start..<i]
408|8aa092|                let kind: Token.Kind
409|adc83b|
410|08878f|                if isKeyword(word) {
411|74c41d|                    kind = .keyword
412|be7b6b|                } else if looksLikeTypeName(word) {
413|00ef8c|                    kind = .typeName
414|fdd0e2|                } else {
415|d46347|                    kind = .plain
416|4e2d32|                }
417|adc83b|
418|d43ef3|                tokens.append(Token(text: word, kind: kind))
419|1df510|                continue
420|a7dc16|            }
421|adc83b|
422|612c55|            // Operators / punctuation
423|953483|            let start = i
424|acf00b|            advance()
425|f768b8|            tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .plain))
426|5f3077|        }
427|adc83b|
428|50a443|        return tokens
429|27e597|    }
430|adc83b|
431|3facb7|    private func isKeyword(_ word: Substring) -> Bool {
432|c4f25e|        // Small superset of common Swift/JS/Python keywords.
433|b2b9d9|        // (We can't depend on a full parser here.)
434|396c95|        let keywords: Set<String> = [
435|9af6d0|            "import", "export", "from", "as",
436|dbd304|            "struct", "class", "enum", "protocol", "extension", "func", "var", "let",
437|bd4ed1|            "if", "else", "for", "while", "repeat", "switch", "case", "default",
438|e351bd|            "break", "continue", "return", "throw", "throws", "try", "catch",
439|b9f132|            "do", "in", "where", "guard", "defer",
440|511559|            "public", "private", "fileprivate", "internal", "open",
441|12dd92|            "static", "final", "override", "mutating", "nonmutating",
442|91d838|            "async", "await",
443|6f6f8c|            "true", "false", "nil",
444|0cf8cf|            "self", "super",
445|e39cc4|            // JS/Python-ish
446|ad9513|            "const", "function", "async", "await", "new", "this",
447|1c9b9e|            "def", "pass", "lambda", "None"
448|220505|        ]
449|0da584|        return keywords.contains(String(word))
450|27e597|    }
451|adc83b|
452|e0492d|    private func looksLikeTypeName(_ word: Substring) -> Bool {
453|ce64a9|        // Simple heuristic: PascalCase (leading uppercase).
454|bbf2da|        guard let first = word.first else { return false }
455|248546|        return first.isUppercase
456|27e597|    }
457|adc83b|
458|e2a5f4|    // MARK: - Diff colors
459|adc83b|
460|af35e5|    private func diffColor(for kind: MinimapDiffIndicator.Kind) -> Color {
461|01fe0f|        switch kind {
462|e91923|        case .added:
463|97b08e|            return Color.green
464|1a0dfa|        case .modified:
465|a71900|            return Color.red
466|4fc3e2|        case .deleted:
467|7296db|            // VS Code uses red-ish for deletions too; keep distinct via slightly different tone.
468|c59220|            return Color(red: 1.0, green: 0.35, blue: 0.35)
469|5f3077|        }
470|27e597|    }
471|b31277|}

103|17ce60|            panes = [pane]

114|4a10ef|    func splitPane(direction: SplitDirection, fromPaneId: UUID? = nil) {
115|4a4aa9|        let sourcePane = fromPaneId.flatMap { id in panes.first { $0.id == id } } ?? activePane
116|d018e4|        guard let source = sourcePane else { return }
117|d6ed84|        
118|ecd130|        // Create new pane with duplicate of active tab (or empty)
119|403ac4|        var newTabs: [Tab] = []
120|e7a36d|        if let activeTab = source.activeTab {
121|561680|            let duplicateTab = Tab(
122|738907|                fileName: activeTab.fileName,
123|6e48e1|                content: activeTab.content,
124|75da73|                language: activeTab.language,
125|664421|                url: activeTab.url,
126|7c1d53|                isUnsaved: activeTab.isUnsaved
127|43d041|            )
128|0ce6cc|            newTabs = [duplicateTab]
129|5f3077|        }
130|d6ed84|        
131|e00a28|        let newPane = EditorPane(tabs: newTabs, activeTabId: newTabs.first?.id)
132|d6ed84|        
133|9b4dc9|        self.splitDirection = direction
134|eae326|        panes.append(newPane)
135|d6ed84|        
136|7b622c|        // Recalculate ratios equally
137|44dc67|        let ratio = 1.0 / CGFloat(panes.count)
138|0a032c|        splitRatios = Array(repeating: ratio, count: panes.count)
139|d6ed84|        
140|6ae100|        activePaneId = newPane.id
141|27e597|    }
142|b4687f|    
143|0e5294|    func closePane(id: UUID) {
144|0340ad|        guard panes.count > 1 else { return } // Keep at least one pane
145|653e9e|        guard let index = panes.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == id }) else { return }
146|d6ed84|        
147|6e551e|        panes.remove(at: index)
148|c30876|        splitRatios.remove(at: index)
149|d6ed84|        
150|897a90|        // Normalize ratios
151|7df9cd|        let total = splitRatios.reduce(0, +)
152|a5f33f|        if total > 0 {
153|e10388|            splitRatios = splitRatios.map { $0 / total }
154|b31999|        } else {
155|9fbae1|            splitRatios = Array(repeating: 1.0 / CGFloat(panes.count), count: panes.count)
156|5f3077|        }
157|d6ed84|        
158|29a74a|        // Update active pane
159|d0cbf9|        if activePaneId == id {
160|b3b67b|            activePaneId = panes.first?.id
161|5f3077|        }
162|27e597|    }

179|27e597|    }
180|b4687f|    
181|192c4a|    func moveTabToNewSplit(tab: Tab, fromPaneId: UUID, direction: SplitDirection) {
182|1acb46|        guard let fromPane = panes.first(where: { $0.id == fromPaneId }) else { return }
183|d6ed84|        
184|db854c|        fromPane.closeTab(id: tab.id)
185|d6ed84|        
186|2638fc|        let newTab = Tab(
187|80b3d9|            fileName: tab.fileName,
188|cbae7e|            content: tab.content,
189|98f4c9|            language: tab.language,
190|d65b24|            url: tab.url,
191|326cc1|            isUnsaved: tab.isUnsaved
192|3143a4|        )
193|d6ed84|        
194|914082|        let newPane = EditorPane(tabs: [newTab], activeTabId: newTab.id)
195|9b4dc9|        self.splitDirection = direction
196|eae326|        panes.append(newPane)
197|d6ed84|        
198|44dc67|        let ratio = 1.0 / CGFloat(panes.count)
199|0a032c|        splitRatios = Array(repeating: ratio, count: panes.count)
200|6ae100|        activePaneId = newPane.id
201|27e597|    }
202|b4687f|    
203|fc4e2f|    func updateRatio(at index: Int, delta: CGFloat, totalSize: CGFloat) {
204|aa52a4|        guard index < splitRatios.count - 1 else { return }
205|d6ed84|        
206|f7ce87|        let deltaRatio = delta / totalSize
207|019df3|        let minRatio: CGFloat = 0.15
208|d6ed84|        
209|3f9e36|        let newRatio1 = splitRatios[index] + deltaRatio
210|d4621b|        let newRatio2 = splitRatios[index + 1] - deltaRatio
211|d6ed84|        
212|289da5|        if newRatio1 >= minRatio && newRatio2 >= minRatio {
213|6df122|            splitRatios[index] = newRatio1
214|7b2474|            splitRatios[index + 1] = newRatio2
215|5f3077|        }
216|27e597|    }
217|b4687f|    
218|46ecde|    // Sync scroll across panes
219|2a64eb|    func syncScrollOffset(_ offset: CGFloat, fromPaneId: UUID) {
220|3ed88e|        guard syncScroll else { return }
221|b4a90e|        for pane in panes where pane.id != fromPaneId {
222|74eec9|            pane.scrollOffset = offset
223|5f3077|        }
224|27e597|    }
225|b31277|}
226|adc83b|
227|c77a9a|// MARK: - Split Editor View
228|adc83b|
229|b99447|struct SplitEditorView: View {
230|40e747|    @ObservedObject var splitManager: SplitEditorManager
231|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
232|b4687f|    
233|504e43|    var body: some View {
234|09743e|        GeometryReader { geometry in
235|412812|            if splitManager.panes.count == 1 {
236|d46070|                // Single pane - no split
237|d8d1de|                if let pane = splitManager.panes.first {
238|24bea0|                    SinglePaneView(pane: pane, splitManager: splitManager, editorCore: editorCore)
239|4e2d32|                }
240|f5a6eb|            } else {
241|355a3b|                // Multiple panes with split
242|7f3586|                splitContent(geometry: geometry)
243|a7dc16|            }
244|5f3077|        }
245|27e597|    }
246|b4687f|    
247|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
248|850970|    private func splitContent(geometry: GeometryProxy) -> some View {
249|259571|        let totalSize = splitManager.splitDirection == .horizontal ? geometry.size.width : geometry.size.height
250|d6ed84|        
251|ffba2f|        if splitManager.splitDirection == .horizontal {
252|3b7550|            HStack(spacing: 0) {
253|a708a2|                ForEach(Array(splitManager.panes.enumerated()), id: \.element.id) { index, pane in
254|24bea0|                    SinglePaneView(pane: pane, splitManager: splitManager, editorCore: editorCore)
255|fc6e52|                        .frame(width: totalSize * splitManager.splitRatios[index])
256|dd2193|                    
257|497368|                    if index < splitManager.panes.count - 1 {
258|1c47d6|                        SplitDragHandle(direction: .horizontal) { delta in
259|27a7db|                            splitManager.updateRatio(at: index, delta: delta, totalSize: totalSize)
260|392b35|                        }
261|c9717a|                    }
262|4e2d32|                }
263|a7dc16|            }
264|b31999|        } else {
265|92175e|            VStack(spacing: 0) {
266|a708a2|                ForEach(Array(splitManager.panes.enumerated()), id: \.element.id) { index, pane in
267|24bea0|                    SinglePaneView(pane: pane, splitManager: splitManager, editorCore: editorCore)
268|0805c1|                        .frame(height: totalSize * splitManager.splitRatios[index])
269|dd2193|                    
270|497368|                    if index < splitManager.panes.count - 1 {
271|61382d|                        SplitDragHandle(direction: .vertical) { delta in
272|27a7db|                            splitManager.updateRatio(at: index, delta: delta, totalSize: totalSize)
273|392b35|                        }
274|c9717a|                    }
275|4e2d32|                }
276|a7dc16|            }
277|5f3077|        }
278|27e597|    }
279|b31277|}

314|3143a4|        )
315|d38294|        .overlay(
316|906091|            // Drop zone indicator

320|7d6dc0|                        .fill(Color.accentColor.opacity(0.2))
321|add301|                        .overlay(

324|63214b|                        )

326|a7dc16|            }
327|3143a4|        )

329|9dd1a3|            splitManager.activePaneId = pane.id
330|5f3077|        }
331|942311|        .onDrop(of: [.text], isTargeted: $dragOverPane) { providers in
332|2a4c53|            // Handle tab drop
333|40cfc4|            return true
334|5f3077|        }
335|27e597|    }

431|3070d1|

453|3143a4|        )

472|a7dc16|            }

476|a7dc16|            }

481|febcd8|// MARK: - Pane Editor View
482|adc83b|
483|081d2d|struct PaneEditorView: View {
484|ed36f0|    @ObservedObject var pane: EditorPane
485|4dc199|    let tab: Tab
486|40e747|    @ObservedObject var splitManager: SplitEditorManager
487|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
488|c97289|    @ObservedObject private var debugManager = DebugManager.shared
489|a9aa54|    @ObservedObject private var foldingManager = CodeFoldingManager.shared
490|eba335|    @State private var text: String = ""
491|4f0ac8|    @State private var scrollPosition: Int = 0
492|36da68|    @State private var scrollOffset: CGFloat = 0
493|d473fd|    @State private var totalLines: Int = 1
494|bcf90b|    @State private var visibleLines: Int = 20
495|9cb5e9|    @State private var currentLineNumber: Int = 1
496|cc347a|    @State private var currentColumn: Int = 1
497|eee196|    @State private var cursorIndex: Int = 0
498|2c43f6|    @State private var lineHeight: CGFloat = 17
499|5c2aeb|    @State private var requestedLineSelection: Int? = nil
500|446eb9|    @State private var requestedCursorIndex: Int? = nil
501|b4687f|    
502|952908|    private var useRunestoneEditor: Bool { FeatureFlags.useRunestoneEditor }
503|adc83b|
504|834dc8|    @AppStorage("lineNumbersStyle") private var lineNumbersStyle: String = "on"
505|b4687f|    
506|5df2db|    private var fileId: String { tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName }
507|b4687f|    
508|504e43|    var body: some View {
509|09743e|        GeometryReader { geometry in
510|3b7550|            HStack(spacing: 0) {
511|57cbc9|                // Line numbers + breakpoints + code folding (gutter)
512|1c3407|                //
513|ed4951|                // IMPORTANT: keep gutter in sync with the editor scroll position. The gutter ScrollView
514|ea8c59|                // is scroll-disabled, and we offset the content to match the editor's scroll.
515|819e1d|                if lineNumbersStyle != "off" {
516|934553|                    ScrollView(showsIndicators: false) {
517|a1a512|                        VStack(alignment: .trailing, spacing: 0) {
518|287ca6|                            // Match UITextView.textContainerInset.top (see SyntaxHighlightingTextView.swift)
519|8aef08|                            ForEach(0..<totalLines, id: \ .self) { lineIndex in
520|3ebc2f|                                HStack(spacing: 2) {
521|336ad1|                                    // Fold chevron icon
522|11d51b|                                    if foldingManager.isFoldable(fileId: fileId, line: lineIndex) {
523|91d8b4|                                        Button(action: { 
524|5e28ca|                                            foldingManager.toggleFold(fileId: fileId, line: lineIndex)
525|834ec4|                                        }) {
526|011694|                                            Image(systemName: foldingManager.isFolded(fileId: fileId, line: lineIndex) ? "chevron.right" : "chevron.down")
527|1fb1f1|                                                .font(.system(size: 10, weight: .regular))
528|d94af6|                                                .foregroundColor(.secondary.opacity(0.8))
529|1df8a9|                                                .frame(width: 12, height: lineHeight)
530|eed1d8|                                        }
531|30d0d7|                                        .buttonStyle(.plain)
532|719c18|                                    } else {
533|6d00af|                                        // Spacer for alignment
534|17f4b6|                                        Spacer()
535|2344be|                                            .frame(width: 12)
536|8ab74d|                                    }
537|9539f6|                                    
538|e4afd0|                                    // Breakpoint indicator
539|9132d6|                                    Button(action: { debugManager.toggleBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) }) {
540|6304cf|                                        Circle()
541|605456|                                            .fill(debugManager.hasBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) ? Color.red : Color.clear)
542|5c2d4a|                                            .overlay(
543|77f785|                                                Circle()
544|ef0c8f|                                                    .stroke(Color.red.opacity(0.6), lineWidth: 1)
545|bfe428|                                                    .opacity(debugManager.hasBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) ? 0 : 0.25)
546|8fe569|                                            )
547|d350e9|                                            .frame(width: 10, height: 10)
548|8ab74d|                                    }
549|475b6d|                                    .buttonStyle(.plain)
550|c99ef6|                                    .frame(width: 14, height: lineHeight)
551|adc83b|
552|8f7419|                                    Text(displayText(for: lineIndex))
553|8fdcdb|                                        .font(.system(size: 12, design: .monospaced))
554|efb0dd|                                        .foregroundColor(lineIndex + 1 == currentLineNumber ? .primary : .secondary.opacity(0.6))
555|eb881d|                                        .frame(height: lineHeight)
556|bc9c7a|                                        .contentShape(Rectangle())
557|f348f3|                                        .onTapGesture {
558|473b13|                                            requestedLineSelection = lineIndex
559|eed1d8|                                        }
560|f83e05|                                }
561|695c29|                                .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, alignment: .trailing)
562|89d40a|                            }
563|392b35|                        }
564|539a79|                        .padding(.trailing, 4)
565|88bfb0|                        .padding(.top, 8)
566|ad281a|                        .offset(y: -scrollOffset)
567|c9717a|                    }
568|9f14cd|                    .scrollDisabled(true)
569|06d27a|                    .frame(width: 70)
570|0f5931|                    .background(Color(UIColor.secondarySystemBackground).opacity(0.5))
571|4e2d32|                }
572|adc83b|
573|266a6a|                // Editor
574|a70ea9|                SyntaxHighlightingTextView(
575|53ec0e|                    text: $text,
576|efee53|                    filename: tab.fileName,
577|5182bc|                    scrollPosition: $scrollPosition,
578|fec2be|                    scrollOffset: $scrollOffset,
579|1b9482|                    totalLines: $totalLines,
580|7a86c9|                    visibleLines: $visibleLines,
581|672538|                    currentLineNumber: $currentLineNumber,
582|fca1f6|                    currentColumn: $currentColumn,
583|caf1e7|                    lineHeight: $lineHeight,
584|290fcf|                    isActive: splitManager.activePaneId == pane.id,
585|5eff51|                    editorCore: editorCore,
586|85e738|                    requestedLineSelection: $requestedLineSelection
587|6f642e|                )
588|717522|                .onChange(of: text) { newValue in
589|ef5cad|                    pane.updateTabContent(newValue)
590|4e2d32|                }
591|f86b95|                .onChange(of: scrollOffset) { newOffset in
592|9b57fb|                    // Track latest scroll offset for this pane, and sync if enabled.
593|f6218e|                    if abs(pane.scrollOffset - newOffset) > 0.5 {
594|edf28f|                        pane.scrollOffset = newOffset
595|c9717a|                    }
596|54e939|                    if splitManager.syncScroll {
597|7b6383|                        splitManager.syncScrollOffset(newOffset, fromPaneId: pane.id)
598|c9717a|                    }
599|4e2d32|                }
600|216278|                
601|7ed984|                // Mini minimap
602|33afde|                MinimapView(
603|c6f098|                    content: text,
604|63c90b|                    scrollOffset: scrollOffset,
605|55164f|                    scrollViewHeight: geometry.size.height,
606|294a32|                    totalContentHeight: CGFloat(totalLines) * lineHeight,
607|882946|                    onScrollRequested: { newOffset in
608|2c2c75|                        scrollOffset = newOffset
609|757ff1|                        scrollPosition = Int(newOffset / max(lineHeight, 1))
610|c9717a|                    }
611|6f642e|                )
612|3c4582|                .frame(width: 60)
613|a7dc16|            }
614|6589b5|            // Sticky Header Overlay (FEAT-040)
615|7a45a9|            StickyHeaderView(
616|948d7a|                text: text,
617|54ab92|                currentLine: scrollPosition, // Using scrollPosition as approximate top line
618|1a8c40|                theme: ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme,
619|95435d|                lineHeight: lineHeight,
620|cd7b67|                onSelect: { line in
621|77691c|                    requestedLineSelection = line
622|4e2d32|                }
623|43d041|            )
624|1c065c|            .padding(.leading, 70) // Offset for line numbers + folding icons
625|0e402e|            .padding(.trailing, 60) // Offset for minimap
626|3070d1|            
627|89a89f|            // Inlay Hints Overlay (type hints, parameter names)
628|661a9c|            InlayHintsOverlay(
629|a9b5c1|                code: text,
630|dc1d64|                language: tab.language,
631|a4876e|                scrollPosition: scrollPosition,
632|95435d|                lineHeight: lineHeight,
633|65b04d|                fontSize: 14,
634|638f59|                gutterWidth: lineNumbersStyle != "off" ? 70 : 0,
635|5f899d|                rightReservedWidth: 60
636|43d041|            )
637|0a7127|            .padding(.leading, lineNumbersStyle != "off" ? 70 : 0) // Offset for line numbers
638|0e402e|            .padding(.trailing, 60) // Offset for minimap
639|3070d1|            
640|057f8e|            // Peek Definition Overlay
641|37dff6|            if let peekState = editorCore.peekState, editorCore.activeTabId == tab.id {
642|7c7415|                 // Calculate simplified position: center of screen for now, but conceptually "inline"
643|7db4cc|                 // To make it truly inline, we'd need more complex geometry, but overlay is a good start.
644|3dc160|                 VStack {
645|0b626e|                     Spacer()

721|3070d1|

750|a83186|                    state = delta

752|bc75fc|                .onChanged { value in

755|716613|                    onDrag(delta)

757|6b43cc|                .onEnded { _ in
758|dda585|                    isDragging = false
759|4e2d32|                }
760|3143a4|        )
761|ca4aa4|        .onHover { hovering in
762|d52bbe|            if hovering {
763|b94855|                #if targetEnvironment(macCatalyst)
764|922e76|                NSCursor.resizeLeftRight.push()
765|1b83de|                #endif
766|f5a6eb|            } else {
767|b94855|                #if targetEnvironment(macCatalyst)
768|d026ea|                NSCursor.pop()
769|1b83de|                #endif
770|a7dc16|            }
771|5f3077|        }
772|27e597|    }

116|d018e4|        guard let source = sourcePane else { return }
117|d6ed84|        
118|ecd130|        // Create new pane with duplicate of active tab (or empty)
119|403ac4|        var newTabs: [Tab] = []
120|e7a36d|        if let activeTab = source.activeTab {
121|561680|            let duplicateTab = Tab(
122|738907|                fileName: activeTab.fileName,
123|6e48e1|                content: activeTab.content,
124|75da73|                language: activeTab.language,

131|e00a28|        let newPane = EditorPane(tabs: newTabs, activeTabId: newTabs.first?.id)
132|d6ed84|        
133|9b4dc9|        self.splitDirection = direction
134|eae326|        panes.append(newPane)
135|d6ed84|        
136|7b622c|        // Recalculate ratios equally
137|44dc67|        let ratio = 1.0 / CGFloat(panes.count)
138|0a032c|        splitRatios = Array(repeating: ratio, count: panes.count)
139|d6ed84|        
140|6ae100|        activePaneId = newPane.id
141|27e597|    }

143|0e5294|    func closePane(id: UUID) {
144|0340ad|        guard panes.count > 1 else { return } // Keep at least one pane
145|653e9e|        guard let index = panes.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == id }) else { return }
146|d6ed84|        
147|6e551e|        panes.remove(at: index)
148|c30876|        splitRatios.remove(at: index)

150|897a90|        // Normalize ratios

152|a5f33f|        if total > 0 {
153|e10388|            splitRatios = splitRatios.map { $0 / total }
154|b31999|        } else {
155|9fbae1|            splitRatios = Array(repeating: 1.0 / CGFloat(panes.count), count: panes.count)
156|5f3077|        }
157|d6ed84|        
158|29a74a|        // Update active pane
159|d0cbf9|        if activePaneId == id {
160|b3b67b|            activePaneId = panes.first?.id
161|5f3077|        }
162|27e597|    }

183|d6ed84|

185|d6ed84|        
186|2638fc|        let newTab = Tab(
187|80b3d9|            fileName: tab.fileName,
188|cbae7e|            content: tab.content,

202|b4687f|    
203|fc4e2f|    func updateRatio(at index: Int, delta: CGFloat, totalSize: CGFloat) {
204|aa52a4|        guard index < splitRatios.count - 1 else { return }
205|d6ed84|        
206|f7ce87|        let deltaRatio = delta / totalSize
207|019df3|        let minRatio: CGFloat = 0.15
208|d6ed84|        
209|3f9e36|        let newRatio1 = splitRatios[index] + deltaRatio
210|d4621b|        let newRatio2 = splitRatios[index + 1] - deltaRatio
211|d6ed84|        
212|289da5|        if newRatio1 >= minRatio && newRatio2 >= minRatio {
213|6df122|            splitRatios[index] = newRatio1
214|7b2474|            splitRatios[index + 1] = newRatio2
215|5f3077|        }
216|27e597|    }
217|b4687f|    
218|46ecde|    // Sync scroll across panes
219|2a64eb|    func syncScrollOffset(_ offset: CGFloat, fromPaneId: UUID) {
220|3ed88e|        guard syncScroll else { return }
221|b4a90e|        for pane in panes where pane.id != fromPaneId {
222|74eec9|            pane.scrollOffset = offset

230|40e747|    @ObservedObject var splitManager: SplitEditorManager

232|b4687f|    
233|504e43|    var body: some View {
234|09743e|        GeometryReader { geometry in
235|412812|            if splitManager.panes.count == 1 {
236|d46070|                // Single pane - no split
237|d8d1de|                if let pane = splitManager.panes.first {
238|24bea0|                    SinglePaneView(pane: pane, splitManager: splitManager, editorCore: editorCore)
239|4e2d32|                }
240|f5a6eb|            } else {
241|355a3b|                // Multiple panes with split
242|7f3586|                splitContent(geometry: geometry)
243|a7dc16|            }
244|5f3077|        }
245|27e597|    }
246|b4687f|    
247|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
248|850970|    private func splitContent(geometry: GeometryProxy) -> some View {
249|259571|        let totalSize = splitManager.splitDirection == .horizontal ? geometry.size.width : geometry.size.height
250|d6ed84|        
251|ffba2f|        if splitManager.splitDirection == .horizontal {
252|3b7550|            HStack(spacing: 0) {
253|a708a2|                ForEach(Array(splitManager.panes.enumerated()), id: \.element.id) { index, pane in
254|24bea0|                    SinglePaneView(pane: pane, splitManager: splitManager, editorCore: editorCore)
255|fc6e52|                        .frame(width: totalSize * splitManager.splitRatios[index])
256|dd2193|                    
257|497368|                    if index < splitManager.panes.count - 1 {
258|1c47d6|                        SplitDragHandle(direction: .horizontal) { delta in
259|27a7db|                            splitManager.updateRatio(at: index, delta: delta, totalSize: totalSize)
260|392b35|                        }
261|c9717a|                    }
262|4e2d32|                }
263|a7dc16|            }
264|b31999|        } else {
265|92175e|            VStack(spacing: 0) {
266|a708a2|                ForEach(Array(splitManager.panes.enumerated()), id: \.element.id) { index, pane in
267|24bea0|                    SinglePaneView(pane: pane, splitManager: splitManager, editorCore: editorCore)
268|0805c1|                        .frame(height: totalSize * splitManager.splitRatios[index])
269|dd2193|                    
270|497368|                    if index < splitManager.panes.count - 1 {
271|61382d|                        SplitDragHandle(direction: .vertical) { delta in
272|27a7db|                            splitManager.updateRatio(at: index, delta: delta, totalSize: totalSize)
273|392b35|                        }
274|c9717a|                    }
275|4e2d32|                }
276|a7dc16|            }
277|5f3077|        }
278|27e597|    }
279|b31277|}
280|adc83b|
281|93db7d|// MARK: - Single Pane View

283|ca2839|struct SinglePaneView: View {
284|ed36f0|    @ObservedObject var pane: EditorPane

287|069f66|    @State private var dragOverPane = false
288|b4687f|

291|27e597|    }
292|b4687f|    
293|504e43|    var body: some View {
294|94dd27|        VStack(spacing: 0) {

308|a7dc16|            }
309|5f3077|        }
310|8c1a52|        .background(isActive ? Color(UIColor.systemBackground) : Color(UIColor.secondarySystemBackground).opacity(0.3))
311|d38294|        .overlay(
312|d52622|            RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 0)
313|225f3b|                .stroke(isActive ? Color.accentColor : Color.clear, lineWidth: 2)
314|3143a4|        )
315|d38294|        .overlay(
316|906091|            // Drop zone indicator
317|763642|            Group {
318|d4901a|                if dragOverPane {
319|8ef1be|                    RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 4)
320|7d6dc0|                        .fill(Color.accentColor.opacity(0.2))
321|add301|                        .overlay(
322|fee0d9|                            RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 4)
323|701074|                                .stroke(Color.accentColor, style: StrokeStyle(lineWidth: 2, dash: [5]))
324|63214b|                        )
325|4e2d32|                }
326|a7dc16|            }
327|3143a4|        )
328|cf12c6|        .onTapGesture {
329|9dd1a3|            splitManager.activePaneId = pane.id
330|5f3077|        }
331|942311|        .onDrop(of: [.text], isTargeted: $dragOverPane) { providers in
332|2a4c53|            // Handle tab drop
333|40cfc4|            return true
334|5f3077|        }
335|27e597|    }
336|b4687f|

338|250bf4|        HStack(spacing: 0) {

342|3eeda0|                    ForEach(pane.tabs) { tab in

374|4e2d32|                }
375|216278|

387|5f3077|        }
388|9df8d7|        .frame(height: 36)
389|185ec4|        .background(Color(UIColor.secondarySystemBackground))
390|27e597|    }

419|a7c8a1|struct PaneTabItem: View {
420|4dc199|    let tab: Tab
421|055123|    let isSelected: Bool
422|ed36f0|    @ObservedObject var pane: EditorPane
423|40e747|    @ObservedObject var splitManager: SplitEditorManager
424|9d7b13|    @State private var isDragging = false
425|b4687f|    
426|504e43|    var body: some View {
427|e1c66d|        HStack(spacing: 6) {
428|21ea3e|            Image(systemName: tab.language.iconName)

430|16775e|                .foregroundColor(tab.language.color)
431|3070d1|            
432|55fcb3|            Text(tab.fileName)
433|ee466d|                .font(.system(size: 12))
434|2b4299|                .lineLimit(1)
435|3070d1|            
436|b6aa97|            if tab.isUnsaved {
437|134f0e|                Circle()

439|6a9720|                    .frame(width: 6, height: 6)
440|a7dc16|            }
441|3070d1|            
442|cf69b3|            Button(action: { pane.closeTab(id: tab.id) }) {
443|f97da2|                Image(systemName: "xmark")

445|72464b|                    .foregroundColor(.secondary)
446|a7dc16|            }
447|5f3077|        }
448|8469b6|        .padding(.horizontal, 12)
449|d332d1|        .padding(.vertical, 6)
450|413d6d|        .background(
451|8dd164|            RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 4)
452|c4bcbd|                .fill(isSelected ? Color(UIColor.systemBackground) : Color.clear)
453|3143a4|        )
454|2503bb|        .opacity(isDragging ? 0.5 : 1.0)
455|cf12c6|        .onTapGesture {
456|0b7038|            pane.selectTab(id: tab.id)
457|9dd1a3|            splitManager.activePaneId = pane.id
458|5f3077|        }
459|1367a7|        .onDrag {

462|5f3077|        }
463|3c5038|        .contextMenu {
464|cf69b3|            Button(action: { pane.closeTab(id: tab.id) }) {
465|2cec90|                Label("Close", systemImage: "xmark")
466|a7dc16|            }
467|3070d1|            
468|e744dc|            Divider()
469|3070d1|            
470|b6d750|            Button(action: { splitManager.moveTabToNewSplit(tab: tab, fromPaneId: pane.id, direction: .horizontal) }) {
471|b2f857|                Label("Move to Split Right", systemImage: "rectangle.split.2x1")
472|a7dc16|            }
473|3070d1|            
474|dff3e6|            Button(action: { splitManager.moveTabToNewSplit(tab: tab, fromPaneId: pane.id, direction: .vertical) }) {
475|3c7146|                Label("Move to Split Down", systemImage: "rectangle.split.1x2")
476|a7dc16|            }
477|5f3077|        }
478|27e597|    }

481|febcd8|// MARK: - Pane Editor View
482|adc83b|
483|081d2d|struct PaneEditorView: View {
484|ed36f0|    @ObservedObject var pane: EditorPane
485|4dc199|    let tab: Tab
486|40e747|    @ObservedObject var splitManager: SplitEditorManager
487|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
488|c97289|    @ObservedObject private var debugManager = DebugManager.shared
489|a9aa54|    @ObservedObject private var foldingManager = CodeFoldingManager.shared
490|eba335|    @State private var text: String = ""
491|4f0ac8|    @State private var scrollPosition: Int = 0
492|36da68|    @State private var scrollOffset: CGFloat = 0
493|d473fd|    @State private var totalLines: Int = 1
494|bcf90b|    @State private var visibleLines: Int = 20
495|9cb5e9|    @State private var currentLineNumber: Int = 1
496|cc347a|    @State private var currentColumn: Int = 1
497|eee196|    @State private var cursorIndex: Int = 0
498|2c43f6|    @State private var lineHeight: CGFloat = 17
499|5c2aeb|    @State private var requestedLineSelection: Int? = nil
500|446eb9|    @State private var requestedCursorIndex: Int? = nil
501|b4687f|    
502|952908|    private var useRunestoneEditor: Bool { FeatureFlags.useRunestoneEditor }
503|adc83b|
504|834dc8|    @AppStorage("lineNumbersStyle") private var lineNumbersStyle: String = "on"
505|b4687f|    
506|5df2db|    private var fileId: String { tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName }
507|b4687f|    
508|504e43|    var body: some View {
509|09743e|        GeometryReader { geometry in
510|3b7550|            HStack(spacing: 0) {
511|57cbc9|                // Line numbers + breakpoints + code folding (gutter)
512|1c3407|                //
513|ed4951|                // IMPORTANT: keep gutter in sync with the editor scroll position. The gutter ScrollView
514|ea8c59|                // is scroll-disabled, and we offset the content to match the editor's scroll.
515|819e1d|                if lineNumbersStyle != "off" {
516|934553|                    ScrollView(showsIndicators: false) {
517|a1a512|                        VStack(alignment: .trailing, spacing: 0) {
518|287ca6|                            // Match UITextView.textContainerInset.top (see SyntaxHighlightingTextView.swift)
519|8aef08|                            ForEach(0..<totalLines, id: \ .self) { lineIndex in
520|3ebc2f|                                HStack(spacing: 2) {
521|336ad1|                                    // Fold chevron icon
522|11d51b|                                    if foldingManager.isFoldable(fileId: fileId, line: lineIndex) {
523|91d8b4|                                        Button(action: { 
524|5e28ca|                                            foldingManager.toggleFold(fileId: fileId, line: lineIndex)
525|834ec4|                                        }) {
526|011694|                                            Image(systemName: foldingManager.isFolded(fileId: fileId, line: lineIndex) ? "chevron.right" : "chevron.down")
527|1fb1f1|                                                .font(.system(size: 10, weight: .regular))
528|d94af6|                                                .foregroundColor(.secondary.opacity(0.8))
529|1df8a9|                                                .frame(width: 12, height: lineHeight)
530|eed1d8|                                        }
531|30d0d7|                                        .buttonStyle(.plain)
532|719c18|                                    } else {
533|6d00af|                                        // Spacer for alignment
534|17f4b6|                                        Spacer()
535|2344be|                                            .frame(width: 12)
536|8ab74d|                                    }
537|9539f6|                                    
538|e4afd0|                                    // Breakpoint indicator
539|9132d6|                                    Button(action: { debugManager.toggleBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) }) {
540|6304cf|                                        Circle()
541|605456|                                            .fill(debugManager.hasBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) ? Color.red : Color.clear)
542|5c2d4a|                                            .overlay(
543|77f785|                                                Circle()
544|ef0c8f|                                                    .stroke(Color.red.opacity(0.6), lineWidth: 1)
545|bfe428|                                                    .opacity(debugManager.hasBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) ? 0 : 0.25)
546|8fe569|                                            )
547|d350e9|                                            .frame(width: 10, height: 10)
548|8ab74d|                                    }
549|475b6d|                                    .buttonStyle(.plain)
550|c99ef6|                                    .frame(width: 14, height: lineHeight)
551|adc83b|
552|8f7419|                                    Text(displayText(for: lineIndex))
553|8fdcdb|                                        .font(.system(size: 12, design: .monospaced))
554|efb0dd|                                        .foregroundColor(lineIndex + 1 == currentLineNumber ? .primary : .secondary.opacity(0.6))
555|eb881d|                                        .frame(height: lineHeight)
556|bc9c7a|                                        .contentShape(Rectangle())
557|f348f3|                                        .onTapGesture {
558|473b13|                                            requestedLineSelection = lineIndex
559|eed1d8|                                        }
560|f83e05|                                }
561|695c29|                                .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, alignment: .trailing)
562|89d40a|                            }
563|392b35|                        }
564|539a79|                        .padding(.trailing, 4)
565|88bfb0|                        .padding(.top, 8)
566|ad281a|                        .offset(y: -scrollOffset)
567|c9717a|                    }
568|9f14cd|                    .scrollDisabled(true)
569|06d27a|                    .frame(width: 70)
570|0f5931|                    .background(Color(UIColor.secondarySystemBackground).opacity(0.5))
571|4e2d32|                }
572|adc83b|
573|266a6a|                // Editor
574|a70ea9|                SyntaxHighlightingTextView(
575|53ec0e|                    text: $text,
576|efee53|                    filename: tab.fileName,
577|5182bc|                    scrollPosition: $scrollPosition,
578|fec2be|                    scrollOffset: $scrollOffset,
579|1b9482|                    totalLines: $totalLines,
580|7a86c9|                    visibleLines: $visibleLines,
581|672538|                    currentLineNumber: $currentLineNumber,
582|fca1f6|                    currentColumn: $currentColumn,
583|caf1e7|                    lineHeight: $lineHeight,
584|290fcf|                    isActive: splitManager.activePaneId == pane.id,
585|5eff51|                    editorCore: editorCore,
586|85e738|                    requestedLineSelection: $requestedLineSelection
587|6f642e|                )
588|717522|                .onChange(of: text) { newValue in
589|ef5cad|                    pane.updateTabContent(newValue)
590|4e2d32|                }
591|f86b95|                .onChange(of: scrollOffset) { newOffset in
592|9b57fb|                    // Track latest scroll offset for this pane, and sync if enabled.
593|f6218e|                    if abs(pane.scrollOffset - newOffset) > 0.5 {
594|edf28f|                        pane.scrollOffset = newOffset
595|c9717a|                    }
596|54e939|                    if splitManager.syncScroll {
597|7b6383|                        splitManager.syncScrollOffset(newOffset, fromPaneId: pane.id)
598|c9717a|                    }
599|4e2d32|                }
600|216278|                
601|7ed984|                // Mini minimap
602|33afde|                MinimapView(
603|c6f098|                    content: text,
604|63c90b|                    scrollOffset: scrollOffset,
605|55164f|                    scrollViewHeight: geometry.size.height,
606|294a32|                    totalContentHeight: CGFloat(totalLines) * lineHeight,
607|882946|                    onScrollRequested: { newOffset in
608|2c2c75|                        scrollOffset = newOffset
609|757ff1|                        scrollPosition = Int(newOffset / max(lineHeight, 1))
610|c9717a|                    }
611|6f642e|                )
612|3c4582|                .frame(width: 60)
613|a7dc16|            }
614|6589b5|            // Sticky Header Overlay (FEAT-040)
615|7a45a9|            StickyHeaderView(
616|948d7a|                text: text,
617|54ab92|                currentLine: scrollPosition, // Using scrollPosition as approximate top line
618|1a8c40|                theme: ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme,
619|95435d|                lineHeight: lineHeight,
620|cd7b67|                onSelect: { line in
621|77691c|                    requestedLineSelection = line
622|4e2d32|                }
623|43d041|            )
624|1c065c|            .padding(.leading, 70) // Offset for line numbers + folding icons
625|0e402e|            .padding(.trailing, 60) // Offset for minimap
626|3070d1|            
627|89a89f|            // Inlay Hints Overlay (type hints, parameter names)
628|661a9c|            InlayHintsOverlay(
629|a9b5c1|                code: text,
630|dc1d64|                language: tab.language,
631|a4876e|                scrollPosition: scrollPosition,
632|95435d|                lineHeight: lineHeight,
633|65b04d|                fontSize: 14,
634|638f59|                gutterWidth: lineNumbersStyle != "off" ? 70 : 0,
635|5f899d|                rightReservedWidth: 60
636|43d041|            )
637|0a7127|            .padding(.leading, lineNumbersStyle != "off" ? 70 : 0) // Offset for line numbers
638|0e402e|            .padding(.trailing, 60) // Offset for minimap
639|3070d1|            
640|057f8e|            // Peek Definition Overlay
641|37dff6|            if let peekState = editorCore.peekState, editorCore.activeTabId == tab.id {
642|7c7415|                 // Calculate simplified position: center of screen for now, but conceptually "inline"
643|7db4cc|                 // To make it truly inline, we'd need more complex geometry, but overlay is a good start.
644|3dc160|                 VStack {
645|0b626e|                     Spacer()
646|7c17cb|                         .frame(height: max(0, CGFloat(peekState.sourceLine - scrollPosition) * lineHeight + lineHeight + 20))
647|a25606|                     
648|13d164|                     PeekDefinitionView(
649|8fdf46|                         editorCore: editorCore,
650|35a17d|                         targetFile: peekState.file,
651|c7a844|                         targetLine: peekState.line,
652|0368a9|                         content: peekState.content,
653|b11dbc|                         onClose: { editorCore.closePeekDefinition() },
654|b70a3a|                         onOpen: {
655|6e77ad|                             editorCore.openFile(FileItem(name: URL(fileURLWithPath: peekState.file).lastPathComponent, path: peekState.file, isDirectory: false))
656|98bb10|                             editorCore.closePeekDefinition()
657|f77f7f|                         }
658|5fd7ac|                     )
659|cfa44f|                     .padding(.horizontal)
660|e7cf39|                     .padding(.bottom, 20)
661|a25606|                     
662|0b626e|                     Spacer()
663|f9188b|                 }
664|dc076a|                 .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, maxHeight: .infinity, alignment: .top)
665|8a5992|                 .background(Color.black.opacity(0.01)) // Capture taps outside if needed, or let them pass
666|2bb99b|                 .transition(.opacity)
667|e734a5|                 .zIndex(100)
668|a7dc16|            }
669|5f3077|        }
670|2bd24e|        .onAppear {
671|ba85f8|            text = tab.content
672|1739f9|            // Detect foldable regions for this file
673|806ab8|            foldingManager.detectFoldableRegions(in: text, filePath: fileId)
674|5f3077|        }
675|9d97c0|        .onChange(of: tab.id) { _ in
676|ba85f8|            text = tab.content
677|679c8b|            // Re-detect foldable regions for new file
678|806ab8|            foldingManager.detectFoldableRegions(in: text, filePath: fileId)
679|5f3077|        }
680|020a1e|        .onChange(of: pane.scrollOffset) { newOffset in
681|557e0a|            guard splitManager.syncScroll else { return }
682|d7142b|            // Avoid feedback loop when we're the source pane.
683|158d19|            if abs(scrollOffset - newOffset) > 0.5 {
684|d0a8f9|                scrollOffset = newOffset
685|4643ad|                if !useRunestoneEditor {
686|195125|                    scrollPosition = Int(newOffset / max(lineHeight, 1))
687|4e2d32|                }
688|a7dc16|            }
689|5f3077|        }
690|27e597|    }
691|b4687f|    
692|46d3db|    private func displayText(for lineIndex: Int) -> String {
693|5d97cf|        switch lineNumbersStyle {
694|a6eb36|        case "relative":
695|b0622f|            let lineNumber = lineIndex + 1
696|2073fa|            if lineNumber == currentLineNumber { return "\(lineNumber)" }
697|225c80|            return "\(abs(lineNumber - currentLineNumber))"
698|5040ac|        case "interval":
699|b0622f|            let lineNumber = lineIndex + 1
700|bc3fe3|            return (lineNumber == 1 || lineNumber % 5 == 0) ? "\(lineNumber)" : ""
701|520b7d|        default:
702|3880c0|            return "\(lineIndex + 1)"
703|5f3077|        }
704|27e597|    }

4|d19d66|// MARK: - FEAT-071 Git gutter indicators + FEAT-072 Inline blame
5|8d0643|//
6|d9d6da|// This file is self-contained and provides:
7|5c82fc|// - FEAT-071: Git gutter indicators (added/modified/deleted)
8|5a5f9f|// - FEAT-072: Inline blame label (for selected/caret line)
9|8d0643|//
10|187b03|// IMPORTANT (integration):
11|6ff48a|// - Host editor must overlay/place this view aligned to the text content.
12|03bdbc|// - Host editor should provide:
13|906922|//   - fileURL
14|54881c|//   - visibleLineRange (1-based, end-exclusive)
15|3f09c4|//   - lineHeight
16|4e21cb|//   - contentTopInset
17|4ce592|//   - selectedLine (1-based)
18|63c04e|//   - refreshToken (bump to refresh when content/git state changes)
19|e24eed|// - If your app already has git diff/blame services, inject them via `dataSource`.
20|adc83b|
21|8a33e7|// MARK: Models
22|adc83b|
23|b63454|public enum GitLineChangeKind: Hashable, Sendable {
24|56fc3b|    case added
25|734ea7|    case modified
26|19baf3|    /// Represents a deletion marker at a line boundary (typically drawn between lines).
27|f7e3d2|    case deleted
28|b31277|}
29|adc83b|
30|5c360d|public struct GitLineChange: Hashable, Sendable {
31|ab61d6|    public var line: Int // 1-based (new-file line number)
32|e3d70d|    public var kind: GitLineChangeKind
33|adc83b|
34|b6cdf4|    public init(line: Int, kind: GitLineChangeKind) {
35|84c49f|        self.line = line
36|6c8f03|        self.kind = kind

38|b31277|}
39|adc83b|
40|9856a5|public struct GitBlameLine: Hashable, Sendable {

48|84c49f|        self.line = line

51|8d6365|        self.authorTime = authorTime
52|f540f2|        self.summary = summary

56|a25c5b|// MARK: - Data source (injectable)
57|adc83b|
58|131fba|public struct GitGutterDataSource {
59|eda2b2|    public var diff: @Sendable (_ fileURL: URL, _ forceRefresh: Bool) async throws -> [GitLineChange]
60|2b7ec9|    public var blame: @Sendable (_ fileURL: URL, _ forceRefresh: Bool) async throws -> [GitBlameLine]
61|adc83b|
62|fb99ae|    public init(
63|7eae64|        diff: @escaping @Sendable (_ fileURL: URL, _ forceRefresh: Bool) async throws -> [GitLineChange],
64|b3f9fa|        blame: @escaping @Sendable (_ fileURL: URL, _ forceRefresh: Bool) async throws -> [GitBlameLine]
65|981e04|    ) {

67|5e7a05|        self.blame = blame
68|27e597|    }
69|b31277|}
70|adc83b|
71|71968a|public extension GitGutterDataSource {
72|477137|    /// Default behavior:
73|218ea2|    /// - On macOS/Mac Catalyst/Linux: attempts to run `git diff` and `git blame` via `Process`.
74|88eb69|    /// - On iOS (non-Catalyst): returns empty results (host should inject a real dataSource).
75|0f792b|    static var `default`: GitGutterDataSource {
76|e8a50e|        #if os(iOS) && !targetEnvironment(macCatalyst)
77|4dd5b2|        return .empty
78|f6012e|        #else
79|e4eef8|        return .gitCLI
80|6a3e13|        #endif
81|27e597|    }
82|adc83b|
83|29af90|    static var empty: GitGutterDataSource {
84|5918f7|        GitGutterDataSource(
85|f55c00|            diff: { _, _ in [] },
86|9b364b|            blame: { _, _ in [] }
87|3143a4|        )
88|27e597|    }
89|adc83b|
90|f7ab3b|    /// Git CLI-backed data source (uses `git diff` / `git blame`).
91|d0e228|    static var gitCLI: GitGutterDataSource {
92|5918f7|        GitGutterDataSource(
93|4674b9|            diff: { fileURL, force in
94|e92a25|                if force { await GitDiffService.shared.invalidate(forFile: fileURL) }
95|f18eaa|                return try await GitDiffService.shared.lineChanges(forFile: fileURL)
96|12b7cc|            },
97|b5596a|            blame: { fileURL, force in
98|ca35f8|                if force { await GitBlameService.shared.invalidate(forFile: fileURL) }
99|2e707d|                return try await GitBlameService.shared.blame(forFile: fileURL)
100|a7dc16|            }
101|3143a4|        )
102|27e597|    }
103|b31277|}
