105|a37a43|// MARK: - View
106|adc83b|
107|6629b3|/// Gutter view that renders git diff indicators (added/modified/deleted) and an optional inline blame label.
108|fded1b|public struct GitGutterView: View {
109|78c95b|    public struct Configuration {
110|ae1e02|        public var showsDiffIndicators: Bool = true
111|88e1e6|        public var showsInlineBlame: Bool = true
112|adc83b|
113|faf43b|        public var gutterWidth: CGFloat = 6
114|ba10e0|        public var gutterCornerRadius: CGFloat = 1
115|adc83b|
116|d61590|        public var inlineBlameLeadingPadding: CGFloat = 8
117|39da2e|        public var inlineBlameTrailingPadding: CGFloat = 8
118|d30106|        public var inlineBlameFont: Font = .system(size: 11, weight: .regular, design: .monospaced)
119|27253d|        public var inlineBlameMaxWidth: CGFloat = 420
120|adc83b|
121|e8e497|        public var addedColor: Color = Color(red: 0.20, green: 0.78, blue: 0.35)
122|1ac746|        public var modifiedColor: Color = Color(red: 0.20, green: 0.55, blue: 0.95)
123|83c951|        public var deletedColor: Color = Color(red: 0.92, green: 0.30, blue: 0.24)
124|adc83b|
125|15a2a2|        public var inlineBlameTextColor: Color = .secondary
126|6c3af8|        public var inlineBlameBackground: Color = Color.secondary.opacity(0.10)
127|7dbd42|        public var inlineBlameCornerRadius: CGFloat = 6
128|adc83b|
129|d54ec5|        public init() {}
130|27e597|    }
131|adc83b|
132|613a45|    private let fileURL: URL
133|c9e6e3|    private let visibleLineRange: Range<Int> // 1-based, end-exclusive
134|ddca28|    private let lineHeight: CGFloat
135|3dd8e2|    private let contentTopInset: CGFloat
136|9a64ff|    private let selectedLine: Int?
137|948a6c|    private let refreshToken: AnyHashable
138|ee5e97|    private let configuration: Configuration
139|354ea7|    private let dataSource: GitGutterDataSource
140|adc83b|
141|57945d|    @State private var changesByLine: [Int: GitLineChangeKind] = [:]
142|31542a|    @State private var deletedMarkers: Set<Int> = []
143|a9cbbb|    @State private var blameByLine: [Int: GitBlameLine] = [:]
144|adc83b|
145|fb99ae|    public init(
146|26bd01|        fileURL: URL,
147|eeb341|        visibleLineRange: Range<Int>,
148|24de46|        lineHeight: CGFloat,
149|aec09a|        contentTopInset: CGFloat = 0,
150|c0fe43|        selectedLine: Int? = nil,
151|c45746|        refreshToken: AnyHashable = 0,
152|adff75|        configuration: Configuration = .init(),
153|8e0c81|        dataSource: GitGutterDataSource = .default
154|981e04|    ) {
155|9bc9c2|        self.fileURL = fileURL
156|125068|        self.visibleLineRange = visibleLineRange
157|08bb85|        self.lineHeight = lineHeight
158|b7358f|        self.contentTopInset = contentTopInset
159|5f7310|        self.selectedLine = selectedLine
160|8b5203|        self.refreshToken = refreshToken
161|e62f56|        self.configuration = configuration
162|471eca|        self.dataSource = dataSource
163|27e597|    }
164|adc83b|
165|a2c94e|    public var body: some View {
166|250bf4|        HStack(spacing: 0) {
167|7e68b3|            if configuration.showsDiffIndicators {
168|d4e5d8|                diffGutter
169|09ce20|                    .frame(width: configuration.gutterWidth)
170|a7dc16|            }
171|adc83b|
172|3c96c0|            if configuration.showsInlineBlame {
173|316edd|                inlineBlameColumn
174|a7dc16|            }
175|5f3077|        }
176|622408|        // Reload when:
177|453b6c|        // - file changes
178|1cd8ae|        // - refreshToken changes (host signals content/git refresh)
179|661d58|        .task(id: fileURL) {
180|a01b72|            await reloadAll(force: true)
181|5f3077|        }
182|898172|        .task(id: refreshToken) {
183|a01b72|            await reloadAll(force: true)
184|5f3077|        }
185|27e597|    }
186|adc83b|
187|3b223e|    private var diffGutter: some View {
188|8eb6a2|        GeometryReader { _ in
189|f47dba|            Canvas { context, size in
190|f2e3c7|                guard !visibleLineRange.isEmpty else { return }
191|adc83b|
192|1d1279|                let w = size.width
193|6cfee9|                let corner = configuration.gutterCornerRadius
194|adc83b|
195|c4be89|                for line in visibleLineRange {
196|1a6571|                    if let kind = changesByLine[line] {
197|7acfe4|                        let y = contentTopInset + CGFloat(line - visibleLineRange.lowerBound) * lineHeight
198|398690|                        let rect = CGRect(x: 0, y: y, width: w, height: max(1, lineHeight))
199|3e9bba|                        let path = Path(roundedRect: rect, cornerRadius: corner)
200|d14140|                        context.fill(path, with: .color(color(for: kind)))
201|c9717a|                    }
202|adc83b|
203|d80c45|                    // Deleted markers are drawn as triangles at the boundary.
204|d77c52|                    if deletedMarkers.contains(line) {
205|7acfe4|                        let y = contentTopInset + CGFloat(line - visibleLineRange.lowerBound) * lineHeight
206|f6ef50|                        var p = Path()
207|9c8d93|                        p.move(to: CGPoint(x: 0, y: y))
208|6c103f|                        p.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: w, y: y + (lineHeight * 0.5)))
209|4b3b60|                        p.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: 0, y: y + lineHeight))
210|eef458|                        p.closeSubpath()
211|c248e0|                        context.fill(p, with: .color(configuration.deletedColor))
212|c9717a|                    }
213|4e2d32|                }
214|a7dc16|            }
215|5f3077|        }
216|160ee5|        .accessibilityLabel("Git diff gutter")
217|27e597|    }
218|adc83b|
219|674c96|    private var inlineBlameColumn: some View {
220|6cfec8|        ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
221|1bb412|            if let selectedLine,
222|42e193|               let blame = blameByLine[selectedLine],
223|c9b8d8|               visibleLineRange.contains(selectedLine) {
224|3b4316|                let y = contentTopInset + CGFloat(selectedLine - visibleLineRange.lowerBound) * lineHeight
225|adc83b|
226|c9d472|                inlineBlameLabel(for: blame)
227|dcef2f|                    .frame(maxWidth: configuration.inlineBlameMaxWidth, alignment: .leading)
228|6cd76a|                    .offset(x: configuration.inlineBlameLeadingPadding, y: y)
229|9459d4|                    .allowsHitTesting(false)
230|a7dc16|            }
231|5f3077|        }
232|4b367a|        .padding(.trailing, configuration.inlineBlameTrailingPadding)
233|cb4047|        .accessibilityLabel("Inline git blame")
234|27e597|    }
235|adc83b|
236|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
237|df7a5a|    private func inlineBlameLabel(for blame: GitBlameLine) -> some View {
238|c585c3|        let commitShort = String(blame.commit.prefix(8))
239|932efb|        let author = blame.author.isEmpty ? "Unknown" : blame.author
240|0dcb9b|        let summary = blame.summary
241|adc83b|
242|6cccbe|        Text("\(author) \(commitShort) — \(summary)")
243|d9ac71|            .font(configuration.inlineBlameFont)
244|2101a6|            .foregroundStyle(configuration.inlineBlameTextColor)
245|96ccb2|            .lineLimit(1)
246|e3b182|            .truncationMode(.tail)
247|ac06c9|            .padding(.horizontal, 8)
248|bc0fb8|            .padding(.vertical, 4)
249|93d9bd|            .background(configuration.inlineBlameBackground)
250|de21c1|            .clipShape(RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: configuration.inlineBlameCornerRadius, style: .continuous))
251|27e597|    }
252|adc83b|
253|2eb426|    private func color(for kind: GitLineChangeKind) -> Color {
254|01fe0f|        switch kind {
255|8680a4|        case .added: return configuration.addedColor
256|d8c6ba|        case .modified: return configuration.modifiedColor
257|dd8fc2|        case .deleted: return configuration.deletedColor
258|5f3077|        }
259|27e597|    }
260|adc83b|
261|1950d9|    // MARK: Reload
262|adc83b|
263|0fd45c|    @MainActor
264|fb91cc|    private func reloadAll(force: Bool) async {
265|6deaac|        // Diff
266|40a056|        if configuration.showsDiffIndicators {
267|71cc09|            do {
268|fca72e|                let diff = try await dataSource.diff(fileURL, force)
269|6e72ba|                var byLine: [Int: GitLineChangeKind] = [:]
270|9310cd|                var deletions: Set<Int> = []
271|adc83b|
272|fa601b|                for c in diff {
273|c2ffec|                    switch c.kind {
274|824c69|                    case .deleted:
275|590b9b|                        deletions.insert(max(1, c.line))
276|7f90ef|                    case .added, .modified:
277|7a4f96|                        byLine[c.line] = c.kind
278|c9717a|                    }
279|4e2d32|                }
280|adc83b|
281|d5e452|                self.changesByLine = byLine
282|e772d6|                self.deletedMarkers = deletions
283|91b9a2|            } catch {
284|f656f2|                self.changesByLine = [:]
285|cf3009|                self.deletedMarkers = []
286|a7dc16|            }
287|5f3077|        }
288|adc83b|
289|a72dc6|        // Blame
290|a8ee41|        if configuration.showsInlineBlame {
291|71cc09|            do {
292|1fac4c|                let blame = try await dataSource.blame(fileURL, force)
293|ba24de|                self.blameByLine = Dictionary(uniqueKeysWithValues: blame.map { ($0.line, $0) })
294|91b9a2|            } catch {
295|262f69|                self.blameByLine = [:]
296|a7dc16|            }
297|5f3077|        }
298|27e597|    }
299|b31277|}
300|adc83b|
301|ca292c|// MARK: - Minimal Git wrappers (CLI-backed)
302|adc83b|
303|3fdc54|private enum GitError: Error, LocalizedError {
304|ad379b|    case notARepository
305|cc3a27|    case commandFailed(String)
306|adc83b|
307|242b78|    var errorDescription: String? {
308|2e6d08|        switch self {
309|d6bd44|        case .notARepository:
310|c737e7|            return "Not a git repository"
311|84e7f9|        case .commandFailed(let msg):
312|97e6c2|            return "Git command failed: \(msg)"
313|5f3077|        }
314|27e597|    }
315|b31277|}
316|adc83b|
317|e83eda|private struct GitShell {
318|36bf91|    static func runGit(args: [String], in workingDirectory: URL) async throws -> String {
319|fb15d6|        #if os(macOS) || targetEnvironment(macCatalyst) || os(Linux)
320|c9b222|        return try await withCheckedThrowingContinuation { cont in
321|13023b|            let process = Process()
322|9dce62|            process.executableURL = URL(fileURLWithPath: "/usr/bin/env")
323|6980d1|            process.arguments = ["git"] + args
324|349037|            process.currentDirectoryURL = workingDirectory
325|adc83b|
326|440eab|            let outPipe = Pipe()
327|7e6031|            let errPipe = Pipe()
328|a6bd70|            process.standardOutput = outPipe
329|203afe|            process.standardError = errPipe
330|adc83b|
331|71cc09|            do {
332|eee8fb|                try process.run()
333|91b9a2|            } catch {
334|1d8745|                cont.resume(throwing: GitError.commandFailed("Unable to launch git"))
335|53ab34|                return
336|a7dc16|            }
337|adc83b|
338|2d3dad|            process.terminationHandler = { p in
339|ac2e77|                let outData = outPipe.fileHandleForReading.readDataToEndOfFile()
340|b22e9b|                let errData = errPipe.fileHandleForReading.readDataToEndOfFile()
341|adc83b|
342|b7139c|                let out = String(data: outData, encoding: .utf8) ?? ""
343|3079dc|                let err = String(data: errData, encoding: .utf8) ?? ""
344|adc83b|
345|4e1e82|                if p.terminationStatus == 0 {
346|a411dd|                    cont.resume(returning: out)
347|fdd0e2|                } else {
348|1759a5|                    let msg = err.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
349|4befeb|                    cont.resume(throwing: GitError.commandFailed(msg.isEmpty ? out : msg))
350|4e2d32|                }
351|a7dc16|            }
352|5f3077|        }
353|f6012e|        #else
354|459a57|        throw GitError.commandFailed("Git execution is not available on this platform")
355|6a3e13|        #endif
356|27e597|    }
357|adc83b|
358|ce4ef6|    static func repoRoot(containing fileURL: URL) async throws -> URL {
359|912523|        let dir = fileURL.deletingLastPathComponent()
360|1a9799|        let out = try await runGit(args: ["-C", dir.path, "rev-parse", "--show-toplevel"], in: dir)
361|fe3a8f|        let rootPath = out.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
362|58de76|        if rootPath.isEmpty { throw GitError.notARepository }
363|564829|        return URL(fileURLWithPath: rootPath)
364|27e597|    }
365|b31277|}
366|adc83b|
367|88bc2f|// MARK: - Diff
368|adc83b|
369|3ed794|private actor GitDiffService {
370|e143c5|    static let shared = GitDiffService()
371|adc83b|
372|d55783|    private var cache: [String: [GitLineChange]] = [:] // key: repoRoot + fileRelPath
373|adc83b|
374|348ef2|    func invalidate(forFile fileURL: URL) async {
375|4da690|        do {
376|a7d18f|            let repoRoot = try await GitShell.repoRoot(containing: fileURL)
377|c274c2|            let relPath = Self.relativePath(fileURL, repoRoot)
378|37ccff|            let key = repoRoot.path + "::" + relPath
379|5c07e2|            cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
380|853889|        } catch {
381|0ef52b|            // ignore
382|5f3077|        }
383|27e597|    }
384|adc83b|
385|5ad013|    func lineChanges(forFile fileURL: URL) async throws -> [GitLineChange] {
386|84184f|        let repoRoot = try await GitShell.repoRoot(containing: fileURL)
387|7cb904|        let relPath = Self.relativePath(fileURL, repoRoot)
388|471cce|        let key = repoRoot.path + "::" + relPath
389|adc83b|
390|04a632|        if let cached = cache[key] { return cached }
391|adc83b|
392|18475b|        // Unified=0 makes hunks contain only the changed lines, simplifying mapping.
393|471a19|        let diff = try await GitShell.runGit(
394|0211d7|            args: ["-C", repoRoot.path, "diff", "--unified=0", "--no-color", "--", relPath],
395|2f85ba|            in: repoRoot
396|3143a4|        )
397|adc83b|
398|cb6bb6|        let parsed = Self.parseUnifiedZeroDiff(diff)
399|fd7b4b|        cache[key] = parsed
400|4686f7|        return parsed
401|27e597|    }
402|adc83b|
403|7f38bd|    fileprivate static func relativePath(_ fileURL: URL, _ repoRoot: URL) -> String {
404|d34cf8|        let filePath = fileURL.standardizedFileURL.path
405|d236cb|        let rootPath = repoRoot.standardizedFileURL.path
406|87d341|        if filePath.hasPrefix(rootPath + "/") {
407|c8ae11|            return String(filePath.dropFirst(rootPath.count + 1))
408|5f3077|        }
409|231fb2|        return fileURL.lastPathComponent
410|27e597|    }
411|adc83b|
412|4ab2d0|    /// Parse output from: `git diff --unified=0 --no-color -- <file>`.
413|2cbc84|    ///
414|043652|    /// Heuristic classification per hunk:
415|e6cab5|    /// - oldCount==0,newCount>0 -> .added on new range
416|830185|    /// - oldCount>0,newCount>0 -> .modified on new range
417|d827b0|    /// - oldCount>0,newCount==0 -> .deleted marker at newStart
418|e30ee3|    private static func parseUnifiedZeroDiff(_ text: String) -> [GitLineChange] {
419|0c442a|        var results: [GitLineChange] = []
420|adc83b|
421|5283b2|        // Example hunk header (unified=0):
422|61ad0c|        // @@ -12,2 +12,3 @@
423|960d91|        // or @@ -12 +12 @@
424|53c1fb|        for raw in text.split(separator: "\n", omittingEmptySubsequences: false) {
425|338332|            let line = String(raw)
426|566e9f|            guard line.hasPrefix("@@"), let h = parseHunkHeader(line) else { continue }
427|adc83b|
428|ce5131|            if h.oldCount == 0 && h.newCount > 0 {
429|5447be|                for n in 0..<h.newCount {
430|c93a02|                    results.append(.init(line: h.newStart + n, kind: .added))
431|4e2d32|                }
432|688fe3|            } else if h.oldCount > 0 && h.newCount > 0 {
433|5447be|                for n in 0..<h.newCount {
434|9de390|                    results.append(.init(line: h.newStart + n, kind: .modified))
435|4e2d32|                }
436|b8c2f6|            } else if h.oldCount > 0 && h.newCount == 0 {
437|d2860f|                results.append(.init(line: max(1, h.newStart), kind: .deleted))
438|a7dc16|            }
439|5f3077|        }
440|adc83b|
441|877b21|        // De-dupe (prefer modified over added if collision).
442|d9be21|        var byLine: [Int: GitLineChangeKind] = [:]
443|9c02f9|        var deleted: Set<Int> = []
444|6ab11d|        for r in results {
445|b275dd|            switch r.kind {
446|e08d5d|            case .deleted:
447|22dea6|                deleted.insert(r.line)
448|0ad1c2|            case .added:
449|2faf5e|                if byLine[r.line] == nil { byLine[r.line] = .added }
450|909e67|            case .modified:
451|35bde7|                byLine[r.line] = .modified
452|a7dc16|            }
453|5f3077|        }
454|adc83b|
455|cbba29|        var merged: [GitLineChange] = []
456|8455c8|        for (line, kind) in byLine { merged.append(.init(line: line, kind: kind)) }
457|303285|        for d in deleted { merged.append(.init(line: d, kind: .deleted)) }
458|adc83b|
459|2c2d8a|        return merged.sorted { $0.line < $1.line }
460|27e597|    }
461|adc83b|
462|04b6a6|    private struct Hunk {
463|703f57|        var oldStart: Int
464|9021d9|        var oldCount: Int
465|5918d9|        var newStart: Int
466|c74eb3|        var newCount: Int
467|27e597|    }
468|adc83b|
469|c5499e|    private static func parseHunkHeader(_ header: String) -> Hunk? {
470|ba73ec|        // Header format: @@ -oldStart,oldCount +newStart,newCount @@ ...
471|7417bc|        // Counts may be omitted: -12 +12
472|ecf5bf|        guard let rangeStart = header.range(of: "@@") else { return nil }
473|7c0e7f|        guard let rangeEnd = header.range(of: "@@", options: [], range: rangeStart.upperBound..<header.endIndex) else { return nil }
474|8445bb|        let body = header[rangeStart.upperBound..<rangeEnd.lowerBound].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
475|adc83b|
476|d7518c|        let parts = body.split(separator: " ")
477|246d66|        guard parts.count >= 2 else { return nil }
478|adc83b|
479|305ea0|        func parsePart(_ s: Substring, prefix: Character) -> (Int, Int)? {
480|358d18|            guard s.first == prefix else { return nil }
481|f55934|            let rest = s.dropFirst()
482|66d2d2|            if let comma = rest.firstIndex(of: ",") {
483|8b33f9|                let a = rest[..<comma]
484|95dc6a|                let b = rest[rest.index(after: comma)...]
485|17c68e|                guard let start = Int(a), let count = Int(b) else { return nil }
486|08311d|                return (start, count)
487|f5a6eb|            } else {
488|104757|                guard let start = Int(rest) else { return nil }
489|b303d1|                return (start, 1)
490|a7dc16|            }
491|5f3077|        }
492|adc83b|
493|c2352c|        guard let old = parsePart(parts[0], prefix: "-") else { return nil }
494|868552|        guard let new = parsePart(parts[1], prefix: "+") else { return nil }
495|1713af|        return Hunk(oldStart: old.0, oldCount: old.1, newStart: new.0, newCount: new.1)
496|27e597|    }
497|b31277|}
498|adc83b|
499|a7cfe8|// MARK: - Blame
500|adc83b|
501|e87ea1|private actor GitBlameService {
502|0260b4|    static let shared = GitBlameService()
503|adc83b|
504|1e6b1d|    private var cache: [String: [GitBlameLine]] = [:] // key: repoRoot + fileRelPath
505|adc83b|
506|348ef2|    func invalidate(forFile fileURL: URL) async {
507|4da690|        do {
508|a7d18f|            let repoRoot = try await GitShell.repoRoot(containing: fileURL)
509|cefda3|            let relPath = GitDiffService.relativePath(fileURL, repoRoot)
510|37ccff|            let key = repoRoot.path + "::" + relPath
511|5c07e2|            cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
512|853889|        } catch {
513|0ef52b|            // ignore
514|5f3077|        }
515|27e597|    }
516|adc83b|
517|102596|    func blame(forFile fileURL: URL) async throws -> [GitBlameLine] {
518|84184f|        let repoRoot = try await GitShell.repoRoot(containing: fileURL)
519|be393e|        let relPath = GitDiffService.relativePath(fileURL, repoRoot)
520|471cce|        let key = repoRoot.path + "::" + relPath
521|adc83b|
522|04a632|        if let cached = cache[key] { return cached }
523|adc83b|
524|5df987|        let out = try await GitShell.runGit(
525|e1fef9|            args: ["-C", repoRoot.path, "blame", "--line-porcelain", "--", relPath],
526|2f85ba|            in: repoRoot
527|3143a4|        )
528|adc83b|
529|eb299c|        let parsed = Self.parseLinePorcelain(out)
530|fd7b4b|        cache[key] = parsed
531|4686f7|        return parsed
532|27e597|    }
533|adc83b|
534|5b8e3d|    private static func parseLinePorcelain(_ text: String) -> [GitBlameLine] {
535|df70a3|        // Format (porcelain):
536|d0babc|        // <sha> <origLine> <finalLine> <numLines>
537|fd523f|        // author <name>
538|407206|        // author-time <unix>
539|6d5fc5|        // summary <text>
540|ee16bf|        // ...
541|312b42|        // \t<source line>
542|47e69c|        // (then additional \t lines if <numLines> > 1)
543|adc83b|
544|ea5373|        var results: [GitBlameLine] = []
545|adc83b|
546|08428a|        var currentCommit: String = ""
547|6a21c1|        var currentAuthor: String = ""
548|edf098|        var currentAuthorTime: Date?
549|a1305c|        var currentSummary: String = ""
550|adc83b|
551|8b0ddd|        var pendingFinalLine: Int?
552|afb9b4|        var pendingRemaining: Int = 0
553|adc83b|
554|79246a|        func isHexString(_ s: Substring) -> Bool {
555|9e5fb7|            !s.isEmpty && s.allSatisfy { $0.isHexDigit }
556|5f3077|        }
557|adc83b|
558|1b00b6|        func emitOneLineIfPossible() {
559|0a458d|            guard pendingRemaining > 0,
560|99e082|                  let ln = pendingFinalLine,
561|56bbe2|                  !currentCommit.isEmpty else { return }
562|adc83b|
563|fd4da5|            results.append(
564|097c0e|                GitBlameLine(
565|6f7c36|                    line: ln,
566|26bf7c|                    commit: currentCommit,
567|3662a1|                    author: currentAuthor,
568|50c5da|                    authorTime: currentAuthorTime,
569|dd93dd|                    summary: currentSummary
570|6f642e|                )
571|43d041|            )
572|adc83b|
573|0b9ee3|            pendingFinalLine = ln + 1
574|c7cebe|            pendingRemaining -= 1
575|adc83b|
576|c83759|            if pendingRemaining == 0 {
577|f88042|                pendingFinalLine = nil
578|eba976|                currentCommit = ""
579|0d42dc|                currentAuthor = ""
580|0715f9|                currentAuthorTime = nil
581|33c8d7|                currentSummary = ""
582|a7dc16|            }
583|5f3077|        }
584|adc83b|
585|53c1fb|        for raw in text.split(separator: "\n", omittingEmptySubsequences: false) {
586|338332|            let line = String(raw)
587|adc83b|
588|251111|            if line.hasPrefix("\t") {
589|001c3e|                emitOneLineIfPossible()
590|1df510|                continue
591|a7dc16|            }
592|adc83b|
593|6aa6c7|            // Header line:
594|44d4c8|            // <sha> <origLine> <finalLine> <numLines>
595|ac0a66|            // (some variants may omit <numLines>; treat as 1)
596|cbc8d9|            let parts = line.split(separator: " ")
597|5ce5e6|            if parts.count >= 3,
598|8abcbe|               isHexString(parts[0]),
599|f49573|               Int(parts[1]) != nil,
600|f170d7|               let final = Int(parts[2]) {
601|f1b98a|                currentCommit = String(parts[0])
602|ab622d|                pendingFinalLine = final
603|189881|                pendingRemaining = (parts.count >= 4 ? Int(parts[3]) : nil) ?? 1
604|1df510|                continue
605|a7dc16|            }
606|adc83b|
607|77e2a1|            if line.hasPrefix("author ") {
608|d4a57a|                currentAuthor = String(line.dropFirst("author ".count))
609|6a62c8|            } else if line.hasPrefix("author-time ") {
610|4416ac|                let ts = String(line.dropFirst("author-time ".count))
611|39954c|                if let t = TimeInterval(ts) {
612|d16dcd|                    currentAuthorTime = Date(timeIntervalSince1970: t)
613|4e2d32|                }
614|f4e3fa|            } else if line.hasPrefix("summary ") {
615|a63d16|                currentSummary = String(line.dropFirst("summary ".count))
616|a7dc16|            }
617|5f3077|        }
618|adc83b|
619|e40d81|        return results.sorted { $0.line < $1.line }
620|27e597|    }
621|b31277|}
622|adc83b|

## 🔧 TOOL RESULTS

[run_command]
import SwiftUI

struct BreadcrumbsView: View {
    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
    let tab: Tab
    
    var pathComponents: [String] {
        if let url = tab.url {
            // Use standard components
            return url.pathComponents.filter { $0 != "/" }
        }
        return ["VSCodeiPadOS", "Views", tab.fileName]
    }
    
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView(.horizontal, showsIndicators: false) {
            HStack(spacing: 2) {
                ForEach(Array(pathComponents.enumerated()), id: \.offset) { index, component in
                    let isLast = index == pathComponents.count - 1
                    
                    // Breadcrumb item
                    HStack(spacing: 4) {
                        if index == 0 {
                            Image(systemName: "folder")
                                .font(.caption2)
                                .foregroundColor(.secondary)
                        } else if isLast {
                            Image(systemName: fileIcon(for: component))
                                .font(.caption2)
                                .foregroundColor(fileColor(for: component))
                        }
                        
                        Text(component)
                            .font(.system(size: 11))
                            .foregroundColor(isLast ? .primary : .secondary)
                    }
                    .padding(.vertical, 4)
                    .padding(.horizontal, 4)
                    .contentShape(Rectangle())
                    .onTapGesture {
                        // Handle navigation
                    }
                    
                    // Separator
                    if !isLast {
                        Image(systemName: "chevron.right")
                            .font(.system(size: 8))
                            .foregroundColor(.secondary.opacity(0.5))
                            .padding(.horizontal, 2)
                    }
                }
                
                // Current symbol
                Image(systemName: "chevron.right")
                    .font(.system(size: 8))
                    .foregroundColor(.secondary.opacity(0.5))
                    .padding(.horizontal, 2)
                    
                HStack(spacing: 2) {
                    Image(systemName: "curlybraces")
                        .font(.caption2)
                        .foregroundColor(.purple)
                    Text("ContentView")
                        .font(.system(size: 11))
                        .foregroundColor(.secondary)
                }
            }
            .padding(.horizontal, 12)
        }
        .frame(height: 26)
        .background(Color(UIColor.secondarySystemBackground).opacity(0.5))
        .overlay(Divider(), alignment: .bottom)
    }
}

[run_command]
import SwiftUI

struct BreadcrumbsView: View {
    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
    let tab: Tab
    
    var pathComponents: [String] {
        if let url = tab.url {
            // Use standard components
            return url.pathComponents.filter { $0 != "/" }
        }
        return ["VSCodeiPadOS", "Views", tab.fileName]
    }
    
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView(.horizontal, showsIndicators: false) {
            HStack(spacing: 2) {
                ForEach(Array(pathComponents.enumerated()), id: \.offset) { index, component in
                    let isLast = index == pathComponents.count - 1
                    
                    // Breadcrumb item
                    HStack(spacing: 4) {
                        if index == 0 {
                            Image(systemName: "folder")
                                .font(.caption2)
                                .foregroundColor(.secondary)
                        } else if isLast {
                            Image(systemName: fileIcon(for: component))
                                .font(.caption2)
                                .foregroundColor(fileColor(for: component))
                        }
                        
                        Text(component)
                            .font(.system(size: 11))
                            .foregroundColor(isLast ? .primary : .secondary)
                    }
                    .padding(.vertical, 4)
                    .padding(.horizontal, 4)
                    .contentShape(Rectangle())
                    .onTapGesture {
                        // Handle navigation
                    }
                    
                    // Separator
                    if !isLast {
                        Image(systemName: "chevron.right")
                            .font(.system(size: 8))
                            .foregroundColor(.secondary.opacity(0.5))
                            .padding(.horizontal, 2)
                    }
                }
                
                // Current symbol
                Image(systemName: "chevron.right")
                    .font(.system(size: 8))
                    .foregroundColor(.secondary.opacity(0.5))
                    .padding(.horizontal, 2)
                    
                HStack(spacing: 2) {
                    Image(systemName: "curlybraces")
                        .font(.caption2)
                        .foregroundColor(.purple)
                    Text("ContentView")
                        .font(.system(size: 11))
                        .foregroundColor(.secondary)
                }
            }
            .padding(.horizontal, 12)
        }
        .frame(height: 26)
        .background(Color(UIColor.secondarySystemBackground).opacity(0.5))
        .overlay(Divider(), alignment: .bottom)
    }
}

[run_command]
import SwiftUI
import UIKit

/// Renders inline ghost text suggestions with fade animations and multi-line support.
///
/// This view displays AI-generated code suggestions as semi-transparent gray text
/// positioned at the cursor location. Users can accept suggestions with the Tab key.
///
/// Features:
/// - Ghost text overlay with proper positioning based on cursor location
/// - Multi-line suggestion support with line breaks
/// - Fade in/out animations for smooth appearance/disappearance
/// - "Tab to accept" indicator
/// - Integration with InlineSuggestionManager via @EnvironmentObject
/// - Proper handling of partial accept state
struct InlineSuggestionView: View {
    /// The code content being edited (needed for positioning calculations)
    let code: String
    
    /// Language for syntax context (affects styling)
    let language: CodeLanguage
    
    /// Current scroll position (line index) of the editor
    let scrollPosition: Int
    
    /// Height of each line in the editor
    let lineHeight: CGFloat
    
    /// Font size used in the editor
    let fontSize: CGFloat
    
    /// Width reserved for the gutter (line numbers)
    var gutterWidth: CGFloat = 60
    
    /// Insets used by the underlying UITextView
    var textInsets: UIEdgeInsets = UIEdgeInsets(top: 8, left: 8, bottom: 8, right: 8)
    
    /// Width reserved at the right edge (e.g. minimap)
    var rightReservedWidth: CGFloat = 0
    
    /// How many spaces a tab visually represents
    var tabSize: Int = 4
    
    /// Animation duration for fade in/out
    var animationDuration: Double = 0.15
    
    /// The manager that provides suggestion state
    @EnvironmentObject var suggestionManager: InlineSuggestionManager
    
    /// Controls the visibility animation state
    @State private var isVisible: Bool = false
    
    /// The ghost text to display (filtered to show only unaccepted portion)
    private var ghostText: String {
        suggestionManager.ghostText
    }
    
    /// Whether there is an active suggestion to display
    private var hasSuggestion: Bool {
        !ghostText.isEmpty
    }
    
    /// The cursor position for rendering
    private var cursorPosition: InlineSuggestionManager.CursorPosition {
        suggestionManager.cursorPosition
    }
    
    var body: some View {
        GeometryReader { geo in
            ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
                if isVisible && hasSuggestion {
                    suggestionContent(geometry: geo)
                }
            }
            .frame(
                width: max(0, geo.size.width - rightReservedWidth),
                height: geo.size.height,
                alignment: .topLeading
            )
            .clipped()
        }
        .allowsHitTesting(false)
        .onAppear {
            updateVisibility()
        }
        .onChange(of: ghostText) { _ in
            updateVisibility()
        }
        .onChange(of: suggestionManager.currentSuggestion) { _ in
            updateVisibility()
        }
    }
    
    /// Renders the suggestion content with positioning and styling
    private func suggestionContent(geometry geo: GeometryProxy) -> some View {
        let font = UIFont.monospacedSystemFont(ofSize: fontSize, weight: .regular)
        let charWidth = (" " as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
        let fontLineHeight = font.lineHeight
        let baselineAdjustment = max(0, (lineHeight - fontLineHeight) / 2)
        
        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
        
        // Calculate the starting position
        let startX: CGFloat
        let startY: CGFloat
        
        // Get the current line text up to cursor position
        let currentLineIndex = min(cursorPosition.line, max(0, lines.count - 1))
        let currentLine = lines.indices.contains(currentLineIndex) ? lines[currentLineIndex] : ""
        
        // Calculate visual column for current position
        let visualColumn = visualColumn(in: currentLine, utf16Column: cursorPosition.column, tabSize: tabSize)
        
        // Calculate starting X position (gutter + insets + character offset)
        startX = gutterWidth + textInsets.left + (CGFloat(visualColumn) * charWidth)
        
        // Calculate starting Y position (adjusted for scroll)
        let visibleLineIndex = currentLineIndex - scrollPosition
        startY = textInsets.top + baselineAdjustment + (CGFloat(visibleLineIndex) * lineHeight)
        
        // Split ghost text into lines
        let ghostLines = ghostText.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
        
        return ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
            // Render each line of the suggestion
            ForEach(Array(ghostLines.enumerated()), id: \.offset) { index, line in
                // For multi-line suggestions, only the first line starts at cursor X
                // Subsequent lines start from the left margin
                let xOffset: CGFloat = index == 0 ? startX : gutterWidth + textInsets.left
                let yOffset: CGFloat = startY + (CGFloat(index) * lineHeight)
                
                // For lines after the first, include a visual indicator that it's a continuation
                let displayText = line
                
                Text(displayText)
                    .font(.system(size: fontSize, design: .monospaced))
                    .foregroundColor(Color.gray.opacity(0.6))
                    .offset(x: xOffset, y: yOffset)
                    .lineLimit(1)
                    .fixedSize(horizontal: true, vertical: false)
            }
            
            // Tab to accept indicator
            tabIndicatorView(
                startX: startX,
                startY: startY,
                ghostLines: ghostLines,
                charWidth: charWidth,
                font: font
            )
        }
        .transition(
            .asymmetric(
                insertion: .opacity.animation(.easeIn(duration: animationDuration)),
                removal: .opacity.animation(.easeOut(duration: animationDuration))
            )
        )
    }
    
    /// Renders the "Tab to accept" indicator
    private func tabIndicatorView(
        startX: CGFloat,
        startY: CGFloat,
        ghostLines: [String],
        charWidth: CGFloat,
        font: UIFont
    ) -> some View {
        // Calculate indicator position (below the suggestion or at the end of single line)
        let indicatorY: CGFloat
        let indicatorX: CGFloat
        
        if ghostLines.count > 1 {
            // For multi-line, show indicator at the end of last line
            let lastLine = ghostLines.last ?? ""
            let lastLineWidth = (lastLine as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
            indicatorX = startX + lastLineWidth
            indicatorY = startY + (CGFloat(ghostLines.count - 1) * lineHeight)
        } else {
            // For single line, show indicator at the end of the text
            let lineWidth = (ghostText as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
            indicatorX = startX + lineWidth + 8 // Small gap after text
            indicatorY = startY
        }
        
        return HStack(spacing: 4) {
            Image(systemName: "arrow.right.to.line")
                .font(.system(size: fontSize * 0.7))
            
            Text("Tab")
                .font(.system(size: fontSize * 0.7, weight: .medium))
        }
        .foregroundColor(Color.gray.opacity(0.5))
        .padding(.horizontal, 4)
        .padding(.vertical, 2)
        .background(
            RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 3)
                .fill(Color.gray.opacity(0.1))
        )
        .offset(x: indicatorX, y: indicatorY + (lineHeight - font.lineHeight) / 2)
        .opacity(0.7)
    }
    
    /// Updates the visibility state with animation
    private func updateVisibility() {
        let shouldBeVisible = hasSuggestion && isCursorVisible()
        
        if shouldBeVisible != isVisible {
            withAnimation(.easeInOut(duration: animationDuration)) {
                isVisible = shouldBeVisible
            }
        }
    }
    
    /// Checks if the cursor is currently visible in the viewport
    private func isCursorVisible() -> Bool {
        let cursorLine = cursorPosition.line
        // Allow some margin for visibility (show if within viewport ± a few lines)
        let visibleRange = scrollPosition...(scrollPosition + 50) // Assuming ~50 visible lines
        return visibleRange.contains(cursorLine)
    }
    
    /// Calculates the visual column position accounting for tabs
    private func visualColumn(in line: String, utf16Column: Int, tabSize: Int) -> Int {
        let ns = line as NSString
        let clamped = max(0, min(utf16Column, ns.length))
        let prefix = ns.substring(with: NSRange(location: 0, length: clamped))
        
        var col = 0
        for ch in prefix {
            if ch == "\t" {
                col += tabSize
            } else {
                col += 1
            }
        }
        return col
    }
}

// MARK: - Preview Support

#if DEBUG
struct InlineSuggestionView_Previews: PreviewProvider {
    static let mockManager: InlineSuggestionManager = {
        let manager = InlineSuggestionManager()
        manager.currentSuggestion = "\n    print(\"Hello, World!\")\n    return true"
        manager.cursorPosition = InlineSuggestionManager.CursorPosition(line: 5, column: 12)
        return manager
    }()
    
    static var previews: some View {
        ZStack {
            // Background simulating editor
            Color.black.opacity(0.9)
            
            // Mock code lines
            VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 0) {
                ForEach(0..<10) { i in
                    Text("Line \(i + 1): Some code here...")
                        .font(.system(size: 14, design: .monospaced))
                        .foregroundColor(.white)
                        .frame(height: 20, alignment: .leading)
                }
            }
            .padding(.leading, 60)
            
            // Inline suggestion overlay
            InlineSuggestionView(
                code: "func example() {\n    let x = 10\n    return x\n}",
                language: .swift,
                scrollPosition: 0,
                lineHeight: 20,
                fontSize: 14
            )
            .environmentObject(mockManager)
        }
        .frame(width: 400, height: 300)
    }
}
#endif

        startY: CGFloat,
        ghostLines: [String],
        charWidth: CGFloat,
        font: UIFont
    ) -> some View {
        // Calculate indicator position (below the suggestion or at the end of single line)
        let indicatorY: CGFloat
        let indicatorX: CGFloat
        
        if ghostLines.count > 1 {
            // For multi-line, show indicator at the end of last line
            let lastLine = ghostLines.last ?? ""
            let lastLineWidth = (lastLine as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
            indicatorX = startX + lastLineWidth
            indicatorY = startY + (CGFloat(ghostLines.count - 1) * lineHeight)
        } else {
            // For single line, show indicator at the end of the text
            let lineWidth = (ghostText as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
            indicatorX = startX + lineWidth + 8 // Small gap after text
            indicatorY = startY
        }
        
        return HStack(spacing: 4) {
            Image(systemName: "arrow.right.to.line")
                .font(.system(size: fontSize * 0.7))
            
            Text("Tab")
                .font(.system(size: fontSize * 0.7, weight: .medium))
        }
        .foregroundColor(Color.gray.opacity(0.5))
        .padding(.horizontal, 4)
        .padding(.vertical, 2)
        .background(
            RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 3)
                .fill(Color.gray.opacity(0.1))
        )
        .offset(x: indicatorX, y: indicatorY + (lineHeight - font.lineHeight) / 2)
        .opacity(0.7)
    }
    
    /// Updates the visibility state with animation
    private func updateVisibility() {
        let shouldBeVisible = hasSuggestion && isCursorVisible()
        
        if shouldBeVisible != isVisible {
            withAnimation(.easeInOut(duration: animationDuration)) {
                isVisible = shouldBeVisible
            }
        }
    }
    
    /// Checks if the cursor is currently visible in the viewport
    private func isCursorVisible() -> Bool {
        let cursorLine = cursorPosition.line
        // Allow some margin for visibility (show if within viewport ± a few lines)
        let visibleRange = scrollPosition...(scrollPosition + 50) // Assuming ~50 visible lines
        return visibleRange.contains(cursorLine)
    }
    
    /// Calculates the visual column position accounting for tabs
    private func visualColumn(in line: String, utf16Column: Int, tabSize: Int) -> Int {
        let ns = line as NSString
        let clamped = max(0, min(utf16Column, ns.length))
        let prefix = ns.substring(with: NSRange(location: 0, length: clamped))
        
        var col = 0
        for ch in prefix {
            if ch == "\t" {
                col += tabSize
            } else {
                col += 1
            }
        }
        return col
    }
}

// MARK: - Preview Support

#if DEBUG
struct InlineSuggestionView_Previews: PreviewProvider {
    static let mockManager: InlineSuggestionManager = {
        let manager = InlineSuggestionManager()
        manager.currentSuggestion = "\n    print(\"Hello, World!\")\n    return true"
        manager.cursorPosition = InlineSuggestionManager.CursorPosition(line: 5, column: 12)
        return manager
    }()
    
    static var previews: some View {
        ZStack {
            // Background simulating editor
            Color.black.opacity(0.9)
            
            // Mock code lines
            VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 0) {
                ForEach(0..<10) { i in
                    Text("Line \(i + 1): Some code here...")
                        .font(.system(size: 14, design: .monospaced))
                        .foregroundColor(.white)
                        .frame(height: 20, alignment: .leading)
                }
            }
            .padding(.leading, 60)
            
            // Inline suggestion overlay
            InlineSuggestionView(
                code: "func example() {\n    let x = 10\n    return x\n}",
                language: .swift,
                scrollPosition: 0,
                lineHeight: 20,
                fontSize: 14
            )
            .environmentObject(mockManager)
        }
        .frame(width: 400, height: 300)
    }
}
#endif

import SwiftUI

struct BreadcrumbsView: View {
    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
    let tab: Tab
    
    var pathComponents: [String] {
        if let url = tab.url {
            // Use standard components
            return url.pathComponents.filter { $0 != "/" }
        }
        return ["VSCodeiPadOS", "Views", tab.fileName]
    }
    
    var body: some View {
        ScrollView(.horizontal, showsIndicators: false) {
            HStack(spacing: 2) {
                ForEach(Array(pathComponents.enumerated()), id: \.offset) { index, component in
                    let isLast = index == pathComponents.count - 1
                    
                    // Breadcrumb item
                    HStack(spacing: 4) {
                        if index == 0 {
                            Image(systemName: "folder")
                                .font(.caption2)
                                .foregroundColor(.secondary)
                        } else if isLast {
                            Image(systemName: fileIcon(for: component))
                                .font(.caption2)
                                .foregroundColor(fileColor(for: component))
                        }
                        
                        Text(component)
                            .font(.system(size: 11))
                            .foregroundColor(isLast ? .primary : .secondary)
                    }
                    .padding(.vertical, 4)
                    .padding(.horizontal, 4)
                    .contentShape(Rectangle())
                    .onTapGesture {
                        // Handle navigation
                    }
                    
                    // Separator
                    if !isLast {
                        Image(systemName: "chevron.right")
                            .font(.system(size: 8))
                            .foregroundColor(.secondary.opacity(0.5))
                            .padding(.horizontal, 2)
                    }
                }
                
                // Current symbol
                Image(systemName: "chevron.right")
                    .font(.system(size: 8))
                    .foregroundColor(.secondary.opacity(0.5))
                    .padding(.horizontal, 2)
                    
                HStack(spacing: 2) {
                    Image(systemName: "curlybraces")
                        .font(.caption2)
                        .foregroundColor(.purple)
                    Text("ContentView")
                        .font(.system(size: 11))
                        .foregroundColor(.secondary)
                }
            }
            .padding(.horizontal, 12)
        }
        .frame(height: 26)
        .background(Color(UIColor.secondarySystemBackground).opacity(0.5))
        .overlay(Divider(), alignment: .bottom)
    }
}

51|cc0284|// MARK: - Recent Commands Manager
52|adc83b|
53|411ba5|class RecentCommandsManager: ObservableObject {
54|d3834f|    @Published var recentCommands: [String] = []
55|4d914d|    private let maxRecent = 5
56|f67f90|    private let storageKey = "recentCommands"
57|b4687f|    
58|359b1b|    init() {
59|880bd6|        loadRecent()
60|27e597|    }
61|b4687f|    
62|230e29|    func addRecent(_ commandName: String) {
63|fe3482|        recentCommands.removeAll { $0 == commandName }
64|d6c233|        recentCommands.insert(commandName, at: 0)
65|8a5223|        if recentCommands.count > maxRecent {
66|578c6f|            recentCommands = Array(recentCommands.prefix(maxRecent))
67|5f3077|        }
68|a8ef93|        saveRecent()
69|27e597|    }
70|b4687f|    
71|998823|    private func loadRecent() {
72|7e091c|        if let saved = UserDefaults.standard.stringArray(forKey: storageKey) {
73|cbe995|            recentCommands = saved
74|5f3077|        }
75|27e597|    }
76|b4687f|    
77|956c57|    private func saveRecent() {
78|98ac56|        UserDefaults.standard.set(recentCommands, forKey: storageKey)
79|27e597|    }
80|b31277|}

82|af0ecd|// MARK: - Fuzzy Search
83|adc83b|
84|9fce4f|struct FuzzyMatcher {
85|ae76bd|    static func score(query: String, target: String) -> Int? {
86|34cef6|        guard !query.isEmpty else { return 1000 }
87|d6ed84|        
88|aa4292|        let queryLower = query.lowercased()
89|18ea38|        let targetLower = target.lowercased()
90|d6ed84|        
91|c33784|        // Exact match gets highest score
92|bea5c7|        if targetLower == queryLower { return 10000 }
93|d6ed84|        
94|bffced|        // Contains full query
95|8cd767|        if targetLower.contains(queryLower) {
96|1063f5|            // Bonus for starting with query
97|d0876a|            if targetLower.hasPrefix(queryLower) {
98|2e989d|                return 5000 + (1000 - target.count)
99|a7dc16|            }
100|c9ab09|            return 3000 + (1000 - target.count)
101|5f3077|        }
102|d6ed84|        
103|83786c|        // Fuzzy character matching
104|65f313|        var queryIndex = queryLower.startIndex
105|7f11d4|        var targetIndex = targetLower.startIndex
106|268b95|        var score = 0
107|5dc28e|        var consecutiveBonus = 0
108|1d718f|        var lastMatchIndex: String.Index? = nil
109|d6ed84|        
110|308cfe|        while queryIndex < queryLower.endIndex && targetIndex < targetLower.endIndex {
111|c13bec|            if queryLower[queryIndex] == targetLower[targetIndex] {
112|145bbf|                score += 100 + consecutiveBonus
113|216278|                
114|d6ef12|                // Bonus for consecutive matches
115|9f661a|                if let lastIdx = lastMatchIndex,
116|83874f|                   targetLower.index(after: lastIdx) == targetIndex {
117|9c7108|                    consecutiveBonus += 50
118|fdd0e2|                } else {
119|51d442|                    consecutiveBonus = 0
120|4e2d32|                }
121|216278|                
122|c7d2d9|                // Bonus for matching at word boundaries
123|3c44b0|                if targetIndex == targetLower.startIndex ||
124|75c499|                   !targetLower[targetLower.index(before: targetIndex)].isLetter {
125|78d351|                    score += 75
126|4e2d32|                }
127|216278|                
128|b7133b|                lastMatchIndex = targetIndex
129|ea161d|                queryIndex = queryLower.index(after: queryIndex)
130|a7dc16|            }
131|916731|            targetIndex = targetLower.index(after: targetIndex)
132|5f3077|        }
133|d6ed84|        
134|989e1f|        // All query characters must be found
135|0160b5|        guard queryIndex == queryLower.endIndex else { return nil }
136|d6ed84|        
137|c07521|        return score
138|27e597|    }
139|b4687f|    
140|ace7c9|    static func highlight(query: String, in text: String) -> [(String, Bool)] {
141|81813c|        guard !query.isEmpty else { return [(text, false)] }
142|d6ed84|        
143|b880d0|        var result: [(String, Bool)] = []
144|aa4292|        let queryLower = query.lowercased()
145|a14f23|        let textLower = text.lowercased()
146|d6ed84|        
147|65f313|        var queryIndex = queryLower.startIndex
148|a07ffc|        var currentSegment = ""
149|d3c359|        var isMatch = false
150|d6ed84|        
151|4083e9|        for (i, char) in text.enumerated() {
152|212094|            let textIndex = textLower.index(textLower.startIndex, offsetBy: i)
153|3070d1|            
154|3f747d|            if queryIndex < queryLower.endIndex && 
155|f8248a|               textLower[textIndex] == queryLower[queryIndex] {
156|eecabe|                if !isMatch && !currentSegment.isEmpty {
157|78ec19|                    result.append((currentSegment, false))
158|cc1904|                    currentSegment = ""
159|4e2d32|                }
160|a00101|                isMatch = true
161|b31654|                currentSegment.append(char)
162|ea161d|                queryIndex = queryLower.index(after: queryIndex)
163|f5a6eb|            } else {
164|fbac5d|                if isMatch && !currentSegment.isEmpty {
165|15ba04|                    result.append((currentSegment, true))
166|cc1904|                    currentSegment = ""
167|4e2d32|                }
168|d1cc2f|                isMatch = false
169|b31654|                currentSegment.append(char)
170|a7dc16|            }
171|5f3077|        }
172|d6ed84|        
173|5d8d48|        if !currentSegment.isEmpty {
174|eb146d|            result.append((currentSegment, isMatch))
175|5f3077|        }
176|d6ed84|        
177|67ed82|        return result
178|27e597|    }
179|b31277|}

55|f35525|    private func closeTab(_ tab: Tab) {
56|d14e45|        if let index = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tab.id }) {
57|dc033d|            tabs.remove(at: index)
58|adc83b|

67|4e2d32|                }
68|a7dc16|            }
69|5f3077|        }

53|411ba5|class RecentCommandsManager: ObservableObject {
54|d3834f|    @Published var recentCommands: [String] = []
55|4d914d|    private let maxRecent = 5
56|f67f90|    private let storageKey = "recentCommands"
57|b4687f|    
58|359b1b|    init() {
59|880bd6|        loadRecent()
60|27e597|    }
61|b4687f|    
62|230e29|    func addRecent(_ commandName: String) {
63|fe3482|        recentCommands.removeAll { $0 == commandName }
64|d6c233|        recentCommands.insert(commandName, at: 0)
65|8a5223|        if recentCommands.count > maxRecent {
66|578c6f|            recentCommands = Array(recentCommands.prefix(maxRecent))
67|5f3077|        }
68|a8ef93|        saveRecent()
69|27e597|    }
70|b4687f|    
71|998823|    private func loadRecent() {
72|7e091c|        if let saved = UserDefaults.standard.stringArray(forKey: storageKey) {
73|cbe995|            recentCommands = saved
74|5f3077|        }
75|27e597|    }
76|b4687f|    
77|956c57|    private func saveRecent() {
78|98ac56|        UserDefaults.standard.set(recentCommands, forKey: storageKey)
79|27e597|    }

82|af0ecd|// MARK: - Fuzzy Search
83|adc83b|
84|9fce4f|struct FuzzyMatcher {
85|ae76bd|    static func score(query: String, target: String) -> Int? {
86|34cef6|        guard !query.isEmpty else { return 1000 }
87|d6ed84|        
88|aa4292|        let queryLower = query.lowercased()
89|18ea38|        let targetLower = target.lowercased()
90|d6ed84|        
91|c33784|        // Exact match gets highest score
92|bea5c7|        if targetLower == queryLower { return 10000 }
93|d6ed84|        
94|bffced|        // Contains full query
95|8cd767|        if targetLower.contains(queryLower) {
96|1063f5|            // Bonus for starting with query
97|d0876a|            if targetLower.hasPrefix(queryLower) {
98|2e989d|                return 5000 + (1000 - target.count)
99|a7dc16|            }
100|c9ab09|            return 3000 + (1000 - target.count)
101|5f3077|        }
102|d6ed84|        
103|83786c|        // Fuzzy character matching
104|65f313|        var queryIndex = queryLower.startIndex
105|7f11d4|        var targetIndex = targetLower.startIndex
106|268b95|        var score = 0
107|5dc28e|        var consecutiveBonus = 0
108|1d718f|        var lastMatchIndex: String.Index? = nil
109|d6ed84|        
110|308cfe|        while queryIndex < queryLower.endIndex && targetIndex < targetLower.endIndex {
111|c13bec|            if queryLower[queryIndex] == targetLower[targetIndex] {
112|145bbf|                score += 100 + consecutiveBonus
113|216278|                
114|d6ef12|                // Bonus for consecutive matches
115|9f661a|                if let lastIdx = lastMatchIndex,
116|83874f|                   targetLower.index(after: lastIdx) == targetIndex {
117|9c7108|                    consecutiveBonus += 50
118|fdd0e2|                } else {
119|51d442|                    consecutiveBonus = 0
120|4e2d32|                }
121|216278|                
122|c7d2d9|                // Bonus for matching at word boundaries
123|3c44b0|                if targetIndex == targetLower.startIndex ||
124|75c499|                   !targetLower[targetLower.index(before: targetIndex)].isLetter {
125|78d351|                    score += 75
126|4e2d32|                }
127|216278|                
128|b7133b|                lastMatchIndex = targetIndex
129|ea161d|                queryIndex = queryLower.index(after: queryIndex)
130|a7dc16|            }
131|916731|            targetIndex = targetLower.index(after: targetIndex)
132|5f3077|        }
133|d6ed84|        
134|989e1f|        // All query characters must be found
135|0160b5|        guard queryIndex == queryLower.endIndex else { return nil }
136|d6ed84|        
137|c07521|        return score
138|27e597|    }
139|b4687f|    
140|ace7c9|    static func highlight(query: String, in text: String) -> [(String, Bool)] {
141|81813c|        guard !query.isEmpty else { return [(text, false)] }
142|d6ed84|        
143|b880d0|        var result: [(String, Bool)] = []
144|aa4292|        let queryLower = query.lowercased()
145|a14f23|        let textLower = text.lowercased()
146|d6ed84|        
147|65f313|        var queryIndex = queryLower.startIndex
148|a07ffc|        var currentSegment = ""
149|d3c359|        var isMatch = false
150|d6ed84|        
151|4083e9|        for (i, char) in text.enumerated() {
152|212094|            let textIndex = textLower.index(textLower.startIndex, offsetBy: i)
153|3070d1|            
154|3f747d|            if queryIndex < queryLower.endIndex && 
155|f8248a|               textLower[textIndex] == queryLower[queryIndex] {
156|eecabe|                if !isMatch && !currentSegment.isEmpty {
157|78ec19|                    result.append((currentSegment, false))
158|cc1904|                    currentSegment = ""
159|4e2d32|                }
160|a00101|                isMatch = true
161|b31654|                currentSegment.append(char)
162|ea161d|                queryIndex = queryLower.index(after: queryIndex)
163|f5a6eb|            } else {
164|fbac5d|                if isMatch && !currentSegment.isEmpty {
165|15ba04|                    result.append((currentSegment, true))
166|cc1904|                    currentSegment = ""
167|4e2d32|                }
168|d1cc2f|                isMatch = false
169|b31654|                currentSegment.append(char)
170|a7dc16|            }
171|5f3077|        }
172|d6ed84|        
173|5d8d48|        if !currentSegment.isEmpty {
174|eb146d|            result.append((currentSegment, isMatch))
175|5f3077|        }
176|d6ed84|        
177|67ed82|        return result
178|27e597|    }
179|b31277|}

48|af9510|struct DiffBuilder {
49|0138df|    static func build(fileName: String, status: String, old: String, new: String) -> DiffFile {
50|9e82fa|        let oldLines = splitLines(old)
51|9a046b|        let newLines = splitLines(new)
52|a6deec|        let edits = diffEdits(oldLines, newLines)
53|adc83b|
54|c85a82|        var lines: [DiffLine] = []
55|612c87|        lines.reserveCapacity(edits.count)
56|adc83b|
57|b50bf9|        var oldLineNumber = 1
58|37aaae|        var newLineNumber = 1
59|adc83b|
60|2fed6c|        for edit in edits {
61|8274e4|            switch edit {
62|cc6091|            case let .equal(text):
63|7c5c47|                lines.append(.init(type: .context, content: text, oldLineNumber: oldLineNumber, newLineNumber: newLineNumber))
64|34dd37|                oldLineNumber += 1
65|d0995e|                newLineNumber += 1
66|adc83b|
67|0de55e|            case let .delete(text):
68|a9bb46|                lines.append(.init(type: .deletion, content: text, oldLineNumber: oldLineNumber, newLineNumber: nil))
69|34dd37|                oldLineNumber += 1
70|adc83b|
71|bd8701|            case let .insert(text):
72|cbbb20|                lines.append(.init(type: .addition, content: text, oldLineNumber: nil, newLineNumber: newLineNumber))
73|d0995e|                newLineNumber += 1
74|a7dc16|            }
75|5f3077|        }
76|adc83b|
77|fe8215|        let header = "@@ -1,\(oldLines.count) +1,\(newLines.count) @@"
78|35ffb5|        let hunk = DiffHunk(header: header, lines: lines)
79|6f56c0|        return DiffFile(fileName: fileName, status: status, hunks: [hunk])
80|27e597|    }
81|adc83b|
82|72adbf|    private static func splitLines(_ text: String) -> [String] {
83|9ab348|        var lines = text.components(separatedBy: "\n")
84|b3b18c|        // Drop trailing empty line if file ends with newline.
85|12deaf|        if lines.last == "" {
86|73b25f|            lines.removeLast()
87|5f3077|        }
88|6a8c8e|        return lines
89|27e597|    }
90|adc83b|
91|d861dc|    private static func diffEdits(_ old: [String], _ new: [String]) -> [_DiffEdit] {
92|2ef737|        let n = old.count
93|962d3a|        let m = new.count
94|adc83b|
95|19e396|        if n == 0 { return new.map { .insert($0) } }
96|659f38|        if m == 0 { return old.map { .delete($0) } }
97|adc83b|
98|6d0c13|        // LCS DP (simple + deterministic). Replace with Myers later if needed.
99|249089|        var dp = Array(repeating: Array(repeating: 0, count: m + 1), count: n + 1)
100|da873b|        for i in 1...n {
101|e1eb8d|            for j in 1...m {
102|daa469|                if old[i - 1] == new[j - 1] {
103|59b54f|                    dp[i][j] = dp[i - 1][j - 1] + 1
104|fdd0e2|                } else {
105|ada1d6|                    dp[i][j] = max(dp[i - 1][j], dp[i][j - 1])
106|4e2d32|                }
107|a7dc16|            }
108|5f3077|        }
109|adc83b|
110|c7d097|        var edits: [_DiffEdit] = []
111|30fde6|        edits.reserveCapacity(n + m)
112|adc83b|
113|8f426a|        var i = n
114|2e5d36|        var j = m
115|f21817|        while i > 0 || j > 0 {
116|ff88b1|            if i > 0, j > 0, old[i - 1] == new[j - 1] {
117|3a4cb2|                edits.append(.equal(old[i - 1]))
118|0a3170|                i -= 1
119|038038|                j -= 1
120|314055|            } else if j > 0, i == 0 || dp[i][j - 1] >= dp[i - 1][j] {
121|d7bd75|                edits.append(.insert(new[j - 1]))
122|038038|                j -= 1
123|cbb05a|            } else if i > 0 {
124|218975|                edits.append(.delete(old[i - 1]))
125|0a3170|                i -= 1
126|a7dc16|            }
127|5f3077|        }
128|adc83b|
129|f49266|        return edits.reversed()
130|27e597|    }

48|af9510|struct DiffBuilder {
49|0138df|    static func build(fileName: String, status: String, old: String, new: String) -> DiffFile {
50|9e82fa|        let oldLines = splitLines(old)
51|9a046b|        let newLines = splitLines(new)
52|a6deec|        let edits = diffEdits(oldLines, newLines)
53|adc83b|
54|c85a82|        var lines: [DiffLine] = []
55|612c87|        lines.reserveCapacity(edits.count)
56|adc83b|
57|b50bf9|        var oldLineNumber = 1
58|37aaae|        var newLineNumber = 1
59|adc83b|
60|2fed6c|        for edit in edits {
61|8274e4|            switch edit {
62|cc6091|            case let .equal(text):
63|7c5c47|                lines.append(.init(type: .context, content: text, oldLineNumber: oldLineNumber, newLineNumber: newLineNumber))
64|34dd37|                oldLineNumber += 1
65|d0995e|                newLineNumber += 1
66|adc83b|
67|0de55e|            case let .delete(text):
68|a9bb46|                lines.append(.init(type: .deletion, content: text, oldLineNumber: oldLineNumber, newLineNumber: nil))
69|34dd37|                oldLineNumber += 1
70|adc83b|
71|bd8701|            case let .insert(text):
72|cbbb20|                lines.append(.init(type: .addition, content: text, oldLineNumber: nil, newLineNumber: newLineNumber))
73|d0995e|                newLineNumber += 1
74|a7dc16|            }
75|5f3077|        }
76|adc83b|
77|fe8215|        let header = "@@ -1,\(oldLines.count) +1,\(newLines.count) @@"
78|35ffb5|        let hunk = DiffHunk(header: header, lines: lines)
79|6f56c0|        return DiffFile(fileName: fileName, status: status, hunks: [hunk])
80|27e597|    }
81|adc83b|
82|72adbf|    private static func splitLines(_ text: String) -> [String] {
83|9ab348|        var lines = text.components(separatedBy: "\n")
84|b3b18c|        // Drop trailing empty line if file ends with newline.
85|12deaf|        if lines.last == "" {
86|73b25f|            lines.removeLast()
87|5f3077|        }
88|6a8c8e|        return lines
89|27e597|    }
90|adc83b|
91|d861dc|    private static func diffEdits(_ old: [String], _ new: [String]) -> [_DiffEdit] {
92|2ef737|        let n = old.count
93|962d3a|        let m = new.count
94|adc83b|
95|19e396|        if n == 0 { return new.map { .insert($0) } }
96|659f38|        if m == 0 { return old.map { .delete($0) } }
97|adc83b|
98|6d0c13|        // LCS DP (simple + deterministic). Replace with Myers later if needed.
99|249089|        var dp = Array(repeating: Array(repeating: 0, count: m + 1), count: n + 1)
100|da873b|        for i in 1...n {
101|e1eb8d|            for j in 1...m {
102|daa469|                if old[i - 1] == new[j - 1] {
103|59b54f|                    dp[i][j] = dp[i - 1][j - 1] + 1
104|fdd0e2|                } else {
105|ada1d6|                    dp[i][j] = max(dp[i - 1][j], dp[i][j - 1])
106|4e2d32|                }
107|a7dc16|            }
108|5f3077|        }
109|adc83b|
110|c7d097|        var edits: [_DiffEdit] = []
111|30fde6|        edits.reserveCapacity(n + m)
112|adc83b|
113|8f426a|        var i = n
114|2e5d36|        var j = m
115|f21817|        while i > 0 || j > 0 {
116|ff88b1|            if i > 0, j > 0, old[i - 1] == new[j - 1] {
117|3a4cb2|                edits.append(.equal(old[i - 1]))
118|0a3170|                i -= 1
119|038038|                j -= 1
120|314055|            } else if j > 0, i == 0 || dp[i][j - 1] >= dp[i - 1][j] {
121|d7bd75|                edits.append(.insert(new[j - 1]))
122|038038|                j -= 1
123|cbb05a|            } else if i > 0 {
124|218975|                edits.append(.delete(old[i - 1]))
125|0a3170|                i -= 1
126|a7dc16|            }
127|5f3077|        }
128|adc83b|
129|f49266|        return edits.reversed()
130|27e597|    }

36|d6ed84|

52|5f3077|        }
53|d6ed84|        
54|286507|        // Extension matches

100|d361c0|    // MARK: - Swift Parser
101|b4687f|    
102|aeac0d|    private static func parseSwiftSymbols(from content: String) -> [CodeSymbol] {
103|08506f|        var symbols: [CodeSymbol] = []
104|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
105|d6ed84|        
106|bc1385|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, type: SymbolType)] = [
107|fc8340|            // Functions
108|c10247|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?func\s+(\w+)"#, .function),
109|8fed15|            // Classes
110|420729|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?(final )?class\s+(\w+)"#, .class),
111|2f60d1|            // Structs
112|f75c05|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?struct\s+(\w+)"#, .struct),
113|af4603|            // Enums
114|1468c0|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?enum\s+(\w+)"#, .enum),
115|2fc5af|            // Protocols
116|48e586|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?protocol\s+(\w+)"#, .protocol),
117|f5d37b|            // Properties
118|dc53a3|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?(static |class )?(var|let)\s+(\w+)"#, .property),
119|235e1d|            // Init
120|7630ef|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?(required |convenience )?init"#, .constructor),
121|220505|        ]
122|d6ed84|        
123|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
124|3a36dc|            for (pattern, type) in patterns {
125|66048b|                if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []),
126|0483e7|                   let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)) {
127|dd2193|                    
128|277cff|                    var name: String
129|dd2193|                    
130|973af5|                    // Extract the name based on type
131|95923a|                    if type == .constructor {
132|932c3b|                        name = "init"
133|6f3cd6|                        // Try to get parameters
134|2dcc0c|                        if let parenRange = line.range(of: "(") {
135|f790c1|                            let afterParen = String(line[parenRange.lowerBound...])
136|5f45d4|                            if let closeRange = afterParen.range(of: ")") {
137|3abd65|                                let params = String(afterParen[afterParen.index(after: afterParen.startIndex)..<closeRange.lowerBound])
138|95cae0|                                if !params.isEmpty {
139|c5f767|                                    name = "init(\(params.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)))"
140|f83e05|                                }
141|89d40a|                            }
142|392b35|                        }
143|540066|                    } else {
144|da86c9|                        // Get the last capture group which should be the name
145|769896|                        let lastGroupIndex = match.numberOfRanges - 1
146|170684|                        if lastGroupIndex > 0,
147|e5e5c3|                           let range = Range(match.range(at: lastGroupIndex), in: line) {
148|155a4b|                            name = String(line[range])
149|65e2f4|                        } else {
150|84d6cb|                            continue
151|392b35|                        }
152|c9717a|                    }
153|dd2193|                    
154|62536b|                    symbols.append(CodeSymbol(
155|e8eb2a|                        name: name,
156|dd7229|                        type: type,
157|35d8e4|                        line: lineIndex + 1,
158|6aead8|                        column: 1,
159|56d74d|                        detail: nil,
160|4b2c23|                        containerName: nil
161|c89922|                    ))
162|8dcb2c|                    break
163|4e2d32|                }
164|a7dc16|            }
165|5f3077|        }
166|d6ed84|        
167|1e442a|        return symbols
168|27e597|    }

172|ab4b8c|    private static func parseJSSymbols(from content: String) -> [CodeSymbol] {
173|08506f|        var symbols: [CodeSymbol] = []
174|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
175|d6ed84|        
176|bc1385|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, type: SymbolType)] = [
177|fc8340|            // Functions
178|6686a3|            (#"^\s*(export )?(async )?function\s+(\w+)"#, .function),
179|90b7a5|            // Arrow functions assigned to const/let
180|46538c|            (#"^\s*(export )?(const|let|var)\s+(\w+)\s*=\s*(async )?\(.*\)\s*=>"#, .function),
181|8fed15|            // Classes
182|b5230a|            (#"^\s*(export )?(default )?class\s+(\w+)"#, .class),
183|48ca72|            // Interfaces (TypeScript)
184|8f0c51|            (#"^\s*(export )?interface\s+(\w+)"#, .interface),
185|45f8e1|            // Types (TypeScript)
186|df9f56|            (#"^\s*(export )?type\s+(\w+)"#, .type),
187|3a9a71|            // Enums (TypeScript)
188|5b99c6|            (#"^\s*(export )?enum\s+(\w+)"#, .enum),
189|6dc670|            // Const/Let/Var
190|6edc9a|            (#"^\s*(export )?(const|let|var)\s+(\w+)\s*="#, .variable),
191|5adad0|            // Methods in class
192|dfbfee|            (#"^\s*(static )?(async )?(\w+)\s*\(.*\)\s*\{"#, .method),
193|220505|        ]
194|d6ed84|        
195|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
196|3a36dc|            for (pattern, type) in patterns {
197|66048b|                if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []),
198|0483e7|                   let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)) {
199|dd2193|                    
200|6af780|                    let lastGroupIndex = match.numberOfRanges - 1
201|a2f8cd|                    guard lastGroupIndex > 0,
202|b5e457|                          let range = Range(match.range(at: lastGroupIndex), in: line) else { continue }
203|dd2193|                    
204|134a37|                    let name = String(line[range])
205|dd2193|                    
206|c06721|                    // Skip common keywords
207|98c79c|                    guard !["if", "else", "for", "while", "switch", "catch", "return"].contains(name) else { continue }
208|dd2193|                    
209|62536b|                    symbols.append(CodeSymbol(
210|e8eb2a|                        name: name,
211|dd7229|                        type: type,
212|35d8e4|                        line: lineIndex + 1,
213|6aead8|                        column: 1,
214|56d74d|                        detail: nil,
215|4b2c23|                        containerName: nil
216|c89922|                    ))
217|8dcb2c|                    break
218|4e2d32|                }
219|a7dc16|            }
220|5f3077|        }
221|d6ed84|        
222|1e442a|        return symbols
223|27e597|    }

228|08506f|        var symbols: [CodeSymbol] = []

230|d6ed84|

244|dd2193|

247|dd2193|

250|dd2193|

148|15666c|    private var activeIndex: Int? {
149|96ccb9|        guard let id = launchManager.activeConfigId else { return nil }
150|e59c67|        return launchManager.configs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == id })
151|27e597|    }
152|adc83b|
153|5228eb|    // MARK: - Bindings
154|adc83b|
155|5e456c|    private func binding(for idx: Int, keyPath: WritableKeyPath<LaunchConfig, String>) -> Binding<String> {
156|a532a8|        Binding(
157|f08f4e|            get: { launchManager.configs[idx][keyPath: keyPath] },
158|410163|            set: { newValue in
159|440add|                var updated = launchManager.configs[idx]
160|cd34a6|                updated[keyPath: keyPath] = newValue
161|a1b036|                launchManager.updateConfig(updated)
162|a7dc16|            }
163|3143a4|        )
164|27e597|    }
165|adc83b|
166|3dcc5c|    private func bindingOptionalString(for idx: Int, keyPath: WritableKeyPath<LaunchConfig, String?>) -> Binding<String> {
167|a532a8|        Binding(
168|05eb89|            get: { launchManager.configs[idx][keyPath: keyPath] ?? "" },
169|410163|            set: { newValue in
170|440add|                var updated = launchManager.configs[idx]
171|bf6c40|                let trimmed = newValue.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
172|205c23|                updated[keyPath: keyPath] = trimmed.isEmpty ? nil : trimmed
173|a1b036|                launchManager.updateConfig(updated)
174|a7dc16|            }
175|3143a4|        )
176|27e597|    }
177|adc83b|
178|87164a|    private func bindingRequest(for idx: Int) -> Binding<LaunchRequest> {
179|a532a8|        Binding(
180|fe7de8|            get: { launchManager.configs[idx].request },
181|410163|            set: { newValue in
182|440add|                var updated = launchManager.configs[idx]
183|00dbdc|                updated.request = newValue
184|a1b036|                launchManager.updateConfig(updated)
185|a7dc16|            }
186|3143a4|        )
187|27e597|    }
188|adc83b|
189|58adf6|    private func bindingArgsString(for idx: Int) -> Binding<String> {
190|a532a8|        Binding(
191|fd94fa|            get: {
192|082ad4|                (launchManager.configs[idx].args ?? []).joined(separator: " ")
193|12b7cc|            },
194|410163|            set: { newValue in
195|440add|                var updated = launchManager.configs[idx]
196|bf6c40|                let trimmed = newValue.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
197|0d1b81|                if trimmed.isEmpty {
198|12a3d5|                    updated.args = nil
199|fdd0e2|                } else {
200|b9e640|                    // Simple split: space-delimited.
201|b8dcff|                    updated.args = trimmed.split(whereSeparator: { $0 == " " || $0 == "\n" || $0 == "\t" }).map(String.init)
202|4e2d32|                }
203|a1b036|                launchManager.updateConfig(updated)
204|a7dc16|            }
205|3143a4|        )
206|27e597|    }
207|adc83b|
208|1efcd0|    private func bindingEnvString(for idx: Int) -> Binding<String> {
209|a532a8|        Binding(
210|fd94fa|            get: {
211|9727a5|                let env = launchManager.configs[idx].env ?? [:]
212|671cfc|                return env
213|9286de|                    .sorted(by: { $0.key < $1.key })
214|daab23|                    .map { "\($0.key)=\($0.value)" }
215|a10645|                    .joined(separator: "\n")
216|12b7cc|            },
217|410163|            set: { newValue in
218|440add|                var updated = launchManager.configs[idx]
219|6dde9a|                let lines = newValue
220|d7b240|                    .split(whereSeparator: { $0 == "\n" || $0 == "\r" })
221|dd0b81|                    .map { $0.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines) }
222|3556e7|                    .filter { !$0.isEmpty }
223|adc83b|
224|952560|                var env: [String: String] = [:]
225|0fa389|                for line in lines {
226|aa3f4b|                    let parts = line.split(separator: "=", maxSplits: 1).map(String.init)
227|01ff31|                    guard parts.count == 2 else { continue }
228|ec554d|                    env[parts[0]] = parts[1]
229|4e2d32|                }
230|adc83b|
231|dc8738|                updated.env = env.isEmpty ? nil : env
232|a1b036|                launchManager.updateConfig(updated)
233|a7dc16|            }
234|3143a4|        )
235|27e597|    }

404|27623f|    private var filteredCommands: [Command] {
405|93055c|        if searchText.isEmpty {
406|c6a1fd|            // Show recent commands first, then all commands
407|df481a|            let recentNames = Set(recentManager.recentCommands)
408|28414c|            let recent = allCommands.filter { recentNames.contains($0.name) }
409|af65a0|                .sorted { a, b in
410|d73b49|                    let aIdx = recentManager.recentCommands.firstIndex(of: a.name) ?? Int.max
411|3d02c9|                    let bIdx = recentManager.recentCommands.firstIndex(of: b.name) ?? Int.max
412|0688f6|                    return aIdx < bIdx
413|4e2d32|                }
414|c4a108|            let others = allCommands.filter { !recentNames.contains($0.name) }
415|4f9548|            return recent + others
416|5f3077|        }
417|d6ed84|        
418|babd96|        return allCommands
419|519b5d|            .compactMap { cmd -> (Command, Int)? in

421|024b84|                    return nil
422|4e2d32|                }
423|46f56b|                return (cmd, score)
424|a7dc16|            }
425|4a2f11|            .sorted { $0.1 > $1.1 }
426|ffcc79|            .map { $0.0 }
427|27e597|    }
