153|8e0c81|        dataSource: GitGutterDataSource = .default
154|981e04|    ) {
155|9bc9c2|        self.fileURL = fileURL
156|125068|        self.visibleLineRange = visibleLineRange
157|08bb85|        self.lineHeight = lineHeight
158|b7358f|        self.contentTopInset = contentTopInset
159|5f7310|        self.selectedLine = selectedLine
160|8b5203|        self.refreshToken = refreshToken
161|e62f56|        self.configuration = configuration
162|471eca|        self.dataSource = dataSource
163|27e597|    }
164|adc83b|
165|a2c94e|    public var body: some View {
166|250bf4|        HStack(spacing: 0) {
167|7e68b3|            if configuration.showsDiffIndicators {
168|d4e5d8|                diffGutter
169|09ce20|                    .frame(width: configuration.gutterWidth)
170|a7dc16|            }
171|adc83b|
172|3c96c0|            if configuration.showsInlineBlame {
173|316edd|                inlineBlameColumn
174|a7dc16|            }
175|5f3077|        }
176|622408|        // Reload when:
177|453b6c|        // - file changes
178|1cd8ae|        // - refreshToken changes (host signals content/git refresh)
179|661d58|        .task(id: fileURL) {
180|a01b72|            await reloadAll(force: true)
181|5f3077|        }
182|898172|        .task(id: refreshToken) {
183|a01b72|            await reloadAll(force: true)
184|5f3077|        }
185|27e597|    }
186|adc83b|
187|3b223e|    private var diffGutter: some View {
188|8eb6a2|        GeometryReader { _ in
189|f47dba|            Canvas { context, size in
190|f2e3c7|                guard !visibleLineRange.isEmpty else { return }
191|adc83b|
192|1d1279|                let w = size.width
193|6cfee9|                let corner = configuration.gutterCornerRadius
194|adc83b|
195|c4be89|                for line in visibleLineRange {
196|1a6571|                    if let kind = changesByLine[line] {
197|7acfe4|                        let y = contentTopInset + CGFloat(line - visibleLineRange.lowerBound) * lineHeight
198|398690|                        let rect = CGRect(x: 0, y: y, width: w, height: max(1, lineHeight))
199|3e9bba|                        let path = Path(roundedRect: rect, cornerRadius: corner)
200|d14140|                        context.fill(path, with: .color(color(for: kind)))
201|c9717a|                    }
202|adc83b|
203|d80c45|                    // Deleted markers are drawn as triangles at the boundary.
204|d77c52|                    if deletedMarkers.contains(line) {
205|7acfe4|                        let y = contentTopInset + CGFloat(line - visibleLineRange.lowerBound) * lineHeight
206|f6ef50|                        var p = Path()
207|9c8d93|                        p.move(to: CGPoint(x: 0, y: y))
208|6c103f|                        p.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: w, y: y + (lineHeight * 0.5)))
209|4b3b60|                        p.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: 0, y: y + lineHeight))
210|eef458|                        p.closeSubpath()
211|c248e0|                        context.fill(p, with: .color(configuration.deletedColor))
212|c9717a|                    }
213|4e2d32|                }
214|a7dc16|            }
215|5f3077|        }
216|160ee5|        .accessibilityLabel("Git diff gutter")
217|27e597|    }
218|adc83b|
219|674c96|    private var inlineBlameColumn: some View {
220|6cfec8|        ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
221|1bb412|            if let selectedLine,
222|42e193|               let blame = blameByLine[selectedLine],
223|c9b8d8|               visibleLineRange.contains(selectedLine) {
224|3b4316|                let y = contentTopInset + CGFloat(selectedLine - visibleLineRange.lowerBound) * lineHeight
225|adc83b|
226|c9d472|                inlineBlameLabel(for: blame)
227|dcef2f|                    .frame(maxWidth: configuration.inlineBlameMaxWidth, alignment: .leading)
228|6cd76a|                    .offset(x: configuration.inlineBlameLeadingPadding, y: y)
229|9459d4|                    .allowsHitTesting(false)
230|a7dc16|            }
231|5f3077|        }
232|4b367a|        .padding(.trailing, configuration.inlineBlameTrailingPadding)
233|cb4047|        .accessibilityLabel("Inline git blame")
234|27e597|    }
235|adc83b|
236|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
237|df7a5a|    private func inlineBlameLabel(for blame: GitBlameLine) -> some View {
238|c585c3|        let commitShort = String(blame.commit.prefix(8))
239|932efb|        let author = blame.author.isEmpty ? "Unknown" : blame.author
240|0dcb9b|        let summary = blame.summary
241|adc83b|
242|6cccbe|        Text("\(author) \(commitShort) — \(summary)")
243|d9ac71|            .font(configuration.inlineBlameFont)
244|2101a6|            .foregroundStyle(configuration.inlineBlameTextColor)
245|96ccb2|            .lineLimit(1)
246|e3b182|            .truncationMode(.tail)
247|ac06c9|            .padding(.horizontal, 8)
248|bc0fb8|            .padding(.vertical, 4)
249|93d9bd|            .background(configuration.inlineBlameBackground)
250|de21c1|            .clipShape(RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: configuration.inlineBlameCornerRadius, style: .continuous))
251|27e597|    }
252|adc83b|
253|2eb426|    private func color(for kind: GitLineChangeKind) -> Color {
254|01fe0f|        switch kind {
255|8680a4|        case .added: return configuration.addedColor
256|d8c6ba|        case .modified: return configuration.modifiedColor
257|dd8fc2|        case .deleted: return configuration.deletedColor
258|5f3077|        }
259|27e597|    }
260|adc83b|
261|1950d9|    // MARK: Reload
262|adc83b|
263|0fd45c|    @MainActor
264|fb91cc|    private func reloadAll(force: Bool) async {
265|6deaac|        // Diff
266|40a056|        if configuration.showsDiffIndicators {
267|71cc09|            do {
268|fca72e|                let diff = try await dataSource.diff(fileURL, force)
269|6e72ba|                var byLine: [Int: GitLineChangeKind] = [:]
270|9310cd|                var deletions: Set<Int> = []
271|adc83b|
272|fa601b|                for c in diff {
273|c2ffec|                    switch c.kind {
274|824c69|                    case .deleted:
275|590b9b|                        deletions.insert(max(1, c.line))
276|7f90ef|                    case .added, .modified:
277|7a4f96|                        byLine[c.line] = c.kind
278|c9717a|                    }
279|4e2d32|                }
280|adc83b|
281|d5e452|                self.changesByLine = byLine
282|e772d6|                self.deletedMarkers = deletions
283|91b9a2|            } catch {
284|f656f2|                self.changesByLine = [:]
285|cf3009|                self.deletedMarkers = []
286|a7dc16|            }
287|5f3077|        }
288|adc83b|
289|a72dc6|        // Blame
290|a8ee41|        if configuration.showsInlineBlame {
291|71cc09|            do {
292|1fac4c|                let blame = try await dataSource.blame(fileURL, force)
293|ba24de|                self.blameByLine = Dictionary(uniqueKeysWithValues: blame.map { ($0.line, $0) })
294|91b9a2|            } catch {
295|262f69|                self.blameByLine = [:]
296|a7dc16|            }
297|5f3077|        }
298|27e597|    }
299|b31277|}
300|adc83b|
301|ca292c|// MARK: - Minimal Git wrappers (CLI-backed)
302|adc83b|
303|3fdc54|private enum GitError: Error, LocalizedError {
304|ad379b|    case notARepository
305|cc3a27|    case commandFailed(String)
306|adc83b|
307|242b78|    var errorDescription: String? {
308|2e6d08|        switch self {
309|d6bd44|        case .notARepository:
310|c737e7|            return "Not a git repository"
311|84e7f9|        case .commandFailed(let msg):
312|97e6c2|            return "Git command failed: \(msg)"
313|5f3077|        }
314|27e597|    }
315|b31277|}
316|adc83b|
317|e83eda|private struct GitShell {
318|36bf91|    static func runGit(args: [String], in workingDirectory: URL) async throws -> String {
319|fb15d6|        #if os(macOS) || targetEnvironment(macCatalyst) || os(Linux)
320|c9b222|        return try await withCheckedThrowingContinuation { cont in
321|13023b|            let process = Process()
322|9dce62|            process.executableURL = URL(fileURLWithPath: "/usr/bin/env")
323|6980d1|            process.arguments = ["git"] + args
324|349037|            process.currentDirectoryURL = workingDirectory
325|adc83b|
326|440eab|            let outPipe = Pipe()
327|7e6031|            let errPipe = Pipe()
328|a6bd70|            process.standardOutput = outPipe
329|203afe|            process.standardError = errPipe
330|adc83b|
331|71cc09|            do {
332|eee8fb|                try process.run()
333|91b9a2|            } catch {
334|1d8745|                cont.resume(throwing: GitError.commandFailed("Unable to launch git"))
335|53ab34|                return
336|a7dc16|            }
337|adc83b|
338|2d3dad|            process.terminationHandler = { p in
339|ac2e77|                let outData = outPipe.fileHandleForReading.readDataToEndOfFile()
340|b22e9b|                let errData = errPipe.fileHandleForReading.readDataToEndOfFile()
341|adc83b|
342|b7139c|                let out = String(data: outData, encoding: .utf8) ?? ""
343|3079dc|                let err = String(data: errData, encoding: .utf8) ?? ""
344|adc83b|
345|4e1e82|                if p.terminationStatus == 0 {
346|a411dd|                    cont.resume(returning: out)
347|fdd0e2|                } else {
348|1759a5|                    let msg = err.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
349|4befeb|                    cont.resume(throwing: GitError.commandFailed(msg.isEmpty ? out : msg))
350|4e2d32|                }
351|a7dc16|            }
352|5f3077|        }
353|f6012e|        #else
354|459a57|        throw GitError.commandFailed("Git execution is not available on this platform")
355|6a3e13|        #endif
356|27e597|    }
357|adc83b|
358|ce4ef6|    static func repoRoot(containing fileURL: URL) async throws -> URL {
359|912523|        let dir = fileURL.deletingLastPathComponent()
360|1a9799|        let out = try await runGit(args: ["-C", dir.path, "rev-parse", "--show-toplevel"], in: dir)
361|fe3a8f|        let rootPath = out.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
362|58de76|        if rootPath.isEmpty { throw GitError.notARepository }
363|564829|        return URL(fileURLWithPath: rootPath)
364|27e597|    }
365|b31277|}
366|adc83b|
367|88bc2f|// MARK: - Diff
368|adc83b|
369|3ed794|private actor GitDiffService {
370|e143c5|    static let shared = GitDiffService()
371|adc83b|
372|d55783|    private var cache: [String: [GitLineChange]] = [:] // key: repoRoot + fileRelPath
373|adc83b|
374|348ef2|    func invalidate(forFile fileURL: URL) async {
375|4da690|        do {
376|a7d18f|            let repoRoot = try await GitShell.repoRoot(containing: fileURL)
377|c274c2|            let relPath = Self.relativePath(fileURL, repoRoot)
378|37ccff|            let key = repoRoot.path + "::" + relPath
379|5c07e2|            cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
380|853889|        } catch {
381|0ef52b|            // ignore
382|5f3077|        }
383|27e597|    }
384|adc83b|
385|5ad013|    func lineChanges(forFile fileURL: URL) async throws -> [GitLineChange] {
386|84184f|        let repoRoot = try await GitShell.repoRoot(containing: fileURL)
387|7cb904|        let relPath = Self.relativePath(fileURL, repoRoot)
388|471cce|        let key = repoRoot.path + "::" + relPath
389|adc83b|
390|04a632|        if let cached = cache[key] { return cached }
391|adc83b|
392|18475b|        // Unified=0 makes hunks contain only the changed lines, simplifying mapping.
393|471a19|        let diff = try await GitShell.runGit(
394|0211d7|            args: ["-C", repoRoot.path, "diff", "--unified=0", "--no-color", "--", relPath],
395|2f85ba|            in: repoRoot
396|3143a4|        )
397|adc83b|
398|cb6bb6|        let parsed = Self.parseUnifiedZeroDiff(diff)
399|fd7b4b|        cache[key] = parsed
400|4686f7|        return parsed
401|27e597|    }
402|adc83b|
403|7f38bd|    fileprivate static func relativePath(_ fileURL: URL, _ repoRoot: URL) -> String {
404|d34cf8|        let filePath = fileURL.standardizedFileURL.path
405|d236cb|        let rootPath = repoRoot.standardizedFileURL.path
406|87d341|        if filePath.hasPrefix(rootPath + "/") {
407|c8ae11|            return String(filePath.dropFirst(rootPath.count + 1))
408|5f3077|        }
409|231fb2|        return fileURL.lastPathComponent
410|27e597|    }
411|adc83b|
412|4ab2d0|    /// Parse output from: `git diff --unified=0 --no-color -- <file>`.
413|2cbc84|    ///
414|043652|    /// Heuristic classification per hunk:
415|e6cab5|    /// - oldCount==0,newCount>0 -> .added on new range
416|830185|    /// - oldCount>0,newCount>0 -> .modified on new range
417|d827b0|    /// - oldCount>0,newCount==0 -> .deleted marker at newStart
418|e30ee3|    private static func parseUnifiedZeroDiff(_ text: String) -> [GitLineChange] {
419|0c442a|        var results: [GitLineChange] = []
420|adc83b|
421|5283b2|        // Example hunk header (unified=0):
422|61ad0c|        // @@ -12,2 +12,3 @@
423|960d91|        // or @@ -12 +12 @@
424|53c1fb|        for raw in text.split(separator: "\n", omittingEmptySubsequences: false) {
425|338332|            let line = String(raw)
426|566e9f|            guard line.hasPrefix("@@"), let h = parseHunkHeader(line) else { continue }
427|adc83b|
428|ce5131|            if h.oldCount == 0 && h.newCount > 0 {
429|5447be|                for n in 0..<h.newCount {
430|c93a02|                    results.append(.init(line: h.newStart + n, kind: .added))
431|4e2d32|                }
432|688fe3|            } else if h.oldCount > 0 && h.newCount > 0 {
433|5447be|                for n in 0..<h.newCount {
434|9de390|                    results.append(.init(line: h.newStart + n, kind: .modified))
435|4e2d32|                }
436|b8c2f6|            } else if h.oldCount > 0 && h.newCount == 0 {
437|d2860f|                results.append(.init(line: max(1, h.newStart), kind: .deleted))
438|a7dc16|            }
439|5f3077|        }
440|adc83b|
441|877b21|        // De-dupe (prefer modified over added if collision).
442|d9be21|        var byLine: [Int: GitLineChangeKind] = [:]
443|9c02f9|        var deleted: Set<Int> = []
444|6ab11d|        for r in results {
445|b275dd|            switch r.kind {
446|e08d5d|            case .deleted:
447|22dea6|                deleted.insert(r.line)
448|0ad1c2|            case .added:
449|2faf5e|                if byLine[r.line] == nil { byLine[r.line] = .added }
450|909e67|            case .modified:
451|35bde7|                byLine[r.line] = .modified
452|a7dc16|            }
453|5f3077|        }
454|adc83b|
455|cbba29|        var merged: [GitLineChange] = []
456|8455c8|        for (line, kind) in byLine { merged.append(.init(line: line, kind: kind)) }
457|303285|        for d in deleted { merged.append(.init(line: d, kind: .deleted)) }
458|adc83b|
459|2c2d8a|        return merged.sorted { $0.line < $1.line }
460|27e597|    }
461|adc83b|
462|04b6a6|    private struct Hunk {
463|703f57|        var oldStart: Int
464|9021d9|        var oldCount: Int
465|5918d9|        var newStart: Int
466|c74eb3|        var newCount: Int
467|27e597|    }
468|adc83b|
469|c5499e|    private static func parseHunkHeader(_ header: String) -> Hunk? {
470|ba73ec|        // Header format: @@ -oldStart,oldCount +newStart,newCount @@ ...
471|7417bc|        // Counts may be omitted: -12 +12
472|ecf5bf|        guard let rangeStart = header.range(of: "@@") else { return nil }
473|7c0e7f|        guard let rangeEnd = header.range(of: "@@", options: [], range: rangeStart.upperBound..<header.endIndex) else { return nil }
474|8445bb|        let body = header[rangeStart.upperBound..<rangeEnd.lowerBound].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
475|adc83b|
476|d7518c|        let parts = body.split(separator: " ")
477|246d66|        guard parts.count >= 2 else { return nil }
478|adc83b|
479|305ea0|        func parsePart(_ s: Substring, prefix: Character) -> (Int, Int)? {
480|358d18|            guard s.first == prefix else { return nil }
481|f55934|            let rest = s.dropFirst()
482|66d2d2|            if let comma = rest.firstIndex(of: ",") {
483|8b33f9|                let a = rest[..<comma]
484|95dc6a|                let b = rest[rest.index(after: comma)...]
485|17c68e|                guard let start = Int(a), let count = Int(b) else { return nil }
486|08311d|                return (start, count)
487|f5a6eb|            } else {
488|104757|                guard let start = Int(rest) else { return nil }
489|b303d1|                return (start, 1)
490|a7dc16|            }
491|5f3077|        }
492|adc83b|
493|c2352c|        guard let old = parsePart(parts[0], prefix: "-") else { return nil }
494|868552|        guard let new = parsePart(parts[1], prefix: "+") else { return nil }
495|1713af|        return Hunk(oldStart: old.0, oldCount: old.1, newStart: new.0, newCount: new.1)
496|27e597|    }
497|b31277|}
498|adc83b|
499|a7cfe8|// MARK: - Blame
500|adc83b|
501|e87ea1|private actor GitBlameService {
502|0260b4|    static let shared = GitBlameService()
503|adc83b|
504|1e6b1d|    private var cache: [String: [GitBlameLine]] = [:] // key: repoRoot + fileRelPath
505|adc83b|
506|348ef2|    func invalidate(forFile fileURL: URL) async {
507|4da690|        do {
508|a7d18f|            let repoRoot = try await GitShell.repoRoot(containing: fileURL)
509|cefda3|            let relPath = GitDiffService.relativePath(fileURL, repoRoot)
510|37ccff|            let key = repoRoot.path + "::" + relPath
511|5c07e2|            cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
512|853889|        } catch {
513|0ef52b|            // ignore
514|5f3077|        }
515|27e597|    }
516|adc83b|
517|102596|    func blame(forFile fileURL: URL) async throws -> [GitBlameLine] {
518|84184f|        let repoRoot = try await GitShell.repoRoot(containing: fileURL)
519|be393e|        let relPath = GitDiffService.relativePath(fileURL, repoRoot)
520|471cce|        let key = repoRoot.path + "::" + relPath
521|adc83b|
522|04a632|        if let cached = cache[key] { return cached }
523|adc83b|
524|5df987|        let out = try await GitShell.runGit(
525|e1fef9|            args: ["-C", repoRoot.path, "blame", "--line-porcelain", "--", relPath],
526|2f85ba|            in: repoRoot
527|3143a4|        )
528|adc83b|
529|eb299c|        let parsed = Self.parseLinePorcelain(out)
530|fd7b4b|        cache[key] = parsed
531|4686f7|        return parsed
532|27e597|    }
533|adc83b|
534|5b8e3d|    private static func parseLinePorcelain(_ text: String) -> [GitBlameLine] {
535|df70a3|        // Format (porcelain):
536|d0babc|        // <sha> <origLine> <finalLine> <numLines>
537|fd523f|        // author <name>
538|407206|        // author-time <unix>
539|6d5fc5|        // summary <text>
540|ee16bf|        // ...
541|312b42|        // \t<source line>
542|47e69c|        // (then additional \t lines if <numLines> > 1)
543|adc83b|
544|ea5373|        var results: [GitBlameLine] = []
545|adc83b|
546|08428a|        var currentCommit: String = ""
547|6a21c1|        var currentAuthor: String = ""
548|edf098|        var currentAuthorTime: Date?
549|a1305c|        var currentSummary: String = ""
550|adc83b|
551|8b0ddd|        var pendingFinalLine: Int?
552|afb9b4|        var pendingRemaining: Int = 0
553|adc83b|
554|79246a|        func isHexString(_ s: Substring) -> Bool {
555|9e5fb7|            !s.isEmpty && s.allSatisfy { $0.isHexDigit }
556|5f3077|        }
557|adc83b|
558|1b00b6|        func emitOneLineIfPossible() {
559|0a458d|            guard pendingRemaining > 0,
560|99e082|                  let ln = pendingFinalLine,
561|56bbe2|                  !currentCommit.isEmpty else { return }
562|adc83b|
563|fd4da5|            results.append(
564|097c0e|                GitBlameLine(
565|6f7c36|                    line: ln,
566|26bf7c|                    commit: currentCommit,
567|3662a1|                    author: currentAuthor,
568|50c5da|                    authorTime: currentAuthorTime,
569|dd93dd|                    summary: currentSummary
570|6f642e|                )
571|43d041|            )
572|adc83b|
573|0b9ee3|            pendingFinalLine = ln + 1
574|c7cebe|            pendingRemaining -= 1
575|adc83b|
576|c83759|            if pendingRemaining == 0 {
577|f88042|                pendingFinalLine = nil
578|eba976|                currentCommit = ""
579|0d42dc|                currentAuthor = ""
580|0715f9|                currentAuthorTime = nil
581|33c8d7|                currentSummary = ""
582|a7dc16|            }
583|5f3077|        }
584|adc83b|
585|53c1fb|        for raw in text.split(separator: "\n", omittingEmptySubsequences: false) {
586|338332|            let line = String(raw)
587|adc83b|
588|251111|            if line.hasPrefix("\t") {
589|001c3e|                emitOneLineIfPossible()
590|1df510|                continue
591|a7dc16|            }
592|adc83b|
593|6aa6c7|            // Header line:
594|44d4c8|            // <sha> <origLine> <finalLine> <numLines>
595|ac0a66|            // (some variants may omit <numLines>; treat as 1)
596|cbc8d9|            let parts = line.split(separator: " ")
597|5ce5e6|            if parts.count >= 3,
598|8abcbe|               isHexString(parts[0]),
599|f49573|               Int(parts[1]) != nil,
600|f170d7|               let final = Int(parts[2]) {
601|f1b98a|                currentCommit = String(parts[0])
602|ab622d|                pendingFinalLine = final
603|189881|                pendingRemaining = (parts.count >= 4 ? Int(parts[3]) : nil) ?? 1
604|1df510|                continue
605|a7dc16|            }
606|adc83b|
607|77e2a1|            if line.hasPrefix("author ") {
608|d4a57a|                currentAuthor = String(line.dropFirst("author ".count))
609|6a62c8|            } else if line.hasPrefix("author-time ") {
610|4416ac|                let ts = String(line.dropFirst("author-time ".count))
611|39954c|                if let t = TimeInterval(ts) {
612|d16dcd|                    currentAuthorTime = Date(timeIntervalSince1970: t)
613|4e2d32|                }
614|f4e3fa|            } else if line.hasPrefix("summary ") {
615|a63d16|                currentSummary = String(line.dropFirst("summary ".count))
616|a7dc16|            }
617|5f3077|        }
618|adc83b|
619|e40d81|        return results.sorted { $0.line < $1.line }
620|27e597|    }
621|b31277|}
622|adc83b|

1|d755ba|import SwiftUI
2|9ed0a9|import UIKit
3|adc83b|
4|0adeb1|/// Renders inlay hints as subtle inline text inside the editor area.
5|63c993|///
6|04c3a6|/// This is a lightweight overlay that approximates text positions using monospaced font metrics.
7|26c713|struct InlayHintsOverlay: View {
8|ecd9df|    let code: String
9|a420bb|    let language: CodeLanguage
10|adc83b|
11|218c5c|    /// 0-based top visible line index.
12|7d4a7e|    let scrollPosition: Int
13|adc83b|
14|96ac71|    let lineHeight: CGFloat
15|82ae06|    let fontSize: CGFloat
16|adc83b|
17|956caf|    /// Width reserved for the gutter (line numbers).
18|3e269f|    var gutterWidth: CGFloat = 60
19|adc83b|
20|d08fb9|    /// Insets used by the underlying UITextView.
21|a34599|    var textInsets: UIEdgeInsets = UIEdgeInsets(top: 8, left: 8, bottom: 8, right: 8)
22|adc83b|
23|093d2d|    /// Width reserved at the right edge (e.g. minimap).
24|3d8943|    var rightReservedWidth: CGFloat = 0
25|adc83b|
26|65131d|    /// How many spaces a tab visually represents.
27|c77e62|    var tabSize: Int = 4
28|adc83b|
29|7e4b1c|    @State private var hints: [InlayHintsManager.InlayHint] = []
30|adc83b|
31|504e43|    var body: some View {
32|151fd5|        GeometryReader { geo in
33|fd8d27|            let font = UIFont.monospacedSystemFont(ofSize: fontSize, weight: .regular)
34|36c5e7|            let charWidth = (" " as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
35|1c711a|            let fontLineHeight = font.lineHeight
36|94577f|            let baselineAdjustment = max(0, (lineHeight - fontLineHeight) / 2)
37|20c353|            let maxVisibleLines = Int(ceil(geo.size.height / max(lineHeight, 1))) + 2
38|adc83b|
39|7ee956|            let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
40|adc83b|
41|8fd116|            ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
42|bfb2c3|                ForEach(hints) { hint in
43|d11cfb|                    if hint.line >= scrollPosition && hint.line <= (scrollPosition + maxVisibleLines) {
44|575bce|                        let lineText = (hint.line >= 0 && hint.line < lines.count) ? lines[hint.line] : ""
45|9bd59c|                        let visualColumn = visualColumn(in: lineText, utf16Column: hint.column, tabSize: tabSize)
46|adc83b|
47|54e15e|                        let x = gutterWidth + textInsets.left + (CGFloat(visualColumn) * charWidth)
48|0661b6|                        let y = textInsets.top + baselineAdjustment + (CGFloat(hint.line - scrollPosition) * lineHeight)
49|adc83b|
50|c03d5e|                        Text(hint.text)
51|281730|                            .font(.system(size: fontSize, design: .monospaced))
52|58afaa|                            .foregroundColor(Color.secondary.opacity(0.42))
53|52f453|                            .offset(x: x, y: y)
54|2fcb5e|                            .lineLimit(1)
55|d67542|                            .fixedSize(horizontal: true, vertical: false)
56|c9717a|                    }
57|4e2d32|                }
58|a7dc16|            }
59|28c929|            // Avoid drawing under minimap (or other right-side UI)
60|71aef5|            .frame(
61|e2cf1d|                width: max(0, geo.size.width - rightReservedWidth),
62|1b3c9d|                height: geo.size.height,
63|eab5e5|                alignment: .topLeading
64|43d041|            )
65|f9ebd1|            .clipped()
66|5f3077|        }
67|3fbfd2|        .allowsHitTesting(false)
68|b92cbc|        .onAppear { recompute() }
69|5086a1|        .onChange(of: code) { _ in recompute() }
70|49a675|        .onChange(of: language) { _ in recompute() }
71|27e597|    }
72|adc83b|
73|88a475|    private func recompute() {
74|88c74f|        hints = InlayHintsManager.shared.hints(for: code, language: language)
75|27e597|    }
76|adc83b|
77|211bd1|    private func visualColumn(in line: String, utf16Column: Int, tabSize: Int) -> Int {
78|397197|        let ns = line as NSString
79|0e6566|        let clamped = max(0, min(utf16Column, ns.length))
80|0b70a2|        let prefix = ns.substring(with: NSRange(location: 0, length: clamped))
81|adc83b|
82|a43b73|        var col = 0
83|955e8b|        for ch in prefix {
84|a3b6fb|            if ch == "\t" {
85|08173b|                col += tabSize
86|f5a6eb|            } else {
87|52486d|                col += 1
88|a7dc16|            }
89|5f3077|        }
90|a6794f|        return col
91|27e597|    }
92|b31277|}

3|adc83b|
4|8625a3|/// Renders inline ghost text suggestions with fade animations and multi-line support.
5|63c993|///
6|9961f5|/// This view displays AI-generated code suggestions as semi-transparent gray text
7|659a92|/// positioned at the cursor location. Users can accept suggestions with the Tab key.

9|047800|/// Features:

18|ecd9df|    let code: String
19|b4687f|

28|b4687f|    
29|bad761|    /// Font size used in the editor
30|82ae06|    let fontSize: CGFloat
31|b4687f|    
32|ab37f6|    /// Width reserved for the gutter (line numbers)
33|3e269f|    var gutterWidth: CGFloat = 60
34|b4687f|

37|b4687f|    
38|4e2f94|    /// Width reserved at the right edge (e.g. minimap)
39|3d8943|    var rightReservedWidth: CGFloat = 0
40|b4687f|    
41|32ad9b|    /// How many spaces a tab visually represents
42|c77e62|    var tabSize: Int = 4
43|b4687f|    
44|b90d71|    /// Animation duration for fade in/out
45|d225e9|    var animationDuration: Double = 0.15
46|b4687f|    
47|d37954|    /// The manager that provides suggestion state
48|c8b408|    @EnvironmentObject var suggestionManager: InlineSuggestionManager
49|b4687f|    
50|a37850|    /// Controls the visibility animation state
51|b15786|    @State private var isVisible: Bool = false
52|b4687f|    
53|8a129e|    /// The ghost text to display (filtered to show only unaccepted portion)

55|ff8344|        suggestionManager.ghostText
56|27e597|    }
57|b4687f|    
58|d8da6f|    /// Whether there is an active suggestion to display

61|27e597|    }

67|b4687f|    
68|504e43|    var body: some View {
69|151fd5|        GeometryReader { geo in

73|4e2d32|                }

80|f9ebd1|            .clipped()

85|5f3077|        }

87|cb50e4|            updateVisibility()
88|5f3077|        }

90|cb50e4|            updateVisibility()
91|5f3077|        }
92|27e597|    }
93|b4687f|    
94|85919d|    /// Renders the suggestion content with positioning and styling
95|c26dee|    private func suggestionContent(geometry geo: GeometryProxy) -> some View {
96|ed920c|        let font = UIFont.monospacedSystemFont(ofSize: fontSize, weight: .regular)
97|43ebbd|        let charWidth = (" " as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
98|59feda|        let fontLineHeight = font.lineHeight
99|ea096d|        let baselineAdjustment = max(0, (lineHeight - fontLineHeight) / 2)
100|d6ed84|        
101|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
102|d6ed84|        
103|80b58a|        // Calculate the starting position
104|6934f5|        let startX: CGFloat
105|e9ff05|        let startY: CGFloat
106|d6ed84|        
107|b5802a|        // Get the current line text up to cursor position
108|730f7f|        let currentLineIndex = min(cursorPosition.line, max(0, lines.count - 1))
109|35c41a|        let currentLine = lines.indices.contains(currentLineIndex) ? lines[currentLineIndex] : ""
110|d6ed84|        
111|93ba2b|        // Calculate visual column for current position
112|77a4fb|        let visualColumn = visualColumn(in: currentLine, utf16Column: cursorPosition.column, tabSize: tabSize)
113|d6ed84|        
114|4983a9|        // Calculate starting X position (gutter + insets + character offset)
115|d1c5d0|        startX = gutterWidth + textInsets.left + (CGFloat(visualColumn) * charWidth)
116|d6ed84|        
117|7897cf|        // Calculate starting Y position (adjusted for scroll)
118|0814d0|        let visibleLineIndex = currentLineIndex - scrollPosition
119|f19a68|        startY = textInsets.top + baselineAdjustment + (CGFloat(visibleLineIndex) * lineHeight)
120|d6ed84|        
121|350fae|        // Split ghost text into lines
122|4772c4|        let ghostLines = ghostText.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
123|d6ed84|        
124|a785f0|        return ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
125|ae9297|            // Render each line of the suggestion
126|8e84ef|            ForEach(Array(ghostLines.enumerated()), id: \.offset) { index, line in
127|88574d|                // For multi-line suggestions, only the first line starts at cursor X
128|cb3269|                // Subsequent lines start from the left margin
129|fe243b|                let xOffset: CGFloat = index == 0 ? startX : gutterWidth + textInsets.left
130|dfc569|                let yOffset: CGFloat = startY + (CGFloat(index) * lineHeight)
131|216278|                
132|82e751|                // For lines after the first, include a visual indicator that it's a continuation
133|5d3e01|                let displayText = line
134|216278|                
135|07bf08|                Text(displayText)
136|79caf1|                    .font(.system(size: fontSize, design: .monospaced))
137|2d7e53|                    .foregroundColor(Color.gray.opacity(0.6))
138|fadc71|                    .offset(x: xOffset, y: yOffset)
139|97a348|                    .lineLimit(1)
140|b95b7a|                    .fixedSize(horizontal: true, vertical: false)
141|a7dc16|            }
142|3070d1|            
143|fc71cc|            // Tab to accept indicator
144|5d10de|            tabIndicatorView(
145|a65881|                startX: startX,
146|63dc7c|                startY: startY,
147|2eda94|                ghostLines: ghostLines,
148|5aff54|                charWidth: charWidth,
149|2baa3b|                font: font
150|43d041|            )
151|5f3077|        }
152|42bd11|        .transition(
153|707be8|            .asymmetric(
154|0f8270|                insertion: .opacity.animation(.easeIn(duration: animationDuration)),
155|c2f996|                removal: .opacity.animation(.easeOut(duration: animationDuration))
156|43d041|            )
157|3143a4|        )
158|27e597|    }
159|b4687f|    
160|639f13|    /// Renders the "Tab to accept" indicator
161|ab8496|    private func tabIndicatorView(
162|53e652|        startX: CGFloat,
163|e0c064|        startY: CGFloat,
164|ff4216|        ghostLines: [String],
165|c15f5d|        charWidth: CGFloat,
166|8a49b8|        font: UIFont
167|0df0fe|    ) -> some View {
168|1da678|        // Calculate indicator position (below the suggestion or at the end of single line)
169|00151c|        let indicatorY: CGFloat
170|4a35f6|        let indicatorX: CGFloat
171|d6ed84|        
172|dfe58b|        if ghostLines.count > 1 {
173|75b141|            // For multi-line, show indicator at the end of last line
174|b4dd1a|            let lastLine = ghostLines.last ?? ""
175|027c9f|            let lastLineWidth = (lastLine as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
176|5724eb|            indicatorX = startX + lastLineWidth
177|d0348b|            indicatorY = startY + (CGFloat(ghostLines.count - 1) * lineHeight)
178|b31999|        } else {
179|13a025|            // For single line, show indicator at the end of the text
180|fc6f06|            let lineWidth = (ghostText as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
181|a4c799|            indicatorX = startX + lineWidth + 8 // Small gap after text
182|f294cf|            indicatorY = startY
183|5f3077|        }
184|d6ed84|        
185|3c25cc|        return HStack(spacing: 4) {
186|0977b8|            Image(systemName: "arrow.right.to.line")
187|c37787|                .font(.system(size: fontSize * 0.7))
188|3070d1|            
189|88d9d1|            Text("Tab")
190|105baa|                .font(.system(size: fontSize * 0.7, weight: .medium))
191|5f3077|        }
192|a358b9|        .foregroundColor(Color.gray.opacity(0.5))
193|7e0317|        .padding(.horizontal, 4)
194|44474c|        .padding(.vertical, 2)
195|413d6d|        .background(
196|ec701b|            RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 3)
197|d1a6ab|                .fill(Color.gray.opacity(0.1))
198|3143a4|        )
199|ac6737|        .offset(x: indicatorX, y: indicatorY + (lineHeight - font.lineHeight) / 2)
200|5ec87d|        .opacity(0.7)
201|27e597|    }
202|b4687f|    
203|5275c0|    /// Updates the visibility state with animation
204|7703e0|    private func updateVisibility() {
205|b4acfd|        let shouldBeVisible = hasSuggestion && isCursorVisible()
206|d6ed84|        
207|78528f|        if shouldBeVisible != isVisible {
208|c78858|            withAnimation(.easeInOut(duration: animationDuration)) {
209|42f9b7|                isVisible = shouldBeVisible
210|a7dc16|            }
211|5f3077|        }
212|27e597|    }
213|b4687f|    
214|547c79|    /// Checks if the cursor is currently visible in the viewport
215|5ce962|    private func isCursorVisible() -> Bool {
216|af7315|        let cursorLine = cursorPosition.line
217|b81434|        // Allow some margin for visibility (show if within viewport ± a few lines)
218|e9f34d|        let visibleRange = scrollPosition...(scrollPosition + 50) // Assuming ~50 visible lines
219|8fb6a3|        return visibleRange.contains(cursorLine)
220|27e597|    }
221|b4687f|    
222|76299b|    /// Calculates the visual column position accounting for tabs
223|211bd1|    private func visualColumn(in line: String, utf16Column: Int, tabSize: Int) -> Int {
224|397197|        let ns = line as NSString
225|0e6566|        let clamped = max(0, min(utf16Column, ns.length))
226|0b70a2|        let prefix = ns.substring(with: NSRange(location: 0, length: clamped))
227|d6ed84|        
228|a43b73|        var col = 0
229|955e8b|        for ch in prefix {
230|a3b6fb|            if ch == "\t" {
231|08173b|                col += tabSize
232|f5a6eb|            } else {
233|52486d|                col += 1
234|a7dc16|            }
235|5f3077|        }
236|a6794f|        return col
237|27e597|    }
238|b31277|}

27|fdd0e2|                } else {

35|5f3077|        }
36|928ed0|        .background(Color(UIColor.systemBackground))

39|27e597|    }

41|a0785b|    private func parseJSON() {
42|4da690|        do {
43|777356|            let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data, options: [])
44|3b1bbc|            rootNodes = parseRoot(json: json)
45|9f9457|            error = nil
46|853889|        } catch {
47|97a9c5|            self.error = error.localizedDescription
48|5f3077|        }
49|27e597|    }
50|b4687f|    
51|2461b2|    private func parseRoot(json: Any) -> [JSONNode] {
52|d812ee|        if let dict = json as? [String: Any] {
53|e582f3|            return dict.sorted(by: { $0.key < $1.key }).map { createNode(key: $0.key, value: $0.value) }
54|8975ec|        } else if let array = json as? [Any] {
55|a73ee8|            return array.enumerated().map { createNode(key: "[\($0.offset)]", value: $0.element) }
56|b31999|        } else {
57|a555ad|            return [createNode(key: "root", value: json)]
58|5f3077|        }
59|27e597|    }
60|b4687f|    
61|4a82e1|    private func createNode(key: String, value: Any) -> JSONNode {
62|bc210e|        if let dict = value as? [String: Any] {
63|98783e|            let children = dict.sorted(by: { $0.key < $1.key }).map { createNode(key: $0.key, value: $0.value) }
64|c1c080|            return JSONNode(key: key, value: nil, children: children, isArray: false)
65|be90a5|        } else if let array = value as? [Any] {
66|bb5b24|            let children = array.enumerated().map { createNode(key: "[\($0.offset)]", value: $0.element) }
67|71cb52|            return JSONNode(key: key, value: nil, children: children, isArray: true)
68|b31999|        } else {
69|4dd598|            return JSONNode(key: key, value: value, children: nil, isArray: false)
70|5f3077|        }
71|27e597|    }
72|b31277|}

1|d755ba|import SwiftUI
2|adc83b|
3|03589a|/// VS Code–style minimap with:
4|5fe073|/// - syntax-colored tiny preview
5|5bfce3|/// - visible region overlay
6|cf270b|/// - tap/drag to scroll
7|fb91d0|/// - optional git diff indicators (added/modified/deleted)
8|ae571b|struct MinimapView: View {
9|8874d6|    // MARK: - External inputs
10|adc83b|
11|02a6c7|    let content: String
12|7b41a2|    /// Current scroll offset (read-only for display). Minimap FOLLOWS the editor, never fights it.
13|5b2177|    let scrollOffset: CGFloat
14|d36e69|    /// Visible viewport height (read-only for display)
15|fc661c|    let scrollViewHeight: CGFloat
16|3cf6d5|    let totalContentHeight: CGFloat
17|b4687f|    
18|34d0ce|    /// Callback when user taps/drags on minimap to request scroll. 
19|b8df2f|    /// Parent handles actual scrolling - prevents bidirectional binding jitter.
20|47929f|    var onScrollRequested: ((CGFloat) -> Void)? = nil
21|adc83b|
22|cc7b6f|    /// Optional indicators to render as thin bars on the left side of the minimap.
23|c6a8c4|    /// Note: call sites can ignore this (default empty) without breaking compilation.
24|3ba7ea|    var diffIndicators: [MinimapDiffIndicator] = []
25|adc83b|
26|208209|    /// Fixed width; height expands to the container.
27|1a0b8f|    var minimapWidth: CGFloat = 60
28|adc83b|
29|53a063|    // MARK: - Internal state
30|adc83b|
31|ac8322|    @State private var isInteracting: Bool = false
32|adc83b|
33|c21cd1|    // MARK: - Types
34|adc83b|
35|137b41|    struct MinimapDiffIndicator: Identifiable, Hashable {
36|c0497a|        enum Kind: Hashable {
37|a79dcd|            case added
38|8af095|            case modified
39|cb69e9|            case deleted
40|5f3077|        }
41|adc83b|
42|23a2ea|        var id = UUID()
43|6aa7bc|        /// 0-based line range in the current `content`.
44|d95bcf|        var lineRange: Range<Int>
45|f8a374|        var kind: Kind
46|adc83b|
47|3d3a20|        init(lineRange: Range<Int>, kind: Kind) {
48|e89f25|            self.lineRange = lineRange
49|95b8fc|            self.kind = kind
50|5f3077|        }
51|27e597|    }
52|adc83b|
53|af1d81|    // MARK: - View
54|adc83b|
55|504e43|    var body: some View {
56|09743e|        GeometryReader { geometry in
57|6c6044|            let size = geometry.size
58|67505f|            let minimapHeight = max(1, size.height)
59|d016c6|            let lines = content.split(separator: "\n", omittingEmptySubsequences: false)
60|b5c109|            let lineCount = max(lines.count, 1)
61|adc83b|
62|8fd116|            ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
63|91d0f9|                // Background
64|ff13e9|                Rectangle()
65|cf4d83|                    .fill(Color(white: 0.13))
66|adc83b|
67|7740da|                // Syntax-colored code preview
68|3ea772|                Canvas { context, canvasSize in
69|298c0d|                    drawMinimapPreview(
70|1f7e6d|                        in: &context,
71|b74251|                        size: canvasSize,
72|772dbe|                        lines: lines
73|1961a4|                    )
74|4e2d32|                }
75|f5dd09|                .allowsHitTesting(false)
76|adc83b|
77|8824ea|                // Git diff indicators (thin left bars)
78|7d2dc9|                diffIndicatorsLayer(
79|4bc8c6|                    minimapHeight: minimapHeight,
80|a9b8b7|                    lineCount: lineCount
81|6f642e|                )
82|f5dd09|                .allowsHitTesting(false)
83|adc83b|
84|0bdcc7|                // Visible region highlight
85|333140|                visibleRegionLayer(minimapHeight: minimapHeight)
86|9459d4|                    .allowsHitTesting(false)
87|a7dc16|            }
88|f21892|            .frame(width: minimapWidth, height: minimapHeight)
89|8f8d76|            .clipShape(Rectangle())
90|68d57d|            .contentShape(Rectangle())
91|5f0bc8|            // Click-to-scroll + drag scrolling (DragGesture(minDistance: 0) captures taps too)
92|55f9fc|            .gesture(
93|7269c2|                DragGesture(minimumDistance: 0, coordinateSpace: .local)
94|19c0f6|                    .onChanged { value in
95|8dc30f|                        isInteracting = true
96|b9e7bb|                        updateScroll(forMinimapY: value.location.y, minimapHeight: minimapHeight)
97|c9717a|                    }
98|2eb32e|                    .onEnded { _ in
99|9f3811|                        isInteracting = false
100|c9717a|                    }
101|43d041|            )
102|5f3077|        }
103|842b1f|        .frame(width: minimapWidth)
104|27e597|    }
105|adc83b|
106|c84905|    // MARK: - Layers
107|adc83b|
108|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
109|21f1b7|    private func visibleRegionLayer(minimapHeight: CGFloat) -> some View {
110|4f9cf2|        let height = visibleRegionHeight(minimapHeight: minimapHeight)
111|3dff0c|        let offset = visibleRegionOffset(minimapHeight: minimapHeight, visibleHeight: height)
112|adc83b|
113|d79b3d|        Rectangle()
114|fba873|            .fill(Color.accentColor.opacity(isInteracting ? 0.22 : 0.16))
115|18f111|            .overlay(
116|ff13e9|                Rectangle()
117|d8d8b2|                    .stroke(Color.accentColor.opacity(0.65), lineWidth: 1)
118|43d041|            )
119|8d8609|            .frame(width: minimapWidth, height: height)
120|ec4af8|            .offset(y: offset)
121|27e597|    }
122|adc83b|
123|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
124|e053f1|    private func diffIndicatorsLayer(minimapHeight: CGFloat, lineCount: Int) -> some View {
125|df88d3|        // VS Code minimap diff markers are thin and pinned to the left.
126|352402|        let barWidth: CGFloat = 2
127|adc83b|
128|eb7497|        // Guard against division by zero
129|dad1b1|        if lineCount > 0 {
130|82ebe9|            ForEach(diffIndicators) { indicator in
131|c4c9a2|                let startLine = max(0, min(indicator.lineRange.lowerBound, lineCount - 1))
132|d34bb2|                let endLineExclusive = max(startLine + 1, min(indicator.lineRange.upperBound, lineCount))
133|adc83b|
134|7e47a5|                let startY = (CGFloat(startLine) / CGFloat(max(lineCount, 1))) * minimapHeight
135|634593|                let endY = (CGFloat(endLineExclusive) / CGFloat(max(lineCount, 1))) * minimapHeight
136|13ec78|                let height = max(2, endY - startY)
137|adc83b|
138|ff13e9|                Rectangle()
139|41dcad|                    .fill(diffColor(for: indicator.kind).opacity(0.95))
140|81c659|                    .frame(width: barWidth, height: height)
141|72358e|                    .offset(x: 0, y: startY)
142|a7dc16|            }
143|5f3077|        }
144|27e597|    }
145|adc83b|
146|906d12|    // MARK: - Visible region math
147|adc83b|
148|6919f3|    private func visibleRegionHeight(minimapHeight: CGFloat) -> CGFloat {
149|ff17e8|        guard totalContentHeight > 0 else { return 0 }
150|c5f520|        let ratio = scrollViewHeight / totalContentHeight
151|f9bc55|        return minimapHeight * min(max(ratio, 0), 1.0)
152|27e597|    }
153|adc83b|
154|ee5041|    private func visibleRegionOffset(minimapHeight: CGFloat, visibleHeight: CGFloat) -> CGFloat {
155|7da55c|        let scrollable = max(0, totalContentHeight - scrollViewHeight)
156|45fee0|        guard scrollable > 0 else { return 0 }
157|adc83b|
158|e13930|        let scrollRatio = min(max(scrollOffset / scrollable, 0), 1.0)
159|7c51ab|        return scrollRatio * max(0, minimapHeight - visibleHeight)
160|27e597|    }
161|adc83b|
162|04759d|    // MARK: - Interaction
163|adc83b|
164|7ef7ff|    /// Requests scroll so that the main editor's visible region is centered around the minimap Y position.
165|783b1d|    /// Uses callback to parent - minimap never directly controls editor scroll (prevents jitter).
166|92b230|    private func updateScroll(forMinimapY yPosition: CGFloat, minimapHeight: CGFloat) {
167|78fab1|        guard totalContentHeight > 0 else { return }
168|dac0ba|        guard let onScrollRequested = onScrollRequested else { return }
169|adc83b|
170|783533|        let clampedY = max(0, min(yPosition, minimapHeight))
171|89fa92|        let ratio = (minimapHeight > 0) ? (clampedY / minimapHeight) : 0
172|adc83b|
173|e4e280|        // Target a center position (VS Code behavior).
174|3b7590|        let targetCenter = ratio * totalContentHeight
175|b9ce99|        let desiredOffset = targetCenter - (scrollViewHeight / 2)
176|adc83b|
177|5b5c2d|        let maxOffset = max(0, totalContentHeight - scrollViewHeight)
178|6a7c82|        let newOffset = min(max(desiredOffset, 0), maxOffset)
179|d6ed84|        
180|73b1e7|        // Request scroll via callback - parent controls the actual scroll
181|f186d0|        onScrollRequested(newOffset)
182|27e597|    }
183|adc83b|
184|57db31|    // MARK: - Rendering (Canvas)
185|adc83b|
186|ddfd07|    private func drawMinimapPreview(
187|1dbb0f|        in context: inout GraphicsContext,
188|8ae978|        size: CGSize,
189|e54bca|        lines: [Substring]
190|981e04|    ) {
191|c96a6f|        let paddingX: CGFloat = 4
192|435081|        let paddingY: CGFloat = 2
193|adc83b|
194|c711e9|        let contentWidth = max(0, size.width - (paddingX * 2))
195|6c41d9|        let contentHeight = max(0, size.height - (paddingY * 2))
196|adc83b|
197|82f19e|        guard contentWidth > 0, contentHeight > 0 else { return }
198|adc83b|
199|ad5ba7|        let lineCount = max(lines.count, 1)
200|d6ed84|        
201|02e15c|        // FIXED: Use fixed pixels per line (VS Code style) instead of stretching to fill
202|54f182|        // This ensures the minimap always shows a tiny preview regardless of file size
203|3065bb|        let targetPixelsPerLine: CGFloat = 2.5
204|7dd91a|        let pixelsPerLine = targetPixelsPerLine
205|d6ed84|        
206|9b2a64|        // Calculate how many lines we can show in the minimap
207|3e694e|        let visibleLines = Int(contentHeight / pixelsPerLine)
208|d6ed84|        
209|1d6fd4|        // Calculate scroll offset to show the right portion of the document
210|91f804|        // Use scrollOffset and totalContentHeight to calculate current position
211|738fb2|        let scrollRatio = totalContentHeight > 0 ? Double(scrollOffset) / Double(max(totalContentHeight - scrollViewHeight, 1)) : 0
212|5d3dc8|        let startLine = max(0, Int(scrollRatio * Double(max(0, lineCount - visibleLines))))
213|adc83b|
214|03dc30|        // Token-block mode (colored rectangles) - VS Code style minimap
215|200364|        let minBarHeight: CGFloat = 1
216|f6b381|        let barHeight = max(minBarHeight, pixelsPerLine)
217|adc83b|
218|d1e35f|        // Approximate "characters" across minimap width.
219|26fc02|        let maxChars: CGFloat = 120
220|64e37a|        let charWidth = contentWidth / maxChars
221|adc83b|
222|dd472a|        // Render lines starting from startLine (scrolls with document)
223|8082c0|        let endLine = min(startLine + visibleLines + 1, lineCount)
224|d6ed84|        
225|5be8fa|        // Guard against invalid range (endLine must be >= startLine)
226|4957c8|        guard endLine >= startLine else { return }
227|d6ed84|        
228|714e33|        for i in startLine..<endLine {
229|794e26|            let displayIndex = i - startLine
230|82adeb|            let y = paddingY + (CGFloat(displayIndex) * pixelsPerLine)
231|db9e6f|            if y > size.height { break }
232|adc83b|
233|87a58d|            let line = lines.indices.contains(i) ? lines[i] : Substring("")
234|1922e4|            let tokens = tokenize(line)
235|adc83b|
236|ed9464|            var x = paddingX
237|4f7785|            let yAligned = y.rounded(FloatingPointRoundingRule.down)
238|adc83b|
239|993665|            if tokens.isEmpty {
240|e53354|                // Render faint whitespace line.
241|852310|                let rect = CGRect(x: x, y: yAligned, width: max(4, contentWidth * 0.15), height: barHeight)
242|afc890|                context.fill(Path(rect), with: .color(Color(white: 0.45).opacity(0.10)))
243|1df510|                continue
244|a7dc16|            }
245|adc83b|
246|3f8f53|            for token in tokens {
247|0ef518|                guard x < (paddingX + contentWidth) else { break }
248|6f9f42|                let w = max(1, CGFloat(token.text.count) * charWidth)
249|4a0a54|                let rect = CGRect(x: x, y: yAligned, width: min(w, paddingX + contentWidth - x), height: barHeight)
250|0a74f9|                context.fill(Path(rect), with: .color(token.color.opacity(0.80)))
251|354777|                x += w
252|a7dc16|            }
253|5f3077|        }
254|27e597|    }
255|adc83b|
256|3b9c43|    // MARK: - Syntax highlighting (lightweight)
257|adc83b|
258|342387|    private struct Token {
259|2ac01d|        enum Kind {
260|566b1c|            case plain
261|5d29ef|            case keyword
262|0603c2|            case string
263|d9fad7|            case comment
264|efbbfd|            case number
265|6e9645|            case typeName
266|5f3077|        }
267|adc83b|
268|f051aa|        var text: Substring
269|f8a374|        var kind: Kind
270|adc83b|
271|b98be5|        var color: Color {
272|157398|            switch kind {
273|706e3d|            case .plain:
274|7f1b9e|                return Color(white: 0.70)
275|b19882|            case .keyword:
276|5f4852|                return Color(red: 0.78, green: 0.53, blue: 0.95) // purple-ish
277|b4c397|            case .string:
278|964852|                return Color(red: 0.80, green: 0.72, blue: 0.43) // yellow-ish
279|3ded9b|            case .comment:
280|37e86a|                return Color(red: 0.46, green: 0.60, blue: 0.50) // green-ish
281|fea990|            case .number:
282|c38f5f|                return Color(red: 0.40, green: 0.73, blue: 0.92) // blue-ish
283|2c017e|            case .typeName:
284|5585ef|                return Color(red: 0.45, green: 0.83, blue: 0.70) // teal-ish
285|a7dc16|            }
286|5f3077|        }
287|27e597|    }
288|adc83b|
289|10bee9|    private func makeAttributedLine(from line: Substring, fontSize: CGFloat) -> AttributedString {
290|a59ad5|        let tokens = tokenize(line)
291|adc83b|
292|1b63ae|        var out = AttributedString()
293|09ef1f|        for token in tokens {
294|d1233d|            var chunk = AttributedString(String(token.text))
295|9befb1|            chunk.font = .system(size: fontSize, weight: .regular, design: .monospaced)
296|97f23a|            chunk.foregroundColor = token.color
297|af1a00|            out.append(chunk)
298|5f3077|        }
299|adc83b|
300|d11742|        if out.characters.isEmpty {
301|e5b85c|            // Preserve a tiny amount of "whitespace presence" so empty lines still show.
302|9dd08f|            var chunk = AttributedString(" ")
303|9befb1|            chunk.font = .system(size: fontSize, weight: .regular, design: .monospaced)
304|8cb2a3|            chunk.foregroundColor = Color(white: 0.7).opacity(0.25)
305|af1a00|            out.append(chunk)
306|5f3077|        }
307|adc83b|
308|9231ab|        return out
309|27e597|    }
310|adc83b|
311|4abcd7|    private func tokenize(_ line: Substring) -> [Token] {
312|f0a25f|        // Extremely lightweight tokenizer:
313|6188fb|        // - full-line comment if first non-space is # (python-like)
314|de2ec8|        // - inline comment starting at //
315|0a0697|        // - strings in "..." or '...'
316|efb1f5|        // - numbers
317|23cdc0|        // - keywords
318|43ec2e|        // - PascalCase tokens treated as type names
319|39dd2a|        var tokens: [Token] = []
320|3d99ce|        var i = line.startIndex
321|adc83b|
322|600872|        func peek(_ offset: Int = 0) -> Character? {
323|34ecda|            var idx = i
324|c6ee90|            for _ in 0..<offset {
325|2838dc|                guard idx < line.endIndex else { return nil }
326|306cea|                idx = line.index(after: idx)
327|a7dc16|            }
328|5bdcc9|            return idx < line.endIndex ? line[idx] : nil
329|5f3077|        }
330|adc83b|
331|5ea689|        func advance(_ n: Int = 1) {
332|293115|            for _ in 0..<n {
333|42c484|                guard i < line.endIndex else { return }
334|10bf0b|                i = line.index(after: i)
335|a7dc16|            }
336|5f3077|        }
337|adc83b|
338|80ae1a|        // Detect python/shebang-like comment lines: first non-whitespace is '#'
339|5015b2|        if let firstNonSpace = line.firstIndex(where: { !$0.isWhitespace }),
340|fc3e36|           line[firstNonSpace] == "#" {
341|a7cd18|            tokens.append(Token(text: line[line.startIndex..<line.endIndex], kind: .comment))
342|41c689|            return tokens
343|5f3077|        }
344|adc83b|
345|544fab|        while i < line.endIndex {
346|7e4e40|            let ch = line[i]
347|adc83b|
348|40eeea|            // Inline comment: //
349|8fbe15|            if ch == "/", peek(1) == "/" {
350|860932|                let range = i..<line.endIndex
351|b67a6a|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[range], kind: .comment))
352|23d68f|                return tokens
353|a7dc16|            }
354|adc83b|
355|41a694|            // Whitespace
356|76957e|            if ch.isWhitespace {
357|eae3bb|                let start = i
358|7f4f8a|                while i < line.endIndex, line[i].isWhitespace { advance() }
359|3f1e7d|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .plain))
360|1df510|                continue
361|a7dc16|            }
362|adc83b|
363|e53ff2|            // String literals
364|899c9c|            if ch == "\"" || ch == "'" {
365|9d8090|                let quote = ch
366|eae3bb|                let start = i
367|e2aa2f|                advance()
368|4ed8ff|                var escaped = false
369|3876db|                while i < line.endIndex {
370|9c755e|                    let c = line[i]
371|605f4e|                    if escaped {
372|cb9c8a|                        escaped = false
373|3f9321|                        advance()
374|e47242|                        continue
375|c9717a|                    }
376|7f8424|                    if c == "\\" {
377|37863a|                        escaped = true
378|3f9321|                        advance()
379|e47242|                        continue
380|c9717a|                    }
381|d1886f|                    if c == quote {
382|3f9321|                        advance()
383|28a64b|                        break
384|c9717a|                    }
385|7c96dd|                    advance()
386|4e2d32|                }
387|9305c9|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .string))
388|1df510|                continue
389|a7dc16|            }
390|adc83b|
391|bd52f1|            // Numbers
392|38cd36|            if ch.isNumber {
393|eae3bb|                let start = i
394|89de1b|                while i < line.endIndex, line[i].isNumber || line[i] == "." { advance() }
395|8480cb|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .number))
396|1df510|                continue
397|a7dc16|            }
398|adc83b|
399|1b4cce|            // Identifiers / keywords
400|181e74|            if ch.isLetter || ch == "_" {
401|eae3bb|                let start = i
402|e2aa2f|                advance()
403|3876db|                while i < line.endIndex {
404|9c755e|                    let c = line[i]
405|e225c5|                    if c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_" { advance() } else { break }
406|4e2d32|                }
407|cd95c9|                let word = line[start..<i]
408|8aa092|                let kind: Token.Kind
409|adc83b|
410|08878f|                if isKeyword(word) {
411|74c41d|                    kind = .keyword
412|be7b6b|                } else if looksLikeTypeName(word) {
413|00ef8c|                    kind = .typeName
414|fdd0e2|                } else {
415|d46347|                    kind = .plain
416|4e2d32|                }
417|adc83b|
418|d43ef3|                tokens.append(Token(text: word, kind: kind))
419|1df510|                continue
420|a7dc16|            }
421|adc83b|
422|612c55|            // Operators / punctuation
423|953483|            let start = i
424|acf00b|            advance()
425|f768b8|            tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .plain))
426|5f3077|        }
427|adc83b|
428|50a443|        return tokens
429|27e597|    }
430|adc83b|
431|3facb7|    private func isKeyword(_ word: Substring) -> Bool {
432|c4f25e|        // Small superset of common Swift/JS/Python keywords.
433|b2b9d9|        // (We can't depend on a full parser here.)
434|396c95|        let keywords: Set<String> = [
435|9af6d0|            "import", "export", "from", "as",
436|dbd304|            "struct", "class", "enum", "protocol", "extension", "func", "var", "let",
437|bd4ed1|            "if", "else", "for", "while", "repeat", "switch", "case", "default",
438|e351bd|            "break", "continue", "return", "throw", "throws", "try", "catch",
439|b9f132|            "do", "in", "where", "guard", "defer",
440|511559|            "public", "private", "fileprivate", "internal", "open",
441|12dd92|            "static", "final", "override", "mutating", "nonmutating",
442|91d838|            "async", "await",
443|6f6f8c|            "true", "false", "nil",
444|0cf8cf|            "self", "super",
445|e39cc4|            // JS/Python-ish
446|ad9513|            "const", "function", "async", "await", "new", "this",
447|1c9b9e|            "def", "pass", "lambda", "None"
448|220505|        ]
449|0da584|        return keywords.contains(String(word))
450|27e597|    }
451|adc83b|
452|e0492d|    private func looksLikeTypeName(_ word: Substring) -> Bool {
453|ce64a9|        // Simple heuristic: PascalCase (leading uppercase).
454|bbf2da|        guard let first = word.first else { return false }
455|248546|        return first.isUppercase
456|27e597|    }
457|adc83b|
458|e2a5f4|    // MARK: - Diff colors
459|adc83b|
460|af35e5|    private func diffColor(for kind: MinimapDiffIndicator.Kind) -> Color {
461|01fe0f|        switch kind {
462|e91923|        case .added:
463|97b08e|            return Color.green
464|1a0dfa|        case .modified:
465|a71900|            return Color.red
466|4fc3e2|        case .deleted:
467|7296db|            // VS Code uses red-ish for deletions too; keep distinct via slightly different tone.
468|c59220|            return Color(red: 1.0, green: 0.35, blue: 0.35)
469|5f3077|        }
470|27e597|    }
471|b31277|}
472|adc83b|

39|ff14b9|    private let secondarySelectionColor = UIColor.systemCyan.withAlphaComponent(0.25)

55|aff961|    private func setupCursorBlinking() {
56|2c9899|        blinkTimer = Timer.scheduledTimer(withTimeInterval: 0.5, repeats: true) { [weak self] _ in
57|7b2278|            self?.cursorVisible.toggle()

67|0532f5|    /// Updates the display of all cursors and selections
68|5f61b8|    func updateCursorDisplay() {
69|1b261a|        // Remove existing cursor and selection layers
70|36b44e|        cursorLayers.forEach { $0.removeFromSuperlayer() }
71|bb580b|        cursorLayers.removeAll()
72|a50cf9|        selectionLayers.forEach { $0.removeFromSuperlayer() }
73|582ae4|        selectionLayers.removeAll()
74|adc83b|
75|2ffb0a|        guard let editorCore = editorCore else { return }
76|15f135|        let cursors = editorCore.multiCursorState.cursors
77|adc83b|
78|a202cd|        // Only show additional cursors if we have multiple
79|71f1cc|        guard cursors.count > 1 else { return }
80|adc83b|
81|72ad69|        // Draw each cursor (skip the primary one as UITextView handles it)

83|933ac1|            // Draw selection if present
84|94aef6|            if let selectionRange = cursor.selectionRange {
85|1d74b0|                drawSelection(for: selectionRange, isPrimary: cursor.isPrimary, index: index)
86|a7dc16|            }
87|adc83b|
88|c6cef0|            // Draw cursor line (skip primary cursor as system handles it)
89|bb0725|            if !cursor.isPrimary {
90|a10f1a|                drawCursor(at: cursor.position, isPrimary: false, index: index)
91|a7dc16|            }
92|5f3077|        }
93|27e597|    }

95|eb46c0|    private func drawCursor(at position: Int, isPrimary: Bool, index: Int) {
96|11ce2b|        guard let textPosition = self.position(from: beginningOfDocument, offset: position) else { return }
97|adc83b|
98|b34ecc|        let caretRect = self.caretRect(for: textPosition)
99|adc83b|
100|037254|        let cursorLayer = CALayer()
101|dc404a|        cursorLayer.backgroundColor = (isPrimary ? cursorColor : secondaryCursorColor).cgColor
102|66be0e|        cursorLayer.frame = CGRect(
103|0270b6|            x: caretRect.origin.x,
104|b56626|            y: caretRect.origin.y,
105|122136|            width: cursorWidth,
106|2f842a|            height: caretRect.height
107|3143a4|        )
108|8e5363|        cursorLayer.cornerRadius = 1
109|adc83b|
110|06cd55|        layer.addSublayer(cursorLayer)
111|6fd09e|        cursorLayers.append(cursorLayer)
112|27e597|    }
113|adc83b|
114|5a5008|    private func drawSelection(for range: NSRange, isPrimary: Bool, index: Int) {
115|2605b5|        guard let start = position(from: beginningOfDocument, offset: range.location),
116|cc2d91|              let end = position(from: beginningOfDocument, offset: range.location + range.length),
117|da2a96|              let textRange = self.textRange(from: start, to: end) else { return }
118|adc83b|
119|5d8027|        let selectionRects = selectionRects(for: textRange)
120|adc83b|
121|127303|        for rect in selectionRects {
122|433f1e|            let selectionLayer = CALayer()
123|f562d1|            selectionLayer.backgroundColor = (isPrimary ? selectionColor : secondarySelectionColor).cgColor
124|ce165e|            selectionLayer.frame = rect.rect
125|adc83b|
126|6930ca|            // Insert behind text
127|dc1f87|            if let textLayer = layer.sublayers?.first {
128|2b2195|                layer.insertSublayer(selectionLayer, below: textLayer)
129|f5a6eb|            } else {
130|1777fc|                layer.addSublayer(selectionLayer)
131|a7dc16|            }
132|6cbf28|            selectionLayers.append(selectionLayer)
133|5f3077|        }
134|27e597|    }

141|bedc41|            super.insertText(text)

144|adc83b|
145|a67855|        // Handle multi-cursor insert

148|adc83b|

151|982b63|        self.text = content

155|fad62a|            selectedTextRange = textRange(from: newPosition, to: newPosition)
156|5f3077|        }
157|adc83b|
158|00b42f|        // Trigger text change notification

160|adc83b|

164|6853f8|    override func deleteBackward() {

174|adc83b|

231|bf8abf|        // NOTE: Cmd+G (Go to Line) is in GoMenuCommands.swift
232|adc83b|

234|7ebe25|        // This is editor-specific and NOT a menu command

239|e045cf|            modifierFlags: []

241|adc83b|
242|abb5c6|        return commands
243|27e597|    }

41|3070d1|

45|d79a18|                    .padding(8)

55|c6bfb2|                .stroke(Color.blue, lineWidth: 1)
56|3143a4|        )

62|b4687f|    
63|3e588a|    private func loadContent() {
64|cb87f9|        // Extract context: 5 lines before, definition, 5 lines after
65|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
66|43159b|        guard !lines.isEmpty else {
67|02e9b0|            attributedContent = NSAttributedString(string: "// Empty file")
68|bef5d6|            return
69|5f3077|        }
70|d6ed84|        
71|69e4fd|        // Clamp targetLine to valid range first to prevent inverted bounds
72|4aab10|        let safeTargetLine = min(max(0, targetLine), lines.count - 1)
73|a55883|        let startLine = max(0, safeTargetLine - 5)
74|7f5161|        let endLine = min(lines.count - 1, safeTargetLine + 5)
75|d6ed84|        
76|65df53|        // Safety check: ensure valid range (startLine <= endLine)
77|29c2b5|        guard startLine <= endLine else {
78|b64281|            attributedContent = NSAttributedString(string: "// Line out of range")
79|bef5d6|            return
80|5f3077|        }
81|d6ed84|        
82|b71f09|        let contextLines = lines[startLine...endLine]
83|5477c1|        let contextString = contextLines.joined(separator: "\n")
84|d6ed84|        
85|eff2fc|        // Highlight
86|865eb0|        let highlighter = VSCodeSyntaxHighlighter(theme: ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme)
87|f7ffd6|        attributedContent = highlighter.highlight(contextString, filename: targetFile)
88|27e597|    }
89|b31277|}
90|adc83b|
91|32f12e|// Extension to support specific border sides
92|cbdbb5|extension View {
93|962d7b|    func border(width: CGFloat, edges: [Edge], color: Color) -> some View {
94|ad2e00|        overlay(EdgeBorder(width: width, edges: edges).foregroundColor(color))
95|27e597|    }
96|b31277|}
97|adc83b|
98|acc513|struct EdgeBorder: Shape {
99|8bfe59|    var width: CGFloat
100|a1903d|    var edges: [Edge]
101|adc83b|
102|aba5af|    func path(in rect: CGRect) -> Path {
103|4cfee1|        var path = Path()
104|7312e1|        for edge in edges {
105|d704c2|            var x: CGFloat { edge == .trailing ? rect.width - width : 0 }
106|942655|            var y: CGFloat { edge == .bottom ? rect.height - width : 0 }
107|ef3ff0|            var w: CGFloat { edge == .leading || edge == .trailing ? width : rect.width }
108|4b861a|            var h: CGFloat { edge == .top || edge == .bottom ? width : rect.height }
109|046431|            path.addRect(CGRect(x: x, y: y, width: w, height: h))
110|5f3077|        }
111|2a6f12|        return path
112|27e597|    }

101|d6ed84|

113|d6ed84|

126|d6ed84|

128|27e597|    }

130|2b113b|    func updateUIView(_ textView: TextView, context: Context) {
131|6bce46|        // Update coordinator's parent reference for current bindings
132|aa6fd6|        context.coordinator.parent = self
133|d6ed84|        
134|fa3f7d|        // Update theme if changed
135|462091|        let currentThemeId = ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme.id
136|173529|        if context.coordinator.lastThemeId != currentThemeId {
137|0ae3b4|            context.coordinator.lastThemeId = currentThemeId
138|cd161e|            textView.theme = makeRunestoneTheme()
139|2c8fb7|            textView.backgroundColor = UIColor(ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme.editorBackground)
140|5f3077|        }
141|d6ed84|        
142|c11584|        // Update font size if changed
143|0d6968|        if context.coordinator.lastFontSize != fontSize {
144|ad902d|            context.coordinator.lastFontSize = fontSize
145|cd161e|            textView.theme = makeRunestoneTheme()
146|5f3077|        }
147|d6ed84|        
148|783a16|        // Line numbers always disabled - using custom LineNumbers gutter
149|be78cc|        // Word wrap toggle still works
150|8e7477|        if textView.isLineWrappingEnabled != wordWrapEnabled {
151|ed0ffc|            textView.isLineWrappingEnabled = wordWrapEnabled
152|5f3077|        }
153|d6ed84|        
154|26756b|        // CRITICAL: Only call setState() when safe (not during active editing)
155|e2bb7b|        // Calling setState() during editing corrupts Runestone's lineManager
156|092fab|        // and causes crash at TextEditHelper.swift:27 (force unwrap on linePosition)
157|d6ed84|        
158|a43f62|        let isFileSwitching = context.coordinator.lastFilename != filename
159|d8aa68|        let currentText = textView.text
160|5cc09d|        let textChanged = currentText != text
161|dbea58|        let isActivelyEditing = textView.isFirstResponder
162|d6ed84|        
163|317e91|        if isFileSwitching {
164|97906a|            // User switched to a different file - safe to call setState()
165|6db873|            context.coordinator.lastFilename = filename
166|a9199d|            context.coordinator.hasBeenEdited = false
167|3070d1|            
168|66a1a1|            if let language = getTreeSitterLanguage(for: filename) {
169|d00b5e|                let state = TextViewState(text: text, language: language)
170|d69a75|                textView.setState(state)
171|f5a6eb|            } else {
172|8d685d|                textView.text = text
173|a7dc16|            }
174|3070d1|            
175|80f64f|            // CRITICAL: Re-apply theme AFTER setState - setState may reset rendering state
176|cd161e|            textView.theme = makeRunestoneTheme()
177|3070d1|            
178|00d273|            // Reset cursor to start for new file
179|f89f38|            textView.selectedRange = NSRange(location: 0, length: 0)
180|3070d1|            
181|a6439c|            // Update line count
182|ebb427|            DispatchQueue.main.async {
183|b26907|                self.totalLines = self.countLines(in: text)
184|a7dc16|            }
185|8bc7f3|        } else if textChanged && !context.coordinator.hasBeenEdited && !isActivelyEditing && !context.coordinator.isUpdatingFromTextView {
186|016671|            // Text changed externally (e.g., initial load, external modification)
187|51a126|            // Safe to update since user hasn't started editing yet
188|66a1a1|            if let language = getTreeSitterLanguage(for: filename) {
189|d00b5e|                let state = TextViewState(text: text, language: language)
190|d69a75|                textView.setState(state)
191|f5a6eb|            } else {
192|8d685d|                textView.text = text
193|a7dc16|            }
194|3070d1|            
195|80f64f|            // CRITICAL: Re-apply theme AFTER setState - setState may reset rendering state
196|cd161e|            textView.theme = makeRunestoneTheme()
197|3070d1|            
198|a6439c|            // Update line count
199|ebb427|            DispatchQueue.main.async {
200|b26907|                self.totalLines = self.countLines(in: text)
201|a7dc16|            }
202|5f3077|        }
203|57fb66|        // If user HAS edited OR is actively editing, DO NOTHING
204|a3857b|        // Let the user's edits remain - don't corrupt the lineManager
205|27e597|    }

209|9607ec|    private func makeRunestoneTheme() -> RunestoneEditorTheme {

211|754683|        return RunestoneEditorTheme(

213|6fed03|            backgroundColor: UIColor(appTheme.editorBackground),
214|3ff577|            textColor: UIColor(appTheme.editorForeground),
215|25c8f7|            gutterBackgroundColor: UIColor(appTheme.editorBackground),
216|f59562|            gutterHairlineColor: UIColor(appTheme.lineNumber).withAlphaComponent(0.3),
217|69b115|            lineNumberColor: UIColor(appTheme.lineNumber),
218|761e46|            selectedLineBackgroundColor: UIColor(appTheme.currentLineHighlight),
219|253711|            selectedLinesLineNumberColor: UIColor(appTheme.lineNumberActive),
220|c74ad9|            selectedLinesGutterBackgroundColor: UIColor(appTheme.currentLineHighlight),
221|2f7e95|            invisibleCharactersColor: UIColor(appTheme.editorForeground).withAlphaComponent(0.3),
222|d7f152|            pageGuideHairlineColor: UIColor(appTheme.editorForeground).withAlphaComponent(0.1),
223|811607|            pageGuideBackgroundColor: UIColor(appTheme.editorBackground),
224|f4a737|            markedTextBackgroundColor: UIColor(appTheme.selection).withAlphaComponent(0.5),
225|8585f5|            keywordColor: UIColor(appTheme.keyword),
226|b3e17b|            stringColor: UIColor(appTheme.string),
227|7ff3fd|            numberColor: UIColor(appTheme.number),
228|a05855|            commentColor: UIColor(appTheme.comment),
229|2801b0|            functionColor: UIColor(appTheme.function),
230|12e112|            typeColor: UIColor(appTheme.type),
231|684aec|            variableColor: UIColor(appTheme.variable)
232|3143a4|        )
233|27e597|    }
234|b4687f|    
235|957540|    // MARK: - Language Mode Mapping
236|b4687f|    
237|70f3e8|    /// Gets the actual TreeSitter Language object for a given filename
238|f3a5e1|    /// Returns nil for plain text files (no syntax highlighting)
239|a4a35b|    private func getTreeSitterLanguage(for filename: String) -> Runestone.TreeSitterLanguage? {
240|98942b|        let ext = (filename as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
241|82335e|        let lastComponent = (filename as NSString).lastPathComponent.lowercased()
242|d6ed84|        
243|ab25ec|        // Special-case filenames without extensions
244|013551|        if lastComponent == "dockerfile" || lastComponent.hasPrefix("dockerfile.") {
245|274790|            return nil // Bash support not in package list yet
246|5f3077|        }
247|bf07fd|        if lastComponent == ".env" || lastComponent.hasPrefix(".env.") {
248|3e3e36|            return nil // Plain text
249|5f3077|        }
250|828d40|        if lastComponent == "makefile" || lastComponent == "gnumakefile" {
251|274790|            return nil // Bash support not in package list yet
252|5f3077|        }
253|4b7128|        if lastComponent == "podfile" || lastComponent == "gemfile" {
254|46c419|            return nil // Ruby support not in package list yet
255|5f3077|        }
256|0efae9|        if lastComponent == "package.json" || lastComponent == "tsconfig.json" {
257|4d9419|            return TreeSitterLanguage.json
258|5f3077|        }
259|d6ed84|        
260|f60e4e|        switch ext {
261|4c2810|        // Swift
262|1c8542|        case "swift":
263|376f7d|            return TreeSitterLanguage.swift
264|d6ed84|        
265|20fa65|        // JavaScript
266|cd5864|        case "js", "mjs", "cjs", "jsx":
267|fd14ee|            return TreeSitterLanguage.javaScript
268|d6ed84|        
269|194537|        // TypeScript - use JavaScript as fallback
270|a4d183|        case "ts", "mts", "cts", "tsx":
271|fd14ee|            return TreeSitterLanguage.javaScript
272|d6ed84|        
273|a87c1b|        // Python
274|85dfd3|        case "py", "pyw", "pyi":
275|4462da|            return TreeSitterLanguage.python
276|d6ed84|        
277|cd9e63|        // Go
278|ee50e6|        case "go":
279|44c0af|            return TreeSitterLanguage.go
280|d6ed84|        
281|fd611a|        // Rust
282|c28591|        case "rs":
283|9af65c|            return TreeSitterLanguage.rust
284|d6ed84|        
285|08c082|        // JSON
286|7aa37f|        case "json", "jsonc":
287|4d9419|            return TreeSitterLanguage.json
288|d6ed84|        
289|8aadd1|        // HTML
290|8f517a|        case "html", "htm", "xhtml":
291|d6b81f|            return TreeSitterLanguage.html
292|d6ed84|        
293|b0d395|        // CSS
294|c4efc3|        case "css", "scss":
295|27b343|            return TreeSitterLanguage.css
296|d6ed84|        
297|0fbfad|        // XML - use HTML as fallback
298|f580bd|        case "xml", "plist", "svg":
299|d6b81f|            return TreeSitterLanguage.html
300|d6ed84|        
301|c32a01|        // Default - no syntax highlighting
302|520b7d|        default:
303|1c8557|            return nil
304|5f3077|        }
305|27e597|    }

308|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
309|b4687f|    
310|6a2db5|    private func countLines(in text: String) -> Int {
311|ee3501|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return 1 }
312|c746a1|        var count = 1
313|48817a|        var index = text.startIndex
314|42136d|        while index < text.endIndex {
315|4396fc|            if text[index] == "\n" {
316|31d0c1|                count += 1
317|a7dc16|            }
318|3a0fcb|            index = text.index(after: index)
319|5f3077|        }
320|c7b6e6|        return count
321|27e597|    }
