324|b4687f|    
325|57fd33|    class Coordinator: NSObject, TextViewDelegate {
326|fe867f|        var parent: RunestoneEditorView
327|0bde9e|        weak var textView: TextView?
328|e0c082|        var isUpdatingFromTextView = false
329|d5e6db|        var lastFontSize: CGFloat = 14.0
330|df72ce|        var lastThemeId: String = ""
331|e181a1|        var currentLanguage: Language?
332|d6ed84|        
333|b93091|        // Track file identity to know when to call setState()
334|244df6|        var lastFilename: String = ""
335|82a9dc|        var hasBeenEdited: Bool = false
336|d6ed84|        
337|a814d3|        // Debounced text sync to avoid SwiftUI re-renders on every keystroke
338|aae740|        private var textSyncWorkItem: DispatchWorkItem?
339|8fda30|        private let debounceInterval: TimeInterval = 0.5 // 500ms
340|d6ed84|        
341|043ea2|        init(_ parent: RunestoneEditorView) {
342|12d237|            self.parent = parent
343|ffb0bd|            self.lastFontSize = parent.fontSize
344|3fc189|            self.lastThemeId = ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme.id
345|c8ef01|            self.lastFilename = parent.filename
346|5f3077|        }
347|d6ed84|        
348|788eb1|        deinit {
349|e504ad|            // Cancel any pending debounced updates
350|bc1cc6|            textSyncWorkItem?.cancel()
351|5f3077|        }
352|d6ed84|        
353|cc0795|        // MARK: - TextViewDelegate
354|d6ed84|        
355|b75d27|        func textViewDidChange(_ textView: TextView) {
356|02717e|            // Mark that user has edited - blocks setState() calls until file switch
357|f51822|            hasBeenEdited = true
358|3070d1|            
359|d2cd8b|            // Cancel any pending debounced update
360|bc1cc6|            textSyncWorkItem?.cancel()
361|3070d1|            
362|6966df|            // Create new debounced work item
363|36310e|            let workItem = DispatchWorkItem { [weak self] in
364|150252|                guard let self = self else { return }
365|84d674|                self.isUpdatingFromTextView = true
366|0ae33b|                defer { self.isUpdatingFromTextView = false }
367|216278|                
368|24c8b7|                // Update text binding (debounced - only after typing stops)
369|c75e92|                self.parent.text = textView.text
370|216278|                
371|416a60|                // Update line count
372|f143b8|                DispatchQueue.main.async {
373|d865ea|                    self.parent.totalLines = self.parent.countLines(in: textView.text)
374|4e2d32|                }
375|a7dc16|            }
376|3070d1|            
377|eaaa24|            // Schedule the update after debounce interval
378|587c05|            textSyncWorkItem = workItem
379|c3b6ab|            DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + debounceInterval, execute: workItem)
380|5f3077|        }
381|d6ed84|        
382|6a67c9|        /// Immediately sync text to SwiftUI binding (call on save/tab-switch)
383|a61f5c|        func syncTextImmediately() {
384|d2cd8b|            // Cancel any pending debounced update
385|bc1cc6|            textSyncWorkItem?.cancel()
386|3070d1|            
387|078830|            guard let textView = textView else { return }
388|3070d1|            
389|3f491a|            isUpdatingFromTextView = true
390|5485b2|            defer { isUpdatingFromTextView = false }
391|3070d1|            
392|6db6b0|            // Immediate sync
393|f9041f|            parent.text = textView.text
394|9b320f|            parent.totalLines = parent.countLines(in: textView.text)
395|5f3077|        }
396|d6ed84|        
397|49059d|        func textViewDidChangeSelection(_ textView: TextView) {
398|b59fde|            updateCursorPosition(in: textView)
399|5f3077|        }
400|d6ed84|

402|bb2790|            // Could be used for focus handling

404|d6ed84|        
405|40d063|        func textViewDidEndEditing(_ textView: TextView) {
406|bb2790|            // Could be used for focus handling

409|f6a64f|        func textView(_ textView: TextView, shouldChangeTextIn range: NSRange, replacementText text: String) -> Bool {
410|3f3964|            // Handle Tab key for autocomplete acceptance
411|6688de|            if text == "\t" {
412|f9c439|                if let onAccept = parent.onAcceptAutocomplete, onAccept() {
413|df59cf|                    return false
414|4e2d32|                }
415|a7dc16|            }
416|3070d1|            
417|cc3aa6|            // Handle Escape key for autocomplete dismissal
418|ce7885|            // Note: Escape key events are typically handled via key commands, not here
419|3070d1|            
420|40cfc4|            return true
421|5f3077|        }
422|d6ed84|        
423|fc84c5|        func scrollViewDidScroll(_ scrollView: UIScrollView) {
424|6c450e|            // Update scroll offset binding for gutter synchronization
425|ebb427|            DispatchQueue.main.async {
426|e41cd2|                self.parent.scrollOffset = scrollView.contentOffset.y
427|a7dc16|            }
428|5f3077|        }
429|d6ed84|        
430|f9574f|        // MARK: - Cursor Position Calculation
431|d6ed84|        
432|638123|        private func updateCursorPosition(in textView: TextView) {
433|e844dd|            let selectedRange = textView.selectedRange
434|0c3128|            let text = textView.text as NSString
435|c0763f|            let cursorLocation = selectedRange.location
436|3070d1|            
437|3c0f5f|            // Calculate line and column from cursor location
438|2bf772|            var lineNumber = 1
439|b2dc74|            var columnNumber = 1
440|895788|            var currentLineStart = 0
441|3070d1|            
442|30ee03|            for i in 0..<min(cursorLocation, text.length) {
443|76817f|                if text.character(at: i) == UInt16(UnicodeScalar("\n").value) {
444|4ae0f3|                    lineNumber += 1
445|1230ab|                    currentLineStart = i + 1
446|4e2d32|                }
447|a7dc16|            }
448|3070d1|            
449|fe9f83|            // Column is the offset from the start of the current line
450|2ea6e9|            columnNumber = cursorLocation - currentLineStart + 1
451|3070d1|            
452|13f4e9|            // Update bindings on main thread to avoid SwiftUI state update warnings
453|ebb427|            DispatchQueue.main.async {
454|62efc4|                self.parent.cursorIndex = cursorLocation
455|29327f|                self.parent.currentLineNumber = lineNumber
456|975d29|                self.parent.currentColumn = columnNumber
457|a7dc16|            }
458|5f3077|        }
459|27e597|    }

589|ff2c29|    // MARK: - Syntax Highlighting
590|b4687f|    
591|77216f|    func textColor(for rawHighlightName: String) -> UIColor? {
592|364fdf|        // Map TreeSitter highlight names to colors
593|077102|        // See: https://tree-sitter.github.io/tree-sitter/syntax-highlighting#highlights
594|a3c6a6|        let highlightName = rawHighlightName.lowercased()
595|d6ed84|        
596|3e8301|        // Debug: Log ALL highlight names to console (ENABLED FOR DEBUGGING)
597|1aa7f0|        print("🎨 HIGHLIGHT: '\(rawHighlightName)' -> ", terminator: "")
598|d6ed84|        
599|5f2431|        // Keywords
600|347daa|        if highlightName.contains("keyword") {
601|e0cdb7|            print("keyword (blue)")
602|11656d|            return _keywordColor
603|5f3077|        }
604|d6ed84|        
605|c13ace|        // JSON/Object keys - MUST return color for specific patterns
606|164d0a|        // TreeSitter JSON emits BOTH "string.special.key" AND "string" for keys
607|63f969|        // We handle specific patterns first, then skip generic "string" to avoid overwrite
608|929452|        if highlightName.hasPrefix("string.special") ||
609|7d9926|           highlightName.contains("label") ||
610|81c371|           highlightName.contains("property.definition") {
611|7612b6|            print("key/label (light blue)")
612|5086b7|            return _variableColor  // Light blue #9CDCFE for keys
613|5f3077|        }
614|d6ed84|        
615|5fe933|        // Strings - but NOT if it's JUST "string" (let specific matches win)
616|dcb001|        // Only color strings that are clearly values, not potential keys
617|ab3d14|        if highlightName.contains("string") {
618|5655ac|            print("string (orange)")
619|f09755|            return _stringColor  // Orange #CE9178 for string values
620|5f3077|        }
621|d6ed84|        
622|f425cd|        // Numbers and constants
623|a2036f|        if highlightName.contains("number") || highlightName == "constant.numeric" {
624|57bea5|            print("number (green)")
625|da9aee|            return _numberColor
626|5f3077|        }
627|d6ed84|        
628|185d89|        // Comments
629|f4b237|        if highlightName.contains("comment") {
630|e46058|            return _commentColor
631|5f3077|        }
632|d6ed84|        
633|4d76db|        // Functions and methods
634|915dec|        if highlightName.contains("function") || highlightName.contains("method") {
635|69dae5|            return _functionColor
636|5f3077|        }
637|d6ed84|        
638|5853d5|        // Types, classes, structs
639|a68e63|        if highlightName.contains("type") || highlightName.contains("class") ||
640|fe7d45|           highlightName.contains("struct") || highlightName.contains("interface") ||
641|7850d5|           highlightName.contains("enum") {
642|079364|            return _typeColor
643|5f3077|        }
644|d6ed84|        
645|100acb|        // Variables, parameters, properties
646|87a47d|        if highlightName.contains("variable") || highlightName.contains("parameter") ||
647|6198a9|           highlightName.contains("property") || highlightName.contains("field") {
648|0e23b9|            return _variableColor
649|5f3077|        }
650|d6ed84|        
651|f1a54a|        // Constants and booleans - use keyword color
652|cc358f|        if highlightName.contains("constant") || highlightName.contains("boolean") {
653|11656d|            return _keywordColor
654|5f3077|        }
655|d6ed84|        
656|b158fb|        // Operators - use keyword color
657|1a986d|        if highlightName.contains("operator") {
658|11656d|            return _keywordColor
659|5f3077|        }
660|d6ed84|        
661|8737fd|        // Namespaces and modules - use type color
662|d04ebe|        if highlightName.contains("namespace") || highlightName.contains("module") {
663|079364|            return _typeColor
664|5f3077|        }
665|d6ed84|        
666|d204ef|        // Tags (HTML, XML) - use type color
667|e21ab6|        if highlightName.contains("tag") {
668|079364|            return _typeColor
669|5f3077|        }
670|d6ed84|        
671|2abb6b|        // Attributes - use variable color
672|91f255|        if highlightName.contains("attribute") {
673|0e23b9|            return _variableColor
674|5f3077|        }
675|d6ed84|        
676|bb1e1f|        // Spell checking highlights - ignore (return nil to use default)
677|1dc697|        if highlightName.contains("spell") {
678|1c8557|            return nil
679|5f3077|        }
680|d6ed84|        
681|3d22f9|        // Include/import statements - use keyword color
682|fd8f58|        if highlightName.contains("include") {
683|11656d|            return _keywordColor
684|5f3077|        }
685|d6ed84|        
686|c1e1a1|        // Default: use standard text color
687|e35567|        print("nil (default)")
688|c2ae65|        return nil
689|27e597|    }
690|b4687f|    
691|666dc2|    func fontTraits(for rawHighlightName: String) -> FontTraits {
692|a3c6a6|        let highlightName = rawHighlightName.lowercased()
693|d6ed84|        
694|f6d691|        // Make comments italic
695|f4b237|        if highlightName.contains("comment") {
696|9ac334|            return .italic
697|5f3077|        }
698|d6ed84|        
699|556e36|        // Make keywords bold
700|347daa|        if highlightName.contains("keyword") {
701|7775b3|            return .bold
702|5f3077|        }
703|d6ed84|        
704|b72a10|        return []
705|27e597|    }

3|444a0a|struct StickyHeaderView: View {
4|e25e12|    let text: String
5|c75d8a|    let currentLine: Int
6|6b0e55|    let theme: Theme
7|96ac71|    let lineHeight: CGFloat
8|98f24f|    let onSelect: (Int) -> Void
9|b4687f|    
10|1c61db|    @State private var stickyLines: [(line: Int, content: String, depth: Int)] = []
11|b4687f|    
12|504e43|    var body: some View {
13|0865e6|        VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 0) {
14|64c1f0|            ForEach(stickyLines, id: \.line) { item in
15|d591fc|                HStack {
16|95a47f|                    Text(item.content.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces))
17|aa72a2|                        .font(.system(size: 14, weight: .regular, design: .monospaced))
18|49a616|                        .foregroundColor(theme.editorForeground)
19|a2fdad|                        .padding(.leading, CGFloat(item.depth) * 16 + 4)
20|30e6ec|                        .padding(.vertical, 2)
21|dcd0bf|                    Spacer()
22|4e2d32|                }
23|ebee1c|                .frame(height: lineHeight)
24|f5e36b|                .background(theme.editorBackground.opacity(0.95))
25|8fca9f|                .overlay(Rectangle().frame(height: 1).foregroundColor(theme.sidebarBackground), alignment: .bottom)
26|3c1044|                .onTapGesture {
27|edfb18|                    onSelect(item.line)
28|4e2d32|                }
29|a7dc16|            }
30|5f3077|        }
31|17b768|        .onChange(of: currentLine) { _ in updateStickyLines() }
32|3bab08|        .onAppear { updateStickyLines() }
33|27e597|    }
34|b4687f|    
35|d568aa|    private func updateStickyLines() {
36|c8d949|        // Simplified logic: scan upwards from currentLine for class/func definitions
37|8a78a4|        // In a real app, use AST or Symbol Table
38|d6ed84|        
39|2f18b4|        let lines = text.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
40|a78be9|        guard currentLine < lines.count else { return }
41|d6ed84|        
42|d055db|        var found: [(line: Int, content: String, depth: Int)] = []
43|5a8108|        var minIndent = Int.max
44|d6ed84|        
45|c529bb|        // Scan upwards
46|b90d30|        for i in stride(from: currentLine, through: 0, by: -1) {
47|ef0328|            let line = lines[i]
48|ec6750|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
49|3070d1|            
50|f62167|            if trimmed.isEmpty || trimmed.hasPrefix("//") { continue }
51|3070d1|            
52|048a4f|            let indent = line.prefix(while: { $0 == " " }).count / 4
53|3070d1|            
54|f38ce9|            // Heuristic: declarations usually have less indentation than current scope
55|b74045|            // and contain keywords
56|8bf583|            if indent < minIndent {
57|bbf15e|                if trimmed.hasPrefix("class ") || 
58|8e0f1d|                   trimmed.hasPrefix("struct ") || 
59|234574|                   trimmed.hasPrefix("enum ") || 
60|f5082c|                   trimmed.hasPrefix("func ") || 
61|06a1ce|                   trimmed.hasPrefix("extension ") ||
62|c9379e|                   trimmed.contains(" body: some View") {
63|dd2193|                    
64|4c83b4|                    found.insert((i, line, indent), at: 0)
65|652b6b|                    minIndent = indent
66|4e2d32|                }
67|a7dc16|            }
68|3070d1|            
69|718c12|            if minIndent == 0 { break }
70|5f3077|        }
71|d6ed84|        
72|4c5bf2|        // Limit to 3 levels to avoid clutter
73|b8bbaf|        if found.count > 3 {
74|60ca6d|            found = Array(found.suffix(3))
75|5f3077|        }
76|d6ed84|        
77|7355d8|        self.stickyLines = found
78|27e597|    }
79|b31277|}

60|f5a6eb|            } else {

114|4a10ef|    func splitPane(direction: SplitDirection, fromPaneId: UUID? = nil) {
115|4a4aa9|        let sourcePane = fromPaneId.flatMap { id in panes.first { $0.id == id } } ?? activePane
116|d018e4|        guard let source = sourcePane else { return }
117|d6ed84|        
118|ecd130|        // Create new pane with duplicate of active tab (or empty)
119|403ac4|        var newTabs: [Tab] = []
120|e7a36d|        if let activeTab = source.activeTab {
121|561680|            let duplicateTab = Tab(
122|738907|                fileName: activeTab.fileName,
123|6e48e1|                content: activeTab.content,
124|75da73|                language: activeTab.language,
125|664421|                url: activeTab.url,
126|7c1d53|                isUnsaved: activeTab.isUnsaved
127|43d041|            )
128|0ce6cc|            newTabs = [duplicateTab]
129|5f3077|        }
130|d6ed84|        
131|e00a28|        let newPane = EditorPane(tabs: newTabs, activeTabId: newTabs.first?.id)
132|d6ed84|        
133|9b4dc9|        self.splitDirection = direction
134|eae326|        panes.append(newPane)
135|d6ed84|        
136|7b622c|        // Recalculate ratios equally
137|44dc67|        let ratio = 1.0 / CGFloat(panes.count)
138|0a032c|        splitRatios = Array(repeating: ratio, count: panes.count)
139|d6ed84|        
140|6ae100|        activePaneId = newPane.id
141|27e597|    }
142|b4687f|    
143|0e5294|    func closePane(id: UUID) {
144|0340ad|        guard panes.count > 1 else { return } // Keep at least one pane
145|653e9e|        guard let index = panes.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == id }) else { return }
146|d6ed84|        
147|6e551e|        panes.remove(at: index)
148|c30876|        splitRatios.remove(at: index)
149|d6ed84|        
150|897a90|        // Normalize ratios
151|7df9cd|        let total = splitRatios.reduce(0, +)
152|a5f33f|        if total > 0 {
153|e10388|            splitRatios = splitRatios.map { $0 / total }
154|b31999|        } else {
155|9fbae1|            splitRatios = Array(repeating: 1.0 / CGFloat(panes.count), count: panes.count)
156|5f3077|        }
157|d6ed84|        
158|29a74a|        // Update active pane
159|d0cbf9|        if activePaneId == id {
160|b3b67b|            activePaneId = panes.first?.id
161|5f3077|        }
162|27e597|    }

166|eca79d|              let toPane = panes.first(where: { $0.id == toPaneId }) else { return }
167|d6ed84|

203|fc4e2f|    func updateRatio(at index: Int, delta: CGFloat, totalSize: CGFloat) {
204|aa52a4|        guard index < splitRatios.count - 1 else { return }
205|d6ed84|        
206|f7ce87|        let deltaRatio = delta / totalSize
207|019df3|        let minRatio: CGFloat = 0.15
208|d6ed84|        
209|3f9e36|        let newRatio1 = splitRatios[index] + deltaRatio
210|d4621b|        let newRatio2 = splitRatios[index + 1] - deltaRatio
211|d6ed84|        
212|289da5|        if newRatio1 >= minRatio && newRatio2 >= minRatio {
213|6df122|            splitRatios[index] = newRatio1
214|7b2474|            splitRatios[index + 1] = newRatio2
215|5f3077|        }
216|27e597|    }

272|24bea0|                    SinglePaneView(pane: pane, splitManager: splitManager, editorCore: editorCore)

604|20335e|struct SplitDragHandle: View {
605|3050b6|    let direction: SplitDirection
606|5ceab9|    let onDrag: (CGFloat) -> Void
607|b4687f|    
608|9d7b13|    @State private var isDragging = false

610|b4687f|    
611|504e43|    var body: some View {
612|88666c|        ZStack {
613|917510|            // Background
614|8ce5e4|            Rectangle()
615|056552|                .fill(Color(UIColor.separator))
616|3070d1|            
617|46727c|            // Handle indicator
618|99f541|            if direction == .horizontal {
619|fc75ec|                VStack(spacing: 2) {
620|2c9234|                    ForEach(0..<3, id: \.self) { _ in
621|70798b|                        Circle()
622|55136d|                            .fill(isDragging ? Color.accentColor : Color.secondary)
623|0bef2b|                            .frame(width: 3, height: 3)
624|c9717a|                    }
625|4e2d32|                }
626|f5a6eb|            } else {
627|d1bdd3|                HStack(spacing: 2) {
628|2c9234|                    ForEach(0..<3, id: \.self) { _ in
629|70798b|                        Circle()
630|55136d|                            .fill(isDragging ? Color.accentColor : Color.secondary)
631|0bef2b|                            .frame(width: 3, height: 3)
632|c9717a|                    }
633|4e2d32|                }
634|a7dc16|            }
635|5f3077|        }
636|4b779c|        .frame(
637|9a2b5c|            width: direction == .horizontal ? 6 : nil,
638|67c188|            height: direction == .vertical ? 6 : nil
639|3143a4|        )
640|55e29b|        .contentShape(Rectangle())
641|9d6124|        .gesture(
642|b4327e|            DragGesture()
643|10bb46|                .updating($dragOffset) { value, state, _ in
644|fa21e0|                    let delta = direction == .horizontal ? value.translation.width : value.translation.height
645|a83186|                    state = delta
646|4e2d32|                }
647|bc75fc|                .onChanged { value in
648|9391c4|                    isDragging = true
649|fa21e0|                    let delta = direction == .horizontal ? value.translation.width : value.translation.height
650|716613|                    onDrag(delta)
651|4e2d32|                }
652|6b43cc|                .onEnded { _ in
653|dda585|                    isDragging = false
654|4e2d32|                }
655|3143a4|        )
656|ca4aa4|        .onHover { hovering in
657|d52bbe|            if hovering {
658|b94855|                #if targetEnvironment(macCatalyst)
659|922e76|                NSCursor.resizeLeftRight.push()
660|1b83de|                #endif
661|f5a6eb|            } else {
662|b94855|                #if targetEnvironment(macCatalyst)
663|d026ea|                NSCursor.pop()
664|1b83de|                #endif
665|a7dc16|            }
666|5f3077|        }
667|27e597|    }

253|55f9fc|            .gesture(
254|a6de91|                DragGesture()
255|19c0f6|                    .onChanged { value in
256|2c66bc|                        isDragging = true
257|89909c|                        let newWidth = width + value.translation.width
258|379d17|                        // Clamp width (Min 170, Max 600)
259|ba6621|                        if newWidth >= 170 && newWidth <= 600 {
260|e83ad8|                            width = newWidth
261|392b35|                        }
262|c9717a|                    }
263|2eb32e|                    .onEnded { _ in
264|41e900|                        isDragging = false
265|c9717a|                    }
266|43d041|            )
267|5f3077|        }
268|27e597|    }

10|a39808|struct TabBarView: View {
11|703487|    @Binding var tabs: [Tab]
12|633591|    @Binding var activeTabId: UUID?
13|0caee8|    @ObservedObject var themeManager: ThemeManager
14|adc83b|
15|0a03db|    // Drag and drop support
16|5fe914|    @State private var draggedTab: Tab? = nil
17|adc83b|
18|504e43|    var body: some View {
19|98ab70|        ScrollView(.horizontal, showsIndicators: false) {
20|1cad38|            ScrollViewReader { scrollProxy in
21|e6ac69|                HStack(spacing: 1) {
22|b51753|                    ForEach(tabs) { tab in
23|8b5c35|                        TabItemView(
24|39daf8|                            tab: tab,
25|73c2c1|                            isActive: activeTabId == tab.id,
26|090ab9|                            themeManager: themeManager,
27|44c175|                            onClose: { closeTab(tab) },
28|0dbd5e|                            onActivate: { activateTab(tab) },
29|4a532c|                            onPin: { togglePin(tab) },
30|9ffda4|                            onCloseOthers: { closeOthers(except: tab) },
31|809d2a|                            onCloseRight: { closeTabsToRight(of: tab) }
32|63214b|                        )
33|a69473|                        .id(tab.id)
34|dcebe2|                        .draggableToNewWindow(tab: tab, onDrag: {
35|9497de|                            self.draggedTab = tab
36|dbade7|                            return NSItemProvider(object: tab.id.uuidString as NSString)
37|af8377|                        })
38|cdedf7|                        .onDrop(of: [.text], delegate: TabDropDelegate(item: tab, tabs: $tabs, draggedItem: $draggedTab))
39|c9717a|                    }
40|4e2d32|                }
41|0b58d5|                .padding(.leading, 1)
42|51a1e9|                .onChange(of: activeTabId) { newId in
43|5c7f60|                    if let id = newId {
44|14c43c|                        withAnimation {
45|ad5cbd|                            scrollProxy.scrollTo(id, anchor: .center)
46|392b35|                        }
47|c9717a|                    }
48|4e2d32|                }
49|a7dc16|            }
50|5f3077|        }
51|6e3d58|        .background(themeManager.currentTheme.tabBarBackground)
52|1fa8c9|        .frame(height: 35)
53|27e597|    }
54|adc83b|
55|f35525|    private func closeTab(_ tab: Tab) {
56|d14e45|        if let index = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tab.id }) {
57|dc033d|            tabs.remove(at: index)
58|adc83b|
59|c6ba74|            // If we closed the active tab, activate another one
60|7fb881|            if activeTabId == tab.id {
61|fce7de|                if tabs.isEmpty {
62|8cf647|                    activeTabId = nil
63|fdd0e2|                } else {
64|d77f53|                    // Try to activate the tab to the right, or the last one if we closed the last one
65|51dd50|                    let newIndex = min(index, tabs.count - 1)
66|1dc7de|                    activeTabId = tabs[newIndex].id
67|4e2d32|                }
68|a7dc16|            }
69|5f3077|        }
70|27e597|    }
71|adc83b|
72|2c4bc2|    private func activateTab(_ tab: Tab) {
73|4370c7|        activeTabId = tab.id
74|27e597|    }
75|adc83b|
76|0ee0ae|    private func togglePin(_ tab: Tab) {
77|d14e45|        if let index = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tab.id }) {
78|68edaf|            tabs[index].isPinned.toggle()
79|44e8fd|            tabs[index].isPreview = false
80|5f3077|        }
81|27e597|    }
82|adc83b|
83|a18b96|    private func closeOthers(except tab: Tab) {
84|bb9a07|        tabs = tabs.filter { $0.id == tab.id || $0.isPinned }
85|695c78|        if activeTabId != tab.id {
86|2f7846|            activeTabId = tab.id
87|5f3077|        }
88|27e597|    }
89|adc83b|
90|fa8b74|    private func closeTabsToRight(of tab: Tab) {
91|d14e45|        if let index = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tab.id }) {
92|729830|            // Keep tabs up to index, plus pinned tabs that might be to the right (though pinned tabs should be on left)
93|9966a5|            let tabsToKeep = tabs.prefix(through: index)
94|74e089|            let remainingTabs = tabs.suffix(from: index + 1).filter { $0.isPinned }
95|7549b0|            tabs = Array(tabsToKeep) + Array(remainingTabs)
96|5f3077|        }
97|27e597|    }

130|ca864e|                    .foregroundColor(isActive ? themeManager.currentTheme.tabActiveForeground : themeManager.currentTheme.tabInactiveForeground)
131|97a348|                    .lineLimit(1)

142|ad7355|                            .opacity(isHovering ? 0 : 1)
143|c9717a|                    }

149|2c3a33|                                .foregroundColor(isActive ? themeManager.currentTheme.tabActiveForeground : themeManager.currentTheme.tabInactiveForeground)

151|c595b5|                                .background(Color.black.opacity(0.1))
152|398e0c|                                .cornerRadius(4)
153|392b35|                        }
154|442658|                        .buttonStyle(.plain)
155|95259c|                        .opacity(isHovering ? 1 : 0)
156|c9717a|                    }
157|4e2d32|                }
158|dad1db|                .frame(width: 16, height: 16)
159|a7dc16|            }
160|5f3077|        }

186|a68167|// MARK: - Tab Drop Delegate
187|adc83b|
188|6b7af0|struct TabDropDelegate: DropDelegate {
189|b60411|    let item: Tab
190|703487|    @Binding var tabs: [Tab]
191|3fcf36|    @Binding var draggedItem: Tab?
192|b4687f|    
193|00181c|    func performDrop(info: DropInfo) -> Bool {
194|483695|        draggedItem = nil
195|4add8d|        return true
196|27e597|    }
197|b4687f|    
198|d60902|    func dropEntered(info: DropInfo) {
199|1bfbb6|        guard let draggedItem = draggedItem,
200|002bc1|              draggedItem.id != item.id,
201|08a456|              let fromIndex = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == draggedItem.id }),
202|4e0f6c|              let toIndex = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == item.id }) else { return }
203|d6ed84|        
204|408502|        withAnimation {
205|97fe34|            tabs.move(fromOffsets: IndexSet(integer: fromIndex), toOffset: toIndex > fromIndex ? toIndex + 1 : toIndex)
206|5f3077|        }
207|27e597|    }

212|4c9d69|struct ConditionalItalicModifier: ViewModifier {
213|1b9cbd|    let isItalic: Bool
214|b4687f|    
215|881671|    func body(content: Content) -> some View {
216|896df0|        if #available(iOS 16.0, *) {
217|dfabcc|            content.italic(isItalic)
218|b31999|        } else {
219|d1acbf|            content
220|5f3077|        }
221|27e597|    }

225|8136c0|// MARK: - Draggable To New Window Modifier
226|adc83b|
227|cbdbb5|extension View {
228|87ac85|    func draggableToNewWindow(tab: Tab, onDrag: @escaping () -> NSItemProvider) -> some View {
229|576cdd|        #if os(iOS) || os(visionOS)
230|35716a|        return self.onDrag {
231|112f72|            // Create a provider that supports both tab reordering and window creation
232|97cc72|            let provider = onDrag()
233|3070d1|            
234|344f40|            // Register additional data for window creation on iPadOS
235|16670b|            if let data = try? JSONEncoder().encode(tab) {
236|455993|                provider.registerDataRepresentation(forTypeIdentifier: "com.vscodeipados.tab", visibility: .all) { completion in
237|b13ba7|                    completion(data, nil)
238|024b84|                    return nil
239|4e2d32|                }
240|a7dc16|            }
241|3070d1|            
242|33162e|            return provider
243|5f3077|        }
244|f6012e|        #else
245|8092f8|        return self.onDrag(onDrag)
246|6a3e13|        #endif
247|27e597|    }
248|b31277|}

3|bd05eb|struct StatusBarView: View {

5|cb3e5c|    @ObservedObject var themeManager = ThemeManager.shared
6|ad7e4e|    @ObservedObject private var git = GitManager.shared

1|d755ba|import SwiftUI
2|adc83b|
3|c385c0|struct FileIconView: View {
4|ab828e|    let filename: String
5|e1c6d7|    let isDirectory: Bool
6|210b12|    let isOpen: Bool
7|b4687f|    
8|53f78d|    init(filename: String, isDirectory: Bool = false, isOpen: Bool = false) {
9|693829|        self.filename = filename
10|6dae1b|        self.isDirectory = isDirectory
11|eea95e|        self.isOpen = isOpen
12|27e597|    }
13|b4687f|    
14|504e43|    var body: some View {
15|105047|        Group {
16|8a6b94|            if isDirectory {
17|a9b0d9|                folderIcon
18|a7dc16|            }
19|ddd88c|            else {
20|003478|                fileIcon
21|a7dc16|            }
22|5f3077|        }
23|e9299b|        .aspectRatio(1, contentMode: .fit)
24|27e597|    }
25|b4687f|    
26|6bf643|    private var folderIcon: some View {
27|3d5a35|        Image(systemName: isOpen ? "folder.fill" : "folder")
28|7fdef7|            .resizable()
29|5f8987|            .aspectRatio(contentMode: .fit)
30|246232|            .foregroundColor(.blue)
31|27e597|    }
32|b4687f|    
33|5310db|    private var fileIcon: some View {
34|98942b|        let ext = (filename as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
35|c91e6c|        let fullLower = filename.lowercased()
36|d6ed84|        
37|5398e5|        // Exact filename matches
38|efaa9c|        if fullLower == "dockerfile" {
39|f82057|            return AnyView(icon(systemName: "shippingbox.fill", color: .blue))
40|5f3077|        }
41|4c8602|        if fullLower == ".gitignore" {
42|ecad15|            return AnyView(icon(systemName: "eye.slash.fill", color: .gray))
43|5f3077|        }
44|21f202|        if fullLower == "package.json" {
45|f95db0|            return AnyView(icon(systemName: "shippingbox.fill", color: .red))
46|5f3077|        }
47|658789|        if fullLower.starts(with: "readme") {
48|656a0b|            return AnyView(icon(systemName: "book.fill", color: .blue))
49|5f3077|        }
50|bc6696|        if fullLower.starts(with: "license") {
51|bd9cc0|            return AnyView(icon(systemName: "key.fill", color: .yellow))
52|5f3077|        }
53|d6ed84|        
54|286507|        // Extension matches
55|f60e4e|        switch ext {
56|1c8542|        case "swift":
57|caa90f|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "SW", color: .orange))
58|b98a6f|        case "js":
59|d5d56d|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "JS", color: .yellow))
60|da3e57|        case "ts":
61|0e8b47|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "TS", color: .blue))
62|9ea748|        case "jsx":
63|828f43|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "JSX", color: .cyan))
64|8bf0d6|        case "tsx":
65|478843|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "TSX", color: .cyan))
66|e1d221|        case "py":
67|d372a1|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "PY", color: Color(red: 0.2, green: 0.4, blue: 0.6)))
68|c53984|        case "rb":
69|ce51e3|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "RB", color: .red))
70|ee50e6|        case "go":
71|773bde|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "GO", color: .cyan))
72|c28591|        case "rs":
73|2c12da|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "RS", color: .orange))
74|a547fd|        case "java":
75|a27b27|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "JA", color: .red))
76|90fc25|        case "kt":
77|b21c4f|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "KT", color: .purple))
78|79273a|        case "c":
79|a220d8|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "C", color: .blue))
80|0fc947|        case "cpp", "cc", "cxx":
81|1ca466|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "C++", color: .blue))
82|aa91ff|        case "h", "hpp":
83|b838e8|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "H", color: .purple))
84|02f10c|        case "m":
85|aa19e0|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "M", color: .gray))
86|557ae3|        case "html":
87|7b8fb6|            return AnyView(icon(systemName: "chevron.left.forwardslash.chevron.right", color: .orange))
88|19ddae|        case "css":
89|539b40|            return AnyView(icon(systemName: "number", color: .blue))
90|2c53bf|        case "scss":
91|6c6b00|            return AnyView(icon(systemName: "paintbrush.fill", color: .pink))
92|a506f6|        case "json":
93|4425e8|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "{}", color: .yellow))
94|86f870|        case "xml":
95|0179e2|            return AnyView(icon(systemName: "chevron.left.forwardslash.chevron.right", color: .green))
96|b6276a|        case "yaml", "yml":
97|b87b82|            return AnyView(badgeIcon(text: "YML", color: .purple))
98|c0b6bf|        case "md":
99|a69c62|            return AnyView(icon(systemName: "doc.text.fill", color: .blue))
100|3b5282|        case "txt":

53|411ba5|class RecentCommandsManager: ObservableObject {
54|d3834f|    @Published var recentCommands: [String] = []
55|4d914d|    private let maxRecent = 5
56|f67f90|    private let storageKey = "recentCommands"
57|b4687f|    
58|359b1b|    init() {
59|880bd6|        loadRecent()
60|27e597|    }
61|b4687f|    
62|230e29|    func addRecent(_ commandName: String) {
63|fe3482|        recentCommands.removeAll { $0 == commandName }
64|d6c233|        recentCommands.insert(commandName, at: 0)
65|8a5223|        if recentCommands.count > maxRecent {
66|578c6f|            recentCommands = Array(recentCommands.prefix(maxRecent))
67|5f3077|        }
68|a8ef93|        saveRecent()
69|27e597|    }
70|b4687f|    
71|998823|    private func loadRecent() {
72|7e091c|        if let saved = UserDefaults.standard.stringArray(forKey: storageKey) {
73|cbe995|            recentCommands = saved
74|5f3077|        }
75|27e597|    }
76|b4687f|    
77|956c57|    private func saveRecent() {
78|98ac56|        UserDefaults.standard.set(recentCommands, forKey: storageKey)

82|af0ecd|// MARK: - Fuzzy Search
83|adc83b|
84|9fce4f|struct FuzzyMatcher {
85|ae76bd|    static func score(query: String, target: String) -> Int? {
86|34cef6|        guard !query.isEmpty else { return 1000 }
87|d6ed84|        
88|aa4292|        let queryLower = query.lowercased()
89|18ea38|        let targetLower = target.lowercased()
90|d6ed84|        
91|c33784|        // Exact match gets highest score
92|bea5c7|        if targetLower == queryLower { return 10000 }
93|d6ed84|        
94|bffced|        // Contains full query
95|8cd767|        if targetLower.contains(queryLower) {
96|1063f5|            // Bonus for starting with query
97|d0876a|            if targetLower.hasPrefix(queryLower) {
98|2e989d|                return 5000 + (1000 - target.count)
99|a7dc16|            }
100|c9ab09|            return 3000 + (1000 - target.count)
101|5f3077|        }
102|d6ed84|        
103|83786c|        // Fuzzy character matching
104|65f313|        var queryIndex = queryLower.startIndex
105|7f11d4|        var targetIndex = targetLower.startIndex
106|268b95|        var score = 0
107|5dc28e|        var consecutiveBonus = 0
108|1d718f|        var lastMatchIndex: String.Index? = nil
109|d6ed84|        
110|308cfe|        while queryIndex < queryLower.endIndex && targetIndex < targetLower.endIndex {
111|c13bec|            if queryLower[queryIndex] == targetLower[targetIndex] {
112|145bbf|                score += 100 + consecutiveBonus
113|216278|                
114|d6ef12|                // Bonus for consecutive matches
115|9f661a|                if let lastIdx = lastMatchIndex,
116|83874f|                   targetLower.index(after: lastIdx) == targetIndex {
117|9c7108|                    consecutiveBonus += 50
118|fdd0e2|                } else {
119|51d442|                    consecutiveBonus = 0
120|4e2d32|                }
121|216278|                
122|c7d2d9|                // Bonus for matching at word boundaries
123|3c44b0|                if targetIndex == targetLower.startIndex ||
124|75c499|                   !targetLower[targetLower.index(before: targetIndex)].isLetter {
125|78d351|                    score += 75
126|4e2d32|                }
127|216278|                
128|b7133b|                lastMatchIndex = targetIndex
129|ea161d|                queryIndex = queryLower.index(after: queryIndex)
130|a7dc16|            }
131|916731|            targetIndex = targetLower.index(after: targetIndex)
132|5f3077|        }
133|d6ed84|        
134|989e1f|        // All query characters must be found
135|0160b5|        guard queryIndex == queryLower.endIndex else { return nil }
136|d6ed84|        
137|c07521|        return score
138|27e597|    }
139|b4687f|    
140|ace7c9|    static func highlight(query: String, in text: String) -> [(String, Bool)] {
141|81813c|        guard !query.isEmpty else { return [(text, false)] }
142|d6ed84|        
143|b880d0|        var result: [(String, Bool)] = []
144|aa4292|        let queryLower = query.lowercased()
145|a14f23|        let textLower = text.lowercased()
146|d6ed84|        
147|65f313|        var queryIndex = queryLower.startIndex
148|a07ffc|        var currentSegment = ""
149|d3c359|        var isMatch = false
150|d6ed84|        
151|4083e9|        for (i, char) in text.enumerated() {
152|212094|            let textIndex = textLower.index(textLower.startIndex, offsetBy: i)
153|3070d1|            
154|3f747d|            if queryIndex < queryLower.endIndex && 
155|f8248a|               textLower[textIndex] == queryLower[queryIndex] {
156|eecabe|                if !isMatch && !currentSegment.isEmpty {
157|78ec19|                    result.append((currentSegment, false))
158|cc1904|                    currentSegment = ""
159|4e2d32|                }
160|a00101|                isMatch = true
161|b31654|                currentSegment.append(char)
162|ea161d|                queryIndex = queryLower.index(after: queryIndex)
163|f5a6eb|            } else {
164|fbac5d|                if isMatch && !currentSegment.isEmpty {
165|15ba04|                    result.append((currentSegment, true))
166|cc1904|                    currentSegment = ""
167|4e2d32|                }
168|d1cc2f|                isMatch = false
169|b31654|                currentSegment.append(char)
170|a7dc16|            }
171|5f3077|        }
172|d6ed84|        
173|5d8d48|        if !currentSegment.isEmpty {
174|eb146d|            result.append((currentSegment, isMatch))
175|5f3077|        }
176|d6ed84|        
177|67ed82|        return result
178|27e597|    }
179|b31277|}

403|b4687f|    
404|27623f|    private var filteredCommands: [Command] {
405|93055c|        if searchText.isEmpty {
406|c6a1fd|            // Show recent commands first, then all commands
407|df481a|            let recentNames = Set(recentManager.recentCommands)
408|28414c|            let recent = allCommands.filter { recentNames.contains($0.name) }
409|af65a0|                .sorted { a, b in
410|d73b49|                    let aIdx = recentManager.recentCommands.firstIndex(of: a.name) ?? Int.max
411|3d02c9|                    let bIdx = recentManager.recentCommands.firstIndex(of: b.name) ?? Int.max
412|0688f6|                    return aIdx < bIdx
413|4e2d32|                }
414|c4a108|            let others = allCommands.filter { !recentNames.contains($0.name) }
415|4f9548|            return recent + others
416|5f3077|        }
417|d6ed84|        
418|babd96|        return allCommands
419|519b5d|            .compactMap { cmd -> (Command, Int)? in
420|8c516a|                guard let score = FuzzyMatcher.score(query: searchText, target: cmd.name) else {
421|024b84|                    return nil
422|4e2d32|                }
423|46f56b|                return (cmd, score)
424|a7dc16|            }
425|4a2f11|            .sorted { $0.1 > $1.1 }
426|ffcc79|            .map { $0.0 }
427|27e597|    }
428|b4687f|    
429|debdc2|    private func dismiss() {
430|02562c|        editorCore.showCommandPalette = false
431|27e597|    }
432|b4687f|    
433|3b5568|    private func executeCommand(_ command: Command) {
434|0a37ea|        recentManager.addRecent(command.name)
435|a6f1ca|        command.action()
436|27e597|    }
437|b4687f|    
438|504e43|    var body: some View {
439|94dd27|        VStack(spacing: 0) {
440|b8aa88|            // Search Header
441|8574de|            HStack(spacing: 12) {
442|d1730f|                Image(systemName: "chevron.right")
443|9d5a30|                    .font(.system(size: 14, weight: .medium))
444|72464b|                    .foregroundColor(.secondary)
445|216278|                
446|0cd38c|                TextField("", text: $searchText, prompt: Text("Type a command or search...").foregroundColor(.secondary))
447|abe43c|                    .font(.system(size: 14))
448|63a586|                    .textFieldStyle(.plain)
449|f3390b|                    .focused($isSearchFocused)
450|eaf7dc|                    .onSubmit {
451|7ac5d5|                        if let command = selectedIndex < filteredCommands.count ? filteredCommands[selectedIndex] : nil {
452|338ed6|                            executeCommand(command)
453|392b35|                        }
454|c9717a|                    }
455|216278|                
456|73afa1|                if !searchText.isEmpty {
457|67cd1a|                    Button(action: { searchText = "" }) {
458|a5c3e0|                        Image(systemName: "xmark.circle.fill")
459|b15939|                            .foregroundColor(.secondary)
460|c9717a|                    }
461|9cd867|                    .buttonStyle(.plain)
462|4e2d32|                }
463|a7dc16|            }
464|94e6d5|            .padding(.horizontal, 16)
465|b3298d|            .padding(.vertical, 12)
466|508ae7|            .background(Color(UIColor.secondarySystemBackground))
467|3070d1|            
468|e744dc|            Divider()
469|3070d1|            
470|a2afcf|            // Commands List
471|db6e07|            ScrollViewReader { proxy in
472|5deb41|                ScrollView {
473|1b3e39|                    LazyVStack(spacing: 0) {
474|169618|                        // Recent section header
475|ae3a4d|                        if searchText.isEmpty && !recentManager.recentCommands.isEmpty {
476|94cdc3|                            HStack {
477|82d132|                                Text("recently used")
478|0a796c|                                    .font(.system(size: 11, weight: .medium))
479|5c0ddb|                                    .foregroundColor(.secondary)
480|98814c|                                    .textCase(.uppercase)
481|7e8fcd|                                Spacer()
482|89d40a|                            }
483|05e9b9|                            .padding(.horizontal, 16)
484|336f39|                            .padding(.vertical, 6)
485|77ef6f|                            .background(Color(UIColor.tertiarySystemBackground))
486|392b35|                        }
487|956cfe|                        
488|7f3bee|                        ForEach(Array(filteredCommands.enumerated()), id: \.element.id) { index, command in
489|1cca0a|                            CommandRowView(
490|1e93df|                                command: command,
491|8acb07|                                searchQuery: searchText,
492|8672fa|                                isSelected: index == selectedIndex,
493|327321|                                isRecent: recentManager.recentCommands.contains(command.name)
494|3d140c|                            )
495|48f34a|                            .id(index)
496|9925b9|                            .onTapGesture {
497|d9a1ab|                                executeCommand(command)
498|89d40a|                            }
499|e4abf2|                            
500|df9ad5|                            // Category divider after recent commands
501|355287|                            if searchText.isEmpty && 
502|b5f48c|                               index == recentManager.recentCommands.count - 1 && 
503|2b7f74|                               !recentManager.recentCommands.isEmpty {
504|ccf016|                                HStack {
505|fca79c|                                    Text("all commands")
506|d38e38|                                        .font(.system(size: 11, weight: .medium))
507|759980|                                        .foregroundColor(.secondary)
508|dfaca8|                                        .textCase(.uppercase)
509|c7a564|                                    Spacer()
510|f83e05|                                }
511|597e80|                                .padding(.horizontal, 16)
512|4bf4c3|                                .padding(.vertical, 6)
513|d8bd09|                                .background(Color(UIColor.tertiarySystemBackground))
514|89d40a|                            }
515|392b35|                        }
516|c9717a|                    }
517|4e2d32|                }
518|65a3c2|                .onChange(of: selectedIndex) { newIndex in
519|276987|                    withAnimation(.easeInOut(duration: 0.1)) {
520|64186a|                        proxy.scrollTo(newIndex, anchor: .center)
521|c9717a|                    }
522|4e2d32|                }
523|a7dc16|            }
524|a27b41|            .frame(maxHeight: 400)
525|3070d1|            
526|311873|            // Footer
527|3185eb|            HStack(spacing: 16) {
528|10b64b|                FooterHint(keys: ["↑", "↓"], description: "navigate")
529|02f516|                FooterHint(keys: ["↵"], description: "select")
530|1a5433|                FooterHint(keys: ["esc"], description: "close")
531|a02350|                Spacer()
532|d51270|                Text("\(filteredCommands.count) commands")
533|a5b455|                    .font(.system(size: 11))
534|72464b|                    .foregroundColor(.secondary)
535|a7dc16|            }
536|94e6d5|            .padding(.horizontal, 16)
537|5b6fc5|            .padding(.vertical, 8)
538|13cf90|            .background(Color(UIColor.tertiarySystemBackground))
539|5f3077|        }
540|9d86ef|        .frame(width: 600)
541|928ed0|        .background(Color(UIColor.systemBackground))
542|1599ca|        .cornerRadius(12)
543|637de6|        .shadow(color: .black.opacity(0.3), radius: 30, x: 0, y: 10)
544|2bd24e|        .onAppear {
545|56a05a|            isSearchFocused = true
546|5373e9|            selectedIndex = 0
547|5f3077|        }
548|50c165|        .onChange(of: searchText) { _ in
549|5373e9|            selectedIndex = 0
550|5f3077|        }
551|f58142|        .modifier(KeyboardNavigationModifier(
552|b3eba3|            onUp: { if selectedIndex > 0 { selectedIndex -= 1 } },
553|e0aa58|            onDown: { if selectedIndex < filteredCommands.count - 1 { selectedIndex += 1 } },
554|22e9fc|            onEscape: { dismiss() }
555|813e75|        ))
556|27e597|    }

559|23824e|// MARK: - Command Row View
560|adc83b|
561|f531c6|struct CommandRowView: View {
562|19696f|    let command: Command
563|470a2c|    let searchQuery: String
564|055123|    let isSelected: Bool
565|a41eed|    let isRecent: Bool
566|b4687f|    
567|504e43|    var body: some View {
568|8c28e9|        HStack(spacing: 12) {
569|bf7cbb|            // Category icon
570|b321df|            Image(systemName: command.icon)
571|a57c19|                .font(.system(size: 14))
572|afdbe6|                .foregroundColor(isSelected ? .white : .accentColor)
573|fc6377|                .frame(width: 24)
574|3070d1|            
575|1fc88c|            // Command name with highlighting
576|085bc5|            highlightedName
577|3070d1|            
578|1e6289|            Spacer()
579|3070d1|            
580|f0dd0d|            // Recent indicator
581|1fe14a|            if isRecent && searchQuery.isEmpty {
582|ce2635|                Image(systemName: "clock")
583|43cd83|                    .font(.system(size: 10))
584|39aaec|                    .foregroundColor(isSelected ? .white.opacity(0.7) : .secondary)
585|a7dc16|            }
586|3070d1|            
587|2e665a|            // Category badge
588|7ff844|            Text(command.category.rawValue)
589|439860|                .font(.system(size: 10, weight: .medium))
590|f145ac|                .foregroundColor(isSelected ? .white.opacity(0.8) : .secondary)
591|801496|                .padding(.horizontal, 6)
592|aa3473|                .padding(.vertical, 2)
593|f02960|                .background(
594|8ef1be|                    RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 4)
595|276f73|                        .fill(isSelected ? Color.white.opacity(0.2) : Color(UIColor.tertiarySystemFill))
596|6f642e|                )
597|3070d1|            
598|fbe6c5|            // Keyboard shortcut
599|6b1008|            if let shortcut = command.shortcut {
600|6d43ae|                ShortcutBadge(shortcut: shortcut, isSelected: isSelected)
601|a7dc16|            }
602|5f3077|        }
603|a15da8|        .padding(.horizontal, 16)
604|bd7543|        .padding(.vertical, 10)
605|413d6d|        .background(
606|08e8f6|            RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 6)
607|13be75|                .fill(isSelected ? Color.accentColor : Color.clear)
608|3143a4|        )
609|0921e9|        .padding(.horizontal, 8)
610|ea63eb|        .padding(.vertical, 1)
611|55e29b|        .contentShape(Rectangle())
612|27e597|    }
613|b4687f|    
614|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
615|a557f4|    private var highlightedName: some View {
616|4c9b69|        if searchQuery.isEmpty {
617|3a60a5|            Text(command.name)
618|737552|                .font(.system(size: 13))
619|6226ee|                .foregroundColor(isSelected ? .white : .primary)
620|b31999|        } else {
621|01e1af|            let parts = FuzzyMatcher.highlight(query: searchQuery, in: command.name)
622|3b7550|            HStack(spacing: 0) {
623|b696d8|                ForEach(Array(parts.enumerated()), id: \.offset) { _, part in
624|e6b375|                    Text(part.0)
625|fc096a|                        .font(.system(size: 13, weight: part.1 ? .bold : .regular))
626|ee54d3|                        .foregroundColor(isSelected ? .white : (part.1 ? .accentColor : .primary))
627|4e2d32|                }
628|a7dc16|            }
629|5f3077|        }
630|27e597|    }
631|b31277|}
632|adc83b|
633|431faf|// MARK: - Shortcut Badge
634|adc83b|

640|fc9fe2|        HStack(spacing: 2) {
641|4df5ea|            ForEach(shortcut.components(separatedBy: " "), id: \.self) { key in
642|6e641a|                Text(key)
643|60a363|                    .font(.system(size: 11, design: .rounded))
644|4326ee|                    .foregroundColor(isSelected ? .white.opacity(0.9) : .secondary)
645|092f7b|                    .padding(.horizontal, 6)
646|f8dd2a|                    .padding(.vertical, 3)
647|c7bd73|                    .background(
648|f38447|                        RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 4)
649|dcbcf3|                            .fill(isSelected ? Color.white.opacity(0.2) : Color(UIColor.tertiarySystemFill))
650|1961a4|                    )
651|a7dc16|            }
652|5f3077|        }
653|27e597|    }
654|b31277|}
655|adc83b|
656|7cff0e|// MARK: - Footer Hint
657|adc83b|
658|ec13ea|struct FooterHint: View {

661|b4687f|    
662|504e43|    var body: some View {
663|b120fa|        HStack(spacing: 4) {
664|4184bb|            ForEach(keys, id: \.self) { key in
665|6e641a|                Text(key)
666|0aa3ba|                    .font(.system(size: 10, weight: .medium, design: .rounded))
667|72464b|                    .foregroundColor(.secondary)
668|4424f8|                    .padding(.horizontal, 4)
669|9bae05|                    .padding(.vertical, 2)
670|c7bd73|                    .background(
671|27f2ec|                        RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 3)
672|ebf9c9|                            .stroke(Color.secondary.opacity(0.3), lineWidth: 1)
673|1961a4|                    )
674|a7dc16|            }
675|77626e|            Text(description)
676|a7de34|                .font(.system(size: 11))
677|831eae|                .foregroundColor(.secondary)
678|5f3077|        }
679|27e597|    }

23|adc83b|
24|ad8ede|    private static var isUITesting: Bool {
25|21f3a5|        ProcessInfo.processInfo.arguments.contains("-uiTesting")
26|27e597|    }

28|0ef2ae|    private static func makeUITestItemsIfNeeded() -> [QuickOpenItem] {
29|eae1e7|        guard isUITesting else { return [] }
30|8e542b|        return makeUITestItems()
31|27e597|    }
32|adc83b|
33|671c58|    private static func makeUITestItems() -> [QuickOpenItem] {
34|5f447c|        // Create a small, stable set of files that are safe to open.
35|460d36|        let fm = FileManager.default
36|270623|        let baseDir = URL(fileURLWithPath: NSTemporaryDirectory(), isDirectory: true)
37|5bf775|            .appendingPathComponent("VSCodeiPadOS-UITests", isDirectory: true)
38|adc83b|
39|0a79fb|        try? fm.createDirectory(at: baseDir, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
40|adc83b|
41|af3c9f|        func ensureFile(_ name: String, contents: String) -> URL {
42|7ea142|            let url = baseDir.appendingPathComponent(name)
43|89b05b|            if !fm.fileExists(atPath: url.path) {
44|e4ad8a|                try? contents.write(to: url, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
45|a7dc16|            }
46|f185c6|            return url
47|5f3077|        }
48|adc83b|
49|79aa8e|        let fileA = ensureFile("UITest-A.txt", contents: "A")
50|546667|        let fileB = ensureFile("UITest-B.txt", contents: "B")
51|adc83b|
52|be059a|        return [
53|f8cfd4|            QuickOpenItem(name: "UITest-A.txt", path: "", url: fileA, isOpen: false, language: CodeLanguage(from: "txt")),
54|4e7b3e|            QuickOpenItem(name: "UITest-B.txt", path: "", url: fileB, isOpen: false, language: CodeLanguage(from: "txt"))
55|220505|        ]
56|27e597|    }

58|1ca737|    private var allFiles: [QuickOpenItem] {
59|6eb9be|        if Self.isUITesting {

61|5f3077|        }
62|adc83b|
63|bacef6|        var items: [QuickOpenItem] = []
64|adc83b|
65|feb2fc|        // Add open tabs as recent files
66|9e03c8|        for tab in editorCore.tabs {
67|e5eada|            items.append(QuickOpenItem(
68|79263e|                name: tab.fileName,
69|6ff6d6|                path: tab.url?.deletingLastPathComponent().path ?? "",
70|321b29|                url: tab.url,

72|2acbeb|                language: tab.language
73|30ec32|            ))
74|5f3077|        }
75|adc83b|

79|5f3077|        }
80|adc83b|
81|1d239a|        return items

84|33c19a|    private func collectFiles(from node: FileTreeNode, items: inout [QuickOpenItem], basePath: String) {
85|6e7ff6|        let currentPath = basePath.isEmpty ? node.name : "\(basePath)/\(node.name)"
86|adc83b|
87|c98b08|        if !node.isDirectory {
88|c6c38f|            // Skip if already in tabs
89|d6cef7|            if !editorCore.tabs.contains(where: { $0.url == node.url }) {
90|919809|                items.append(QuickOpenItem(

92|d63e10|                    path: basePath,
93|fba36c|                    url: node.url,
94|003454|                    isOpen: false,
95|e67d81|                    language: CodeLanguage(from: node.fileExtension)
96|2188d8|                ))
97|a7dc16|            }
98|5f3077|        }
99|adc83b|
100|13b8cd|        for child in node.children {
101|bdd416|            collectFiles(from: child, items: &items, basePath: currentPath)
102|5f3077|        }
103|27e597|    }

106|93055c|        if searchText.isEmpty {
107|89fbb2|            // Show open files first, then recent
108|064b28|            return allFiles.sorted { a, b in

110|4e9d5a|                if !a.isOpen && b.isOpen { return false }
111|daa15c|                return a.name < b.name
112|a7dc16|            }
113|5f3077|        }

115|4095c2|        return allFiles

123|64a318|                return (item, totalScore)
124|a7dc16|            }
125|4a2f11|            .sorted { $0.1 > $1.1 }
126|ffcc79|            .map { $0.0 }
127|27e597|    }
